source.name: Smash Up faction card catalog
source.scope: All 106 faction decks. Faction-card details are sourced from the official Rulebook Wiki where available, with 16 licensed Marvel/Disney factions sourced from the SmashUp Wiki; base cards are intentionally outside this faction-deck catalog.
source.imageScope: Official Rulebook Wiki factions use individual card scans. Licensed Marvel/Disney factions use a faction-level reference image only when the source provides one; cards without an independent scan are clearly marked instead of being assigned an incorrect image.
source.translationScope: Chinese names and rules are automated translations. The English card text and linked source remain the authoritative reference.

factions.name: Action Heroes
mechanics: Rewards If A Minion Is Your Only One At A Base

cards.name: Commandbro
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: At the end of your turn, if this is your only minion here, draw a card
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你的回合结束时，如果这是你唯一的随从，则抓一张牌

cards.name: Gracie Brones
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion and give it an additional +1 power until the end of the turn for each +1 power counter on it.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，如果这是你唯一的随从，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，并在回合结束时为其上的每个 +1 力量指示物赋予额外的 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: Kickboxbro
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: At the end of your turn, you may store a card from your hand under this card. Talent: Play an action stored under this card as an extra action. Special: Before this base scores, if this is your only minion here, you may use this minion's talent.
clarifications: If this minion gains additional Talents, you can only use one of them before the base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你的回合结束时，你可以将一张手牌存放在这张牌下面。天赋：执行此卡下存储的一个动作作为额外动作。特殊：在此基地计分前，如果这是你这里唯一的随从，你可以使用该随从的天赋。
clarificationsZh: 如果该随从获得额外天赋，你只能在基地计分前使用其中一项。

cards.name: Rumbro
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: During your turn, if this is your only minion here, the breakpoint of this base is reduced by 4.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你的回合中，如果这是你唯一的随从，则该基地的断点减少 4。

cards.name: Robobro
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another player plays or moves a minion to here, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在另一位玩家使用或移动随从到此处后，您可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 对于具有触发效果的卡牌 – 例如“X 发生后”——每次 X 发生时效果都会完成，即使多个 X 同时发生也是如此。

cards.name: Warbro
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Reduce the breakpoint of a different base where you have exactly one minion by 3 until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 天赋：将你只有一个随从的不同基地的断点减少 3，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: All Out of Bubblegum
cards.text: Give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn. If it is your only minion at that base, you may play an extra action.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: All Out of Bubblegum 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 给予你的一个随从 +2 力量直到回合结束。如果它是你在该基地唯一的随从，你可以采取额外的行动。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: Collateral Damage
cards.text: Reduce the breakpoint of a base by 5 until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将基地的断点减少 5 点，直至回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: Final Stand
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores where you have exactly one minion. Destroy a minion of printed power 3 or less there controlled by each other player.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前进行游戏，此时你只有一个随从。消灭由其他玩家控制的印刷力量为 3 或更少的小兵。

cards.name: Friends Through Eternity
cards.text: Discard a card to play two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 弃掉一张牌可以进行两次额外的行动。

cards.name: Get to the Choppa!
cards.text: Move one of your minions from one base to another. If it is your only minion there, you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Get to the Choppa! 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将你的一名随从从一个基地转移到另一个基地。如果它是你唯一的随从，你可以采取额外的行动。

cards.name: Hostage Rescue
cards.text: Search your deck for a minion and place it on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索一个随从，并将其放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Lone Wolf
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. If it is your only minion here, it has +4 power instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。如果它是你这里唯一的随从，那么它的力量则为+4。

cards.name: Pushing the Limit
cards.text: For each base where you have exactly one minion, either place two +1 power counters on that minion or draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对于每个只有一个随从的基地，可以在该随从上放置两个 +1 能量指示物或抓一张牌。

cards.name: Slo-Mo Attack
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If you have exactly one minion here, reduce this base's breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn. Ongoing: Your minions here are not affected by other players’ actions.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：如果你这里只有一个随从，则将该基地的断点减少3，直到回合结束。持续：你的小兵不会受到其他玩家行为的影响。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: The Right Person
cards.text: Play an extra minion on a base where you have no minions. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在没有小兵的基地上扮演额外的小兵。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Walk Away... Slowly
cards.text: Walk Away... Slowly - Special: Play after a base scores. Return one of your minions there to its owner's hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 走开...慢慢地 - 特别：在基地计分后进行游戏。将你的一名随从移回其主人手上。

mechanicsZh: 如果基地里只有一个小兵的话奖励
六个独特的 Power-5 小黄人

factions.name: Adolescent Epic Geckos
mechanics: Playing Two Or More Actions Per Turn

cards.name: Hokusai
cards.text: Power 4 - You may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. Talent: If you have played at least two actions this turn, for each base you may place a +1 power counter on a minion there
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以在你的一名随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：如果你本回合至少进行了两次行动，则对于每个基地，你可以在那里的随从上放置一个+1力量指示物

cards.name: Kandinsky
cards.text: Power 4 - This minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Talent: If you have played at least two actions this turn, give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn OR move another one of your minions to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 该随从获得 +1 力量直至回合结束。天赋：如果你本回合至少进行了两次行动，则给予该随从+2力量直到回合结束或将你的另一名随从移至此处。

cards.name: Monet
cards.text: Power 4 - Draw a card. Ongoing: Any time you can play an action, you may instead draw a card and trigger all abilities as though you had played an action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 抓一张牌。正在进行：任何时候你可以进行一个动作，你都可以抓一张牌并触发所有异能，就像你已经进行了一个动作一样。

cards.name: Van Gogh
cards.text: Power 4 - You may shuffle a standard action from your discard pile into your deck. Ongoing: After you play a standard action, you may store it under this card. At the start of your turn or after you win this base, shuffle all cards stored under this card into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以将一个标准动作从你的弃牌堆洗入你的牌库。持续：当你进行一个标准动作后，你可以将其存储在这张卡下。在你的回合开始时或在你赢得这个基地后，将这张卡下存储的所有卡牌洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: K.C. Smith
cards.text: Power 3 - Fusion - Minion: Play an extra action. / Action: Play an extra minion
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 融合 - 小兵：执行一个额外动作。 / 行动：扮演额外的随从

cards.name: June
cards.text: Power 2 - If you have a minion of printed power 4 in play, you may swap it for one with a different name in your hand or deck; if not, you may draw one off the top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果你在场上有一个印有力量 4 的随从，你可以将其换成手牌或牌组中具有不同名称的随从；如果没有，你可以从牌库顶抽一张。

cards.name: Breaking News
cards.text: Look at the top four cards of your deck. Draw one and return the rest in any order. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的四张牌。抽取一个并按任意顺序返回其余的。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Flip Kick
cards.text: Draw a card. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, draw two more cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 画一张卡片。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则执行一个额外动作；如果没有，则再抓两张牌。

cards.name: Gecko Blimp
cards.text: If this is your first action played this turn, move one of your minions and play an extra action; if not, move any minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则移动你的一个随从并执行一个额外动作；如果没有，移动任何随从。

cards.name: Gecko Power
cards.text: Play on a minion. Talent: If you have played at least two other actions this turn, move this minion OR place a +1 power counter on it OR give it +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。天赋：如果你本回合至少进行了两次其他行动，则移动该随从或在其上放置一个+1力量指示物或赋予其+2力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Gecko Rap
cards.text: Swap one of your minions in play for one with a different name and equal or less power in your hand, deck, or discard pile. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place a +1 power counter on the new minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将场上的一名随从交换为手牌、牌组或弃牌堆中具有不同名称且力量相同或更少的随从。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则执行一个额外动作；如果没有，则在新随从上放置一个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Lasagna Party
cards.text: Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place two +1 power counters on a minion at that base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 额外使用一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则执行一个额外动作；如果没有，则在该基地的一个随从上放置两个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Now You Know: Bullying
cards.text: Move one of your minions. Special: After a base scores where you didn’t win, you may play this card to return one of your minions there to your hand instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Now You Know: Bullying 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 移动你的一名随从。特殊：在你没有获胜的基地计分后，你可以打出这张牌来将你的一个随从返回你的手牌。

cards.name: The Master's Teachings
cards.text: Place two +1 power counters on one of your minions. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, you may give that minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的一名随从身上放置两个+1力量指示物。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，则执行一个额外动作；如果没有，你可以给予该随从+2力量直到回合结束。

mechanicsZh: 每回合进行两个或更多动作

cards.name: Aladdin
cards.text: power 5 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for The Lamp, reveal it, and draw it. Shuffle your deck if you searched it. Talent: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an action. Draw it and shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 5 - 在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索神灯，展示它并抽出它。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。天赋：展示你牌组中的牌，直到你展示一个行动。抽出它并将其余的洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Jasmine
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Discard an action to play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：放弃一个动作以进行额外的动作。

cards.name: Abu
cards.text: power 3 - Place an action from your discard pile on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 3 - 将弃牌堆中的一个动作放在牌组顶部。

cards.name: Genie
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a copy of Wish, reveal it, and place it into your hand. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索一份愿望副本，展示它，并将其放入你的手上。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。

cards.name: Rajah
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Discard an action to give this character +2 power until the end of the turn. Special: Before this base scores, you may use this character’s talent.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：放弃一个动作，使该角色获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。特别：在此基地计分前，您可以使用该角色的天赋。

cards.name: Carpet
cards.text: power 1 - Talent: Move this character and up to two of your other characters here to another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 天赋：将此角色和最多两个其他角色移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Palace Guard
cards.text: power 2 - Talent: Discard an action to place a +1 power counter on each of your Palace Guards here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：放弃一个动作，在你的每个宫殿守卫身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: A Friend Like Me
cards.text: Reveal the top four cards of your deck. Draw all actions and shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的四张牌。绘制所有动作并将其余的洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Cave of Wonders
cards.text: Place an action from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个动作放入你的手上。

cards.name: Jafar
cards.text: Each other player discards an action from their hand or reveals their hand to show it has no actions. You may play one of the discarded actions or an action from your hand as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 其他玩家都放弃自己手牌中的一个动作，或者亮出自己的手牌以表明没有任何动作。您可以使用已放弃的动作之一或手牌中的一个动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: Magic Carpet Ride
cards.text: Search your deck, hand, and/or discard pile for Carpet, shuffle your deck if you searched it, and play Carpet as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组、手牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索“地毯”，如果搜索到它，则洗牌，然后将“地毯”作为额外角色使用。

cards.name: Street Rat
cards.text: Play an action from another player’s discard pile as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 从其他玩家的弃牌堆中执行一个动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: The Lamp
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for Genie, reveal it and draw it. Shuffle your deck if you searched it. Place this card on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索精灵，展示它并抽出它。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。将这张卡放在你牌库的底部。

cards.name: Wish
cards.text: If you have Genie in play, choose one effect and place this card into the box:• Play two extra non-Wish cards.• Give a character +5 power until the end of the turn.• Draw four cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 如果场上有精灵，选择一个效果并将这张卡放入盒子中：• 额外打出两张非愿望卡。• 给予角色 +5 力量直至回合结束。• 抓四张卡。

cards.name: Supreme Overlord
cards.text: Power 5 - You may return a minion to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 你可以将一个随从移回其拥有者的手上。

cards.name: Invader
cards.text: Power 3 - Gain 1 VP.
clarifications: If the Invader is destroyed or its ability is later cancelled, you do not lose the VP it gave you.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 获得 1 VP。
clarificationsZh: 如果入侵者被摧毁或者其能力后来被取消，你不会失去它给你的 VP。

cards.name: Scout
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: After this base scores, you may return this minion to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 特殊：在此基地计分后，你可以将该随从移回你的手上。

cards.name: Collector
cards.text: Power 2 - You may return a non-Collector minion of power 3 or less on this base to its owner’s hand.
cards.errata: Yes, Reversion - Changed back to the original wording (No longer has the "non-Collector" errata that was added in the Bigger Geekier Box update)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以将这个基地上力量为 3 或以下的非收藏家随从移回其拥有者手上。

cards.name: Abduction
cards.text: Return a minion to its owner’s hand. Play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移回其主人的手上。扮演额外的随从。

cards.name: Beam Up
cards.text: Return a minion to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移回其主人的手上。

cards.name: Crop Circles
cards.text: Choose a base. Return each minion on that base to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将该基地上的每个随从移回其所有者手上。

cards.name: Disintegrator
cards.text: Place a minion of power 3 or less on the bottom of its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个力量为 3 或以下的随从置于其拥有者牌库的底部。

cards.name: Invasion
cards.text: Move a minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Jammed Signal
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: This base’s abilities are cancelled.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：该基地的能力被取消。

cards.name: Probe
cards.text: Look at another player’s hand and choose a minion in it. That player discards that minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 查看另一个玩家的手牌并选择其中的一个随从。该玩家弃掉该随从。

cards.name: Terraforming
cards.text: Search the base deck for a base and swap it with a base in play. You may play an extra minion there.
clarifications: When a base is swapped, all cards on it remain on the new base (minions, actions on the base and on minions there, buried cards, titans, etc.)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在基础牌组中搜索基地并将其与游戏中的基地交换。你可以在那里扮演一个额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 当交换基地时，其上的所有卡牌都会保留在新基地上（小兵、基地上的行动以及那里的小兵、埋藏的卡牌、泰坦等）

cards.name: Anansi the Spider
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Search your deck for a standard action and play it as an extra action. Then place it into another player’s hand instead of where it would normally go. You cannot play any copy of that action again this turn.
clarifications: The action is placed into the player’s hand instead of the discard pile or any other location specified by the card itself.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在你的套牌中搜索标准动作并将其作为额外动作进行。然后将其放入另一个玩家的手上，而不是通常放置的地方。本回合你不能再次进行该动作的任何副本。
clarificationsZh: 该行动被放入玩家的手中，而不是弃牌堆或卡牌本身指定的任何其他位置。
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Onini the Python
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After another player plays or discards a card they don’t own from a hand or deck, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (can now place on any of your minions, also now optional)
clarifications: Playing or discarding madness cards doesn’t count for these since the controller of a madness card is also considered its owner. Playing or discarding monsters or treasure cards does count.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在另一名玩家从手牌或牌组中打出或丢弃一张不属于他们的牌后，你可以在你的一个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 打出或丢弃疯狂卡牌不会计入这些，因为疯狂卡牌的控制者也被视为其所有者。打出或丢弃怪物或宝藏卡确实有效。

cards.name: Osebo the Leopard
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After you place a card into another player’s hand, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当你将一张牌放入另一位玩家的手上后，在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Akye the Turtle
cards.text: Power 3 - You may place a card from your hand into another player’s hand to draw two cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 您可以将一张牌从您的手牌放入另一位玩家的手牌中以抽两张牌。

cards.name: Mboro Hornet
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After another player plays or discards a card they don't own from a hand or deck, you may play this minion as an extra minion.
clarifications: Playing or discarding madness cards doesn’t count for these since the controller of a madness card is also considered its owner. Playing or discarding monsters or treasure cards does count.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：当其他玩家从手牌或牌组中打出或丢弃一张不属于他们的牌后，您可以将该随从作为额外随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 打出或丢弃疯狂卡牌不会计入这些，因为疯狂卡牌的控制者也被视为其所有者。打出或丢弃怪物或宝藏卡确实有效。
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Collecting Stories
cards.text: Look at another player’s hand. You may play a card you own from their hand as an extra card.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 看看另一个玩家的手牌。您可以从他们手中打出一张您拥有的牌作为额外牌。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Ear of Corn
cards.text: Shuffle up to three actions from your discard pile into your deck and play an extra action. Place this card into another player’s hand
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中最多三个动作洗入牌库，并执行一个额外动作。将这张卡放入另一位玩家的手上

cards.name: Feather Gifts
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base. Place this card into another player’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从转移到另一个基地。将这张卡置于另一名玩家的手上。

cards.name: Let it be Full and Eat
cards.text: Draw two cards. Place this card into another player’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Let it be Full and Eat 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。将这张卡置于另一名玩家的手上。

cards.name: Pot of Beans
cards.text: Place two +1 power counters total on minions. Place this card into another player's hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在小兵身上放置两个总计+1 能量指示物。将这张卡置于另一名玩家的手上。

cards.name: Pot of Wisdom
cards.text: Draw a card for each other player, then place a card from your hand into each other player’s hand. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 为每个其他玩家抽一张牌，然后将您手中的一张牌放入其他玩家的手上。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: The Perfect Gift
cards.text: Search your deck for a standard action and play it as an extra action. Then place it into another player’s hand instead of where it would normally go.
clarifications: The action is placed into the player’s hand instead of the discard pile or any other location specified by the card itself.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌中搜索标准动作并将其作为额外动作进行。然后将其放入另一个玩家的手上，而不是通常放置的地方。
clarificationsZh: 该行动被放入玩家的手中，而不是弃牌堆或卡牌本身指定的任何其他位置。
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Trading Stories
cards.text: You may place up to three cards from your hand into other players’ hands. For each one placed, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 您最多可以将自己手中的三张牌放入其他玩家的手中。每放置一个，抽一张牌。

cards.name: Pharaoh
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another buried card is uncovered, draw a card. Special: Before this base scores, you may uncover one of your buried cards here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在翻开另一张埋藏的牌后，抓一张牌。特别：在此基地计分前，你可以在这里揭开一张埋藏的牌。

cards.name: Priest of Anubis
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +2 power if you have a card buried here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果你在这里埋了一张牌，则该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Pyramid Engineer
cards.text: Power 3 - You may uncover one of your buried cards here. Talent: Bury a card from your hand here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以在这里揭开一张埋藏的牌。天赋：将你手中的一张牌埋在这里。

cards.name: Mummy
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After this base scores, you may bury this minion on another base.
clarifications: This ability can only trigger if the Mummy is uncovered before the base finishes scoring. If you use its ability, bury it directly on a different base before the old base is discarded, without going to the discard pile or your hand first.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：在此基地计分后，您可以将该随从埋在另一个基地上。
clarificationsZh: 只有在基地完成得分之前木乃伊被发现时才能触发此能力。如果你使用它的能力，在旧基地被丢弃之前将其直接埋在不同的基地上，而无需先进入弃牌堆或你的手牌。

cards.name: Ancient Curse
cards.text: Play on a minion. You may remove a +1 power counter from it. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。你可以从中移除一个+1能量指示物。进行中：该随从的力量为-2。

cards.name: Blessing of Anubis
cards.text: Bury this card. Special: When this card is uncovered, your minions here each gain +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: If you use this card’s ability to bury itself, you reveal it and place it face down on the base. If you uncover it you play it again but ignore the first part since uncovered cards are not reburied.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 埋掉这张卡。特殊：当这张卡被翻开时，你的随从们每人获得+2力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 如果你使用这张卡的能力来掩埋自己，你可以将其展示出来并将其面朝下放在底座上。如果你发现了它，你会再次玩它，但忽略第一部分，因为未发现的卡牌不会被重新埋葬。

cards.name: Lost Knowledge
cards.text: Bury a card from your hand OR uncover one of your buried cards. Special: You may play this card before a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 埋掉你手中的一张牌或揭开其中一张埋藏的牌。特别：你可以在基地计分前打出这张牌。

cards.name: Mummy Strength
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. If there is a card buried on its base, it gains +4 power until the end of the turn, otherwise it gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。如果其底座上埋有一张牌，则该牌在回合结束前获得+4力量，否则在回合结束前获得+2力量。

cards.name: Plague of Locusts
cards.text: Choose a base. All other players’ minions there get -1 power until the end of the turn. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。所有其他玩家的随从获得 -1 力量直到回合结束。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。

cards.name: Seal the Tomb
cards.text: Bury up to two cards from your hand on the same base OR uncover up to two of your buried cards on the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将您手上最多两张牌埋在同一个底座上，或者在同一底座上揭开最多两张埋藏牌。

cards.name: Tomb Trap
cards.text: Bury this card. Special: When this card is uncovered, you may destroy a minion of power 4 or less here.
clarifications: If you use this card’s ability to bury itself, you reveal it and place it face down on the base. If you uncover it you play it again but ignore the first part since uncovered cards are not reburied.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 埋掉这张卡。特别：当这张卡被翻开时，你可以消灭这里的一个力量为4或更少的随从。
clarificationsZh: 如果你使用这张卡的能力来掩埋自己，你可以将其展示出来并将其面朝下放在底座上。如果你发现了它，你会再次玩它，但忽略第一部分，因为未发现的卡牌不会被重新埋葬。

cards.name: You Can Take It With You
cards.text: Bury this card. Special: When this card is uncovered, draw three cards.
clarifications: If you use this card’s ability to bury itself, you reveal it and place it face down on the base. If you uncover it you play it again but ignore the first part since uncovered cards are not reburied.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: You Can Take It With You 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 埋掉这张卡。特别：当这张牌未被揭开时，抓三张牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果你使用这张卡的能力来掩埋自己，你可以将其展示出来并将其面朝下放在底座上。如果你发现了它，你会再次玩它，但忽略第一部分，因为未发现的卡牌不会被重新埋葬。

cards.name: Sphinx
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn, you may return one of your buried cards to your hand to play this titan on its base. Special: After a base scores while this titan is in play, you may return one of your buried cards there to your hand. Talent: Bury a card from your hand here.
clarifications: Sphinx cannot returned buried monster cards to your hand.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，你可以将一张埋藏的牌返回你的手上，并在其基地上使用该泰坦。特殊：当这个泰坦在场时，在基地计分后，你可以将其中一张埋藏的牌返回你的手上。天赋：将你手中的一张牌埋在这里。
clarificationsZh: 狮身人面像不能将埋藏的怪物卡返回你的手牌。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Sapa Inca
cards.text: Power 5 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that can be played on a base, and add it to your hand. Ongoing: After you play an action on a base, place a +1 power counter on one your minions there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索可以在基地上进行的动作，并将其添加到你的手牌中。正在进行：当你在基地上执行一个动作后，在你的一个随从上放置一个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Child of the Sun
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After the first time you play an action on this base each turn, you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Child of the Sun 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每轮你第一次在这个基地上执行一个动作后，你可以执行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Incan Engineer
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal an action that can be played on a base. Add it to your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 从你的牌组顶部展示卡牌，直到你展示可以在基地上进行的动作。将其添加到您的手上。将其余的洗入你的套牌中。

cards.name: Llama
cards.text: Power 2 - You may return one of your actions played on another base to your hand and play it here as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将在另一个基地进行的一项行动返回到你的手上，并在这里作为额外行动进行。

cards.name: Armory
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: You have +2 power here for each of your other actions on this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：你在这个基地上的每项其他行动都会获得 +2 力量。

cards.name: Ashlar Masonry
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores. You may return one of your actions on that base to your hand and shuffle the rest of them into your deck instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分后进行比赛。你可以将你在该基地上的一项行动返回你的手上，并将其余的行动洗入你的牌库而不是弃牌堆中。

cards.name: Fortress Walls
cards.text: Play on a base. Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions here. Ongoing: After you play another action on this base, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。在你的一个随从身上放置一个+1能量指示物。进行中：当你在这个基地上进行另一次行动后，你可以在你的一个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Golden Condor
cards.text: Return any number of your actions on bases to your hand. You must play each of them as an extra action.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的基地行动返回你的手牌。您必须将其中每一个都作为额外动作来玩。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Quipu Strings
cards.text: Choose an action in your discard pile that can be played on a base and play it as an extra action.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的弃牌堆中选择一个可以在基地上进行的动作，并将其作为额外动作进行。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Royal Highway
cards.text: Play on a base. You may move one of your minions to or from here. Ongoing: After you play an action on another base, you may move one of your minions from here to there or from there to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。你可以将你的一名随从移入或移出这里。正在进行：当你在另一个基地进行行动后，你可以将你的一个随从从这里移动到那里，或者从那里移动到这里。

cards.name: Signs in the Stars
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Turn the top card of the base deck face up. While the top base card is face up this base also has its abilities. At the start of each player’s turn they may turn the top base card down until the end of the turn. Talent: Place the top card of the base deck on the bottom of the deck.
clarifications: If the top base card changes – because of this card’s controller using its talent, or another card’s ability, or another base scoring – the previous top base card’s ability stops being applied, but any of its effects that have already happened (e.g. "+2 power until the end of the turn") are not undone; the new top base card is face up if the previous card was.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Signs in the Stars 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：将基础牌组最上面的牌面朝上。虽然顶部基础卡正面朝上，但该基础卡也有其能力。在每个玩家的回合开始时，他们可以将顶部的底牌向下翻，直到回合结束。天赋：将基础牌组顶牌放在牌组底部。
clarificationsZh: 如果顶部基础卡牌发生变化——由于这张卡牌的操控者使用其天赋，或另一张卡牌的能力，或另一个基地计分——之前的顶部基础卡牌的能力将停止应用，但其任何已经发生的效果（例如“+2力量直到回合结束”）都不会被撤消；如果之前的牌面朝上，则新的顶部底牌面朝上。

cards.name: Temple of the Sun
cards.text: Play on a base. Draw a card. Ongoing: After you play another action on this base, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Temple of the Sun 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。画一张卡片。进行中：当你在此基地进行另一次行动后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Space Knight
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. You may draw one action from the revealed cards. Return the rest in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：展示你牌组顶的三张牌。你可以从翻开的牌中抽取一项行动。以任意顺序返回其余部分。

cards.name: Scoundrel
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion and another one of your minions here to another base.
clarifications: You can use its talent if you have no other minions at its base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将这个随从和你的另一个随从移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 如果你的基地没有其他随从，你可以使用它的天赋。

cards.name: Space Prince
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Play an extra action that directly increases the power of one of your minions.
clarifications: A card directly increases power if it gives it “+N power”, or places a +1 power counter, or transfers a +1 power counter, or sets the printed power to a higher value. Granting a power-increase talent (e.g. The Touch), or destroying a negative power card (e.g. Change Into A Gun) are not direct power increases. This refers to actions that target cards already in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：执行一个额外动作，直接增强你的一个随从的力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果一张卡给予它“+N力量”，或者放置一个+1力量计数器，或者转移一个+1力量计数器，或者将打印的力量设置为更高的值，那么它会直接增加力量。授予力量增加天赋（例如触摸）或摧毁负面力量卡（例如变枪）并不是直接力量增加。这是指针对已经在场的牌的行动。

cards.name: Walking Carpet
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, if you are not winning, you may play an action that directly increases the power of this minion.
clarifications: A card directly increases power if it gives it “+N power”, or places a +1 power counter, or transfers a +1 power counter, or sets the printed power to a higher value. Granting a power-increase talent (e.g. The Touch), or destroying a negative power card (e.g. Change Into A Gun) are not direct power increases. This refers to actions that target cards already in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，如果你没有获胜，你可以采取一个行动来直接增加该随从的力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果一张卡给予它“+N力量”，或者放置一个+1力量计数器，或者转移一个+1力量计数器，或者将打印的力量设置为更高的值，那么它会直接增加力量。授予力量增加天赋（例如触摸）或摧毁负面力量卡（例如变枪）并不是直接力量增加。这是指针对已经在场的牌的行动。

cards.name: Alien Guru
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play an action that directly increases a minion’s power, you may also place a +1 power counter on it.
clarifications: If the action increases the power of more than one minion, choose one of them to get the power counter.

A card directly increases power if it gives it “+N power”, or places a +1 power counter, or transfers a +1 power counter, or sets the printed power to a higher value. Granting a power-increase talent (e.g. The Touch), or destroying a negative power card (e.g. Change Into A Gun) are not direct power increases. This refers to actions that target cards already in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：每回合一次，在你执行直接增加随从力量的动作后，你还可以在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 如果该行动增加了超过一名随从的力量，请选择其中一名以获得力量指示物。
如果一张卡给予它“+N力量”，或者放置一个+1力量计数器，或者转移一个+1力量计数器，或者将打印的力量设置为更高的值，那么它会直接增加力量。授予力量增加天赋（例如触摸）或摧毁负面力量卡（例如变枪）并不是直接力量增加。这是指针对已经在场的牌的行动。

cards.name: Annoying Alien
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Name a minion. All minions here with that name get -2 power until the start of your next turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 天赋：命名一个随从。所有具有该名称的小兵都会获得 -2 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Astro Robot
cards.text: Power 2 - You may destroy an action played on this base or on a minion here
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以摧毁在这个基地或这里的小兵上进行的行动

cards.name: Mannersbot
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, draw it, otherwise return it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：展示你牌组顶牌。如果是一个动作，则绘制它，否则返回它。

cards.name: Pupoks
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Lose 1 VP to reveal the top three cards of your deck and draw them. You may play one of them as an extra card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：失去 1 点 VP，展示你牌组顶部的三张牌并抽出它们。您可以使用其中一张作为额外的牌。

cards.name: Ghost Knight
cards.text: Power 0 - Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed. Your other minions here have +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 持续：该随从无法被消灭。你这里的其他随从拥有+2力量。

cards.name: Block the Probe
cards.text: Choose a minion. It gains +2 power until the end of the turn. Special: You may play this card before a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。直到回合结束为止，力量获得+2。特别：你可以在基地计分前打出这张牌。

cards.name: Hidden Base
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if you have a minion here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：在你的回合开始时，如果你这里有随从，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: It's a Trap!
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an action. You may draw it or play it immediately. Shuffle the unused cards into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，展示你牌组中的牌，直到你展示一个动作。您可以立即绘制或播放它。将未使用的卡牌洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Laser Sword
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power and is not affected by other players’ minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从拥有+2力量，并且不受其他玩家随从的影响。

cards.name: Prepare for Battle
cards.text: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Draw two of them and return the other to the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (top two changed to top three, take one changed to draw two)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的三张牌。抽出其中两张，并将另一张放回牌组的顶部或底部。

cards.name: Recycle the Trash
cards.text: Shuffle up to two actions from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两个动作从弃牌堆洗入牌库。

cards.name: Use the Fours
cards.text: One of your minions gains +4 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+4力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Yield to Rage
cards.text: One of your minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+2力量直到回合结束。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Black Widow
cards.text: power 5 - You may destroy a character here of power 5 or less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以消灭这里力量为 5 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Captain America
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Give each of your other characters currently here +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：给予当前在这里的每个其他角色 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Hawkeye
cards.text: power 5 - Draw three cards. Discard two cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 抓三张牌。弃掉两张牌。

cards.name: Hulk
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: This character gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：该角色获得 +2 力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Iron Man
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Move this character and up to one other of your characters here to another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：将此角色和您的其他角色移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Thor
cards.text: power 5 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for Mjolnir, reveal it, and draw it. Shuffle your deck if you searched it. Talent: Move Mjolnir from one character to another.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 5 - 在你的牌组和/或弃牌堆中搜索雷神锤，展示它并抽出它。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。天赋：将雷神锤从一个角色转移到另一个角色。

cards.name: Avengers Assemble
cards.text: Shuffle up to two characters from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 将最多两个角色从弃牌堆洗入牌库。

cards.name: Cap’s Shield
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here are not affected by other players’ actions. If this card is on Captain America, they also have +1 power each.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。正在进行：你的角色不会受到其他玩家行为的影响。如果这张卡在美国队长身上，他们也各有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Hawkeye’s Arrows
cards.text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal two actions. Draw the actions and shuffle the rest into your deck. If Hawkeye is in play, you may play the drawn cards as extra actions.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组中的牌，直到你展示两个动作。绘制动作并将其余的洗入你的套牌中。如果鹰眼在场，你可以以额外行动打出抽到的牌。

cards.name: Hulk Smash
cards.text: Choose a base. Destroy any number of base modifiers on it. If Hulk is there, you may destroy the base and all its modifiers, and replace it with the top card of the base deck; all characters remain on the new base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。摧毁其上任意数量的基础修饰符。如果绿巨人在那里，你可以摧毁基地及其所有修饰符，并用基地牌组顶牌替换它；所有角色都留在新基地。

cards.name: J.A.R.V.I.S.
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Draw a card. Discard a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：抽一张牌。丢弃一张卡。

cards.name: Mjolnir
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: If this card is on Thor, it has +2 power. Otherwise, it has -2 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：如果这张卡位于托尔身上，则其力量+2。否则，它的功率为-2。

cards.name: Modular Tech
cards.text: Move one of your modifiers from one character to another character, or from one base to another base. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 将您的修饰符之一从一个角色移至另一个角色，或从一个基地移至另一个基地。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Repulsor Boots
cards.text: Move one of your characters to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores to move Iron Man.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 将你的一个角色移动到另一个基地。特别：你可以在基地计分前玩这个来移动钢铁侠。

cards.name: Strategize
cards.text: Look at the top four cards of your deck. Place two of them on the top of the deck and the rest on the bottom, in any order.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的四张牌。将其中两个放在甲板顶部，其余放在底部，顺序任意。

cards.name: Tactical Advantage
cards.text: Choose a character to gain +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个角色，直到回合结束时获得+3力量。

cards.name: Thunder and Lightning
cards.text: Destroy a character of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Widow’s Bite
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. Other players’ characters currently there each get -1 power until the end of the turn. If Black Widow is there, she gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。当前在场的其他玩家角色各自获得 -1 力量，直到回合结束。如果黑寡妇在场，她的力量将获得 +2 直到回合结束。

cards.name: Alex P. McGlide
cards.text: Power 5 - You may place two stasis counters on a card from your hand. Talent: If a card had its last stasis counter removed this turn, you may place a +1 power counter one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以在你手上的一张牌上放置两个停滞指示物。天赋：如果本回合一张牌的最后一个停滞指示物被移除，你可以在你的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Zany Prof
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, you may remove a stasis counter from, or add one to, one of your cards in stasis.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，你可以从一张处于停滞状态的卡牌上移除一个停滞指示物，或在其中添加一个指示物。

cards.name: Lifelong Bully
cards.text: Power 3 - Add a stasis counter to one of your cards in stasis, OR look at the top two cards of your deck, you may place two stasis counters on one of them, and return the rest in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 在你的一张停滞卡牌上添加一个停滞指示物，或者查看你牌组顶部的两张牌，你可以在其中一张上放置两个停滞指示物，然后以任何顺序返回其余的指示物。

cards.name: Sidelined Girlfriend
cards.text: Power 2 - You may place a stasis counter on this card. Special: After a stasis counter is removed from this card, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions on a base. When you play this card from stasis, play it as an extra minion and place a +1 power counter on it.
clarifications: For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以在这张卡上放置一个停滞指示物。特殊：这张卡上的停滞指示物被移除后，你可以在基地上的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。当你从静止中打出这张牌时，将其作为额外的随从打出，并在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 对于具有触发效果的卡牌 – 例如“X 发生后”——每次 X 发生时效果都会完成，即使多个 X 同时发生也是如此。

cards.name: 99 MPH
cards.text: Place two stasis counters on a card from your hand. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将两个停滞指示物放置在你手上的一张牌上。画一张卡片。

cards.name: Back From the Future
cards.text: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. You may place two stasis counters on one of them. Return the rest in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Back From the Future 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的三张牌。你可以在其中之一上放置两个停滞指示物。以任意顺序返回其余部分。

cards.name: Disrupt the Space-Time Continuum
cards.text: Choose up to two cards from your hand. Place a number of stasis counters on each of them equal to the number of cards you chose.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Disrupt the Space-Time Continuum 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 从你的手牌中选择最多两张牌。在每张卡片上放置数量等于你选择的卡牌数量的停滞指示物。

cards.name: Future Almanac?
cards.text: Place three stasis counters on this card. Special: After you remove a stasis counter from this card, draw a card. When you play this card from stasis, discard it.
clarifications: For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在这张卡上放置三个停滞指示物。特殊：当你从这张卡上移除一个停滞指示物后，抓一张卡。当你在停滞状态下打出这张牌时，将其弃掉。
clarificationsZh: 对于具有触发效果的卡牌 – 例如“X 发生后”——每次 X 发生时效果都会完成，即使多个 X 同时发生也是如此。

cards.name: Help From the Past
cards.text: Place three stasis counters on this card. Special: When this card enters stasis, store a card from your discard pile under it. When you play this card from stasis, discard it, and you may play a card stored under it as an extra card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Help From the Past 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在这张卡上放置三个停滞指示物。特殊：当这张牌进入停滞状态时，将你的弃牌堆中的一张牌存放在其下方。当你从静止中打出这张牌时，将其丢弃，然后你可以打出一张存放在其下方的牌作为额外牌。

cards.name: Letter From Another Time
cards.text: Place three stasis counters on this card. Special: When this card enters stasis, search your deck for a card and store it under this card. When you play this card from stasis, discard it, and you may play a card stored under it as an extra card.
clarifications: Whenever you search for a card, you must reveal it, even if there are no restrictions on the card you search for.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Letter From Another Time 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在这张卡上放置三个停滞指示物。特殊：当这张卡进入静止状态时，从你的牌组中搜索一张卡并将其存放在这张卡下方。当你从静止中打出这张牌时，将其丢弃，然后你可以打出一张存放在其下方的牌作为额外牌。
clarificationsZh: 每当你搜索一张卡牌时，即使你搜索的卡牌没有任何限制，你也必须展示它。

cards.name: Lightning Strike
cards.text: Place two stasis counters on this card. Special: When you remove stasis counters from other cards you may place them on this card. On your turn you may use an action play to reduce the breakpoint of a base by one for each stasis counter on this card (up to 5) until the end of the turn and discard this card. When you play this card from stasis, discard it.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在这张卡上放置两个停滞指示物。特殊：当你从其他卡牌上移除停滞指示物时，你可以将它们放置在这张卡牌上。在你的回合中，你可以使用动作游戏将这张卡上每有一个停滞指示物（最多 5 个）将基地的断点减少 1 个，直到回合结束并丢弃这张卡。当你在停滞状态下打出这张牌时，将其弃掉。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。

cards.name: Will Have to Do
cards.text: Place up to two +1 power counters total on your minions, OR remove up to two stasis counters total from your cards in stasis.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Will Have to Do 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的随从身上放置最多两个+1力量指示物，或者从你的停滞卡牌上移除最多两个停滞指示物。

cards.name: General Ivan
cards.text: Power 6 - Ongoing: Your minions cannot be destroyed. Once per turn, after another player's minion moves, you may give your minions there +1 power until the end of the turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 持续：你的随从无法被消灭。每回合一次，在另一名玩家的随从移动后，你可以给你的随从+1力量，直到回合结束。澄清：*无

cards.name: Polar Commando
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this minion or a minion with less power than this minion. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在该随从或力量低于该随从的随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：*无

cards.name: Grizzled Veteran
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move another player’s minion from here to another base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以将另一个玩家的随从从这里移动到另一个基地。澄清：无

cards.name: Cub Scout
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After another player's minion moves here, if it has less power than this minion, you may destroy it. If you do, you may move one of your minions of printed power 3 or less to this base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：当其他玩家的随从移动到这里后，如果它的力量小于该随从，你可以消灭它。如果你这么做了，你可以将你的一名印刷力量为 3 或以下的随从移至此基地。澄清：无

cards.name: Bear Hug
cards.text: Each other player destroys their minion with the least power (controller chooses in case of ties). Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家都以最小的力量消灭他们的随从（在平局的情况下由控制器选择）。澄清：无

cards.name: Bear Necessities
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Until the start of your turn, other players with a minion here cannot play extra cards. At the start of your next turn, destroy this action. Clarifications: The self-destruction ability is part of the talent, so this card only destroys itself at the start of your next turn after you use the talent. Once the talent is used, the extra card-blocking effect remains active on that specific base until the start of your turn, regardless if Bear Necessities is moved, destroyed, or otherwise removed from play.
clarifications: The self-destruction ability is part of the talent, so this card only destroys itself at the start of your next turn after you use the talent.

Once the talent is used, the extra card-blocking effect remains active on that specific base until the start of your turn, regardless if Bear Necessities is moved, destroyed, or otherwise removed from play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在你的回合开始之前，这里有随从的其他玩家不能打出额外的牌。在你的下一个回合开始时，消灭这个行动。说明：自毁能力是天赋的一部分，所以这张卡只会在你使用天赋后的下一个回合开始时摧毁自己。一旦使用该天赋，额外的卡牌阻挡效果将在该特定基地上保持有效，直到你的回合开始，无论熊必需品是否被移动、摧毁或以其他方式从游戏中移除。
clarificationsZh: 自毁能力是天赋的一部分，所以这张卡只会在你使用天赋后的下一个回合开始时摧毁自己。
一旦使用该天赋，额外的卡牌阻挡效果将在该特定基地上保持有效，直到你的回合开始，无论熊必需品是否被移动、摧毁或以其他方式从游戏中移除。

cards.name: Bear Rides You
cards.text: Move a minion. If you moved a minion you control, you may cancel the abilities of a card at its new base until the start of your next turn. Clarifications: The base itself is a card "at its new base," so you can choose to cancel the base.
clarifications: The base itself is a card "at its new base," so you can choose to cancel the base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 移动一个小兵。如果你移动了你操控的随从，你可以取消新基地的一张牌的能力，直到你的下一个回合开始。澄清：基地本身是一张“位于新基地”的卡牌，因此您可以选择取消基地。
clarificationsZh: 基地本身是一张“位于新基地”的卡，因此您可以选择取消基地。

cards.name: Bearing Down
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: This base's breakpoint is increased by 2 for each player with a minion here, or decreased instead if you have moved another player's minion to this base this turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：每有一个小兵在此基地的玩家，该基地的断点就会增加 2，如果你本回合将另一个玩家的小兵移至此基地，则该基地的断点会减少。澄清：无

cards.name: Commission
cards.text: Play an extra minion immediately. You may move another player’s minion from the extra minion’s base to another base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 立即多打一个随从。你可以将另一个玩家的随从从额外的随从基地移动到另一个基地。澄清：无

cards.name: High Ground
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, after another player's minion moves to this base, you may destroy this action to either destroy that minion OR to draw a card and play an action. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：如果你这里有一个小兵，在另一个玩家的小兵移动到这个基地后，你可以摧毁这个行动来摧毁那个小兵或者抓一张牌并进行一个行动。澄清：无

cards.name: Superiority
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If you have the most power here, either draw a card OR your minions here cannot be affected by other players' cards until the start of your next turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：如果你在这里拥有最强的力量，要么抓一张牌，要么你的随从在你的下一个回合开始之前不会受到其他玩家牌的影响。澄清：无

cards.name: You're Pretty Much Borscht
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Move all other players’ minions from there to one other base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: You're Pretty Much Borscht 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有随从的基地。将所有其他玩家的小兵从那里转移到另一个基地。澄清：无

cards.name: Major Ursa
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion play, you may play this titan. Ongoing: After another player's minion moves to or from this base, you may place a +1 power counter on this titan. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on a minion here OR move this titan. Clarifications: *None
cards.textZh: 特殊：您可以扮演这个泰坦，而不是常规的小兵游戏。正在进行：在另一个玩家的随从移入或移出该基地后，你可以在该泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：在此处的小兵上放置一个+1能量指示物或移动该泰坦。澄清：*无
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Belle
cards.text: power 5 - If Beast is here, you may draw up to three cards. Talent: Draw a card, OR discard a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 如果野兽在这里，你最多可以抓三张牌。天赋：抽一张牌，或者弃掉一张牌。

cards.name: Beast
cards.text: power 4 - If Belle is here, place a +1 power counter on it and on this card. Talent: Discard a card to place a +1 power counter on this card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 如果贝儿在这里，在她和这张卡上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：弃掉一张牌，在这张牌上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Cogsworth
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Discard a card to play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：弃掉一张牌以进行额外行动。

cards.name: Lumiere
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Discard a card to play an extra character of power 3 or less here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：弃掉一张牌，在此扮演一个力量为 3 或以下的额外角色。

cards.name: Mrs. Potts and Chip
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Discard a card to draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：弃掉一张牌来抓一张牌。

cards.name: Enchanted Objects
cards.text: power 2 - Special: After you discard this card from your hand, you may play it as an extra character. Use only one Enchanted Objects ability per turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：当你从手上丢弃这张卡后，你可以将其作为额外角色使用。每回合仅使用一个附魔物品能力。

cards.name: Be Our Guest
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If you have discarded a card from your hand this turn, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：如果你本回合已弃掉一张手牌，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: Break the Curse
cards.text: Choose a base. Each of your characters currently there gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Special: After you discard this card from your hand, you may play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。当前所在的每个角色的力量都会获得+1，直到回合结束。特殊：当你从手上丢弃这张卡后，你可以将其作为一个额外动作来使用。

cards.name: Discover the Library
cards.text: Draw two cards, then discard a card. Special: After you discard this card from your hand, you may play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌，然后弃掉一张牌。特殊：当你从手上丢弃这张卡后，你可以将其作为一个额外动作来使用。

cards.name: Ever a Surprise
cards.text: Shuffle up to two characters from your discard pile into your deck. Special: After you discard this card from your hand, you may play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 将最多两个角色从弃牌堆洗入牌库。特殊：当你从手上丢弃这张卡后，你可以将其作为一个额外动作来使用。

cards.name: Gaston
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 5. On each player’s turn, that player may discard two cards to destroy this card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。持续：该基地的断点增加5点。在每个玩家的回合中，该玩家可以弃掉两张牌来破坏这张牌。

cards.name: Petals of the Rose
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: After you discard one or more cards from your hand, you may look at the top two cards of your deck. Place them on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。持续：当你从手牌中弃掉一张或多张牌后，你可以查看你牌组顶的两张牌。以任意顺序将它们放在牌组的顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: This Provincial Town
cards.text: Play an extra character of power 3 or less. Then you may discard a card to place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Beauty and the Beast faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 扮演一个力量为 3 或以下的额外角色。然后你可以丢弃一张牌并在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Baymax
cards.text: power 3 - Ongoing: Your other characters here are not affected by other players’ cards. Special: After this base scores, if this character has any power counters, move another of your characters from here to another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：你的其他角色不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。特别：在此基地计分后，如果该角色有任何能量指示物，请将您的另一个角色从这里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Fred Frederickson IV
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Draw a card, and if this character has any power counters, you may also give another character here -2 power until the start of your next turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.nameZh: 弗雷德·弗雷德里克森四世
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：抓一张牌，如果该角色有任何力量指示物，你也可以给这里的另一个角色 -2 力量，直到你的下回合开始。

cards.name: Go Go Tomago
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Move this character to another base, and if this character has any power counters, you may also move another one of your characters from here to there.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将该角色移动到另一个基地，如果该角色有任何力量指示物，您还可以将另一个角色从这里移动到那里。

cards.name: Honey Lemon
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Destroy a base or character modifier here, or if this character has any power counters, you may instead play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：在这里摧毁一个基地或角色修饰符，或者如果这个角色有任何力量指示物，你可以执行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Hiro Hamada
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on a character here, OR move any number of power counters from one of your characters to another.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：在此处的角色上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，或者将任意数量的力量指示物从一个角色移动到另一个角色。

cards.name: Wasabi
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Until the end of the turn, this character gains +1 power, or +1 power for each +1 power counter on it, up to +5 more power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量3 - 天赋：直到回合结束，该角色获得+1力量，或者其上每有一个+1力量指示物+1力量，最多+5力量。

cards.name: Microbot Swarm
cards.text: power 2 - Place a Microbot Swarm from your discard pile into your hand. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 2 - 将一个微型机器人群从你的弃牌堆放入你的手上。天赋：在这张卡上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Control Mask
cards.text: Character modifier. Play on a non-Microbot Swarm character. Search your deck for a Microbot Swarm, reveal it, draw it, and shuffle your deck. Talent: Play a Microbot Swarm as an extra character, OR move any number of Microbot Swarms to here or from here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。扮演非微型机器人群角色。在你的牌组中搜索微型机器人群，展示它，抽出它，然后洗牌。天赋：扮演一个微型机器人群作为额外角色，或者将任意数量的微型机器人群移动到这里或从这里移动。

cards.name: Control the Swarm
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on each of your characters that doesn’t have one, OR move any number of your power counters among your characters.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在每个没有力量指示物的角色上放置一个+1力量指示物，或者在角色之间移动任意数量的力量指示物。

cards.name: Microbot Maker
cards.text: Base modifier. Place a +1 power counter on each of your characters here. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on one of your characters here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。在此处为每个角色放置一个 +1 能量指示物。天赋：在你的一个角色上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: New Student
cards.text: Play an extra character of power 3 or less and place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 额外扮演一个力量为 3 或更少的角色，并在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Team Effort
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw a card for each of your characters there with power counters.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。为每个角色抽一张带有能量指示物的卡片。

cards.name: Upgrades
cards.text: Place a total of two +1 power counters on your characters. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在你的角色上总共放置两个+1力量指示物。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Version 2.0
cards.text: Choose a base. Each of your characters currently there with power counters gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。当前拥有力量指示物的每个角色都会获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Yokai
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Characters without power counters here have -1 power. Special: After this base scores, you may move a +1 power counter from each of your characters here to other characters.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：此处没有能量指示物的角色的能量为-1。特殊：在此基地计分后，您可以将+1能量指示物从这里的每个角色移动到其他角色。

factions.name: Changerbots
mechanics: Changing Between Sets Of Stats And/Or Abilities With Talents

cards.name: Leader Two
cards.text: Power 6 - One of your other minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 你的其他一个随从获得 +2 力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Solarshout
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Play an extra action. Give this minion -2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Once triggered, the -2 power lasts even if it loses its ability (e.g. from The Touch).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：执行一个额外动作。给予该随从 -2 力量直至回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 一旦触发，即使失去其能力（例如来自 The Touch），-2 的力量也会持续。

cards.name: Bruiser
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed. Talent: This minion gains +2 power and loses its Ongoing ability and all other abilities until the start of your next turn.
clarifications: When the talent is used, the minion loses the abilities granted by actions (e.g., The Touch, Passengers, Flighterizer), but not the benefits of an action’s own abilities (e.g., Cesium Armor, Matrix of Bossiness). Abilities gained after the talent is used are not lost.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：该随从无法被消灭。天赋：该随从获得+2力量并失去其持续能力和所有其他能力，直到你的下一回合开始。
clarificationsZh: 使用该天赋时，小兵会失去动作赋予的能力（例如，触摸、乘客、飞行器），但不会失去动作自身能力的好处（例如，铯盔甲、专横矩阵）。使用天赋后获得的能力不会丢失。

cards.name: Huffie
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Move this minion to another base and give it -1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将该随从移至另一个基地并赋予其 -1 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Cesium Armor
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power and cannot be destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量且无法被消灭。

cards.name: Change Into A Gun
cards.text: Play on one of your minions to destroy a minion of power 4 or less there. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. Destroy this card at the start of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Change Into A Gun 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 对你的一个随从进行游戏，消灭那里的一个力量为 4 或更少的随从。进行中：该随从的力量为-2。在你的回合开始时破坏这张卡。

cards.name: Change Up and Roll On
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores you may move any number of your minions to there. They each get -1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Change Up and Roll On 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，你可以将任意数量的随从移动到那里。他们各自获得-1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Flighterizer
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Move this minion to another base and give it -1 power until the end of the turn.”
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。正在进行：该随从拥有以下能力：“天赋：将该随从移至另一个基地并赋予其-1力量直至回合结束。”

cards.name: Form Mergacon
cards.text: Choose a base. Each of your minions there gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。直到回合结束，你的每个随从都会获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Matrix of Bossiness
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion’s printed power is treated as if it were 5.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：该随从的印刷力量被视为 5。

cards.name: Passengers
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: If this minion moved this turn, move another one of your minions from the previous base to here.”
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。正在进行：该随从具有以下能力：“天赋：如果该随从本回合移动，则将你的另一个随从从前一个基地移至此处。”

cards.name: The Touch
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion gains +3 power and loses all other abilities until the end of the turn.”
clarifications: When the talent is used, the minion loses the abilities granted by actions (e.g., The Touch, Passengers, Flighterizer), but not the benefits of an action’s own abilities (e.g., Cesium Armor, Matrix of Bossiness). Abilities gained after the talent is used are not lost.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。持续：该随从拥有能力：“天赋：该随从获得+3力量并失去所有其他能力，直到回合结束。”
clarificationsZh: 使用该天赋时，小兵会失去动作赋予的能力（例如，触摸、乘客、飞行器），但不会失去动作自身能力的好处（例如，铯盔甲、专横矩阵）。使用天赋后获得的能力不会丢失。

cards.name: Mergacon
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn, if you have two or more minions on a base, you may play this titan there. Ongoing: You have +3 power here. Talent: Move this titan to another base. It loses its ongoing ability until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，如果你的基地上有两个或更多随从，你可以在那里扮演这个泰坦。进行中：你在这里有+3力量。天赋：将这个泰坦移动到另一个基地。它会失去持续的能力，直到回合结束。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 使用天赋在统计数据和/或能力之间进行更改

cards.name: Cardinal
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: If your discard pile has at least five cards, draw two of them at random. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：如果你的弃牌堆至少有五张牌，则随机抽取其中两张。澄清：

cards.name: Deep Friar
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: After this base scores, you may move one of your other minions here to another base. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分后，你可以将你的其他小兵之一移到另一个基地。澄清：

cards.name: Turner
cards.text: Power 3 - You may play an undead monster on any base. Ongoing: During your turn, uncontrolled undead monsters here have -2 power. Clarifications: When directed to play an undead monster specifically, follow the normal rules for playing off the top of the deck to play an undead monster off the top of the monster deck.
clarifications: When directed to play an undead monster specifically, follow the normal rules for playing off the top of the deck to play an undead monster off the top of the monster deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以在任何基地扮演不死怪物。持续：在你的回合中，不受控制的不死怪物的力量为-2。澄清：当被指示专门打出不死怪物时，请遵循从牌组顶部打出的正常规则，从怪物牌组顶部打出不死怪物。
clarificationsZh: 当被指示专门打出不死怪物时，请遵循从牌组顶部打出的正常规则，从怪物牌组顶部打出不死怪物。

cards.name: Holy Roller
cards.text: Power 2 - Shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck OR shuffle up to two cards from your hand into your deck and draw the same number of cards. Clarifications: You do not draw a card if you choose the first OR ability.
clarifications: You do not draw a card if you choose the first OR ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 将弃牌堆中的一张牌洗入牌库，或将最多两张牌从手牌洗入牌库，并抽取相同数量的牌。澄清：如果你选择第一个 OR 能力，你就不会抓牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果你选择第一个 OR 能力，你就不会抓牌。

cards.name: Bin and Gone
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After another base scores, you may move one of your minions from there to here. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：在另一个基地计分后，你可以将你的一个随从从那里移动到这里。澄清：

cards.name: Collection Plate
cards.text: If your discard pile has at least three cards, draw two of them at random. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 如果你的弃牌堆至少有三张牌，则随机抽取其中两张。澄清：

cards.name: Curse of Imprisonment
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has its abilities cancelled and cannot be moved. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从的能力被取消并且无法移动。澄清：

cards.name: Curse of Uselessness
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion adds no power to the base it is on. Clarifications: A minion with CoU still has power, but that power does not count towards breaking the base or earning VPs. A monster with CoU doesn’t add to the breakpoint. If your only minion on a base has CoU on it, your total there is 0, but if 0 is one of the top 3 totals you can still earn VPs.
clarifications: A minion with CoU still has power, but that power does not count towards breaking the base or earning VPs. A monster with CoU doesn’t add to the breakpoint. If your only minion on a base has CoU on it, your total there is 0, but if 0 is one of the top 3 totals you can still earn VPs.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从不会为其所在的基地增加任何力量。澄清：拥有 CoU 的随从仍然拥有力量，但该力量不会计入打破基础或赢得 VP。具有 CoU 的怪物不会添加断点。如果你的基地上唯一的随从有 CoU，那么你的总数为 0，但如果 0 是前 3 个总数之一，你仍然可以获得 VP。
clarificationsZh: 拥有 CoU 的随从仍然拥有力量，但这种力量不会计入打破基础或赢得 VP。具有 CoU 的怪物不会添加断点。如果你的基地上唯一的随从有 CoU，那么你的总数为 0，但如果 0 是前 3 个总数之一，你仍然可以获得 VP。

cards.name: Divine Intervention
cards.text: Play an extra action or an extra minion of power 2 or less. If this card was not played from stasis, place a stasis counter on this card. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 执行一个额外动作或一个额外力量为 2 或更少的随从。如果这张牌不是在静止状态下打出的，则在这张牌上放置一个静止指示物。澄清：

cards.name: Good Habits
cards.text: Give all players' minions +1 power until the end of the turn OR if this card was not played from stasis, place a stasis counter on it. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 给予所有玩家的随从+1力量直到回合结束，或者如果这张牌不是在停滞状态下打出的，则在其上放置一个停滞指示物。澄清：

cards.name: Join the Club
cards.text: Take control of a minion of power 3 or less, or any undead monster, until the end of the turn. Special: When this card would leave your discard pile, you may place a stasis counter on it instead. Clarifications: The Special ability triggers any time it leaves your discard pile, including if your discard pile is reshuffled to make your deck.
clarifications: The Special ability triggers any time it leaves your discard pile, including if your discard pile is reshuffled to make your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 控制一个力量为3或以下的随从，或者任何不死族怪物，直到回合结束。特别：当这张卡离开你的弃牌堆时，你可以在其上放置一个停滞指示物。说明：特殊能力会在任何离开你的弃牌堆时触发，包括如果你的弃牌堆被重新洗牌以组成你的套牌。
clarificationsZh: 特殊能力会在它离开你的弃牌堆时触发，包括如果你的弃牌堆被重新洗牌以组成你的套牌。

cards.name: Reverse Curse
cards.text: Move one of your minions, then you may transfer or destroy an action at its new base. Clarifications: Play- on- minion actions are considered 'at' the new base and can be destroyed or transferred. If you transfer an action on a minion, transfer it to another minion. If you transfer an action on the new base, transfer it to another base.
clarifications: Play- on- minion actions are considered 'at' the new base and can be destroyed or transferred. If you transfer an action on a minion, transfer it to another minion. If you transfer an action on the new base, transfer it to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 移动你的一个随从，然后你就可以在其新基地转移或摧毁一个行动。说明：对小兵进行游戏的行动被视为在新基地“进行”，并且可以被摧毁或转移。如果您将一个动作转移给一个小兵，请将其转移给另一个小兵。如果您在新基地上转移行动，请将其转移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵进行的游戏行动被视为在新基地“进行”，并且可以被销毁或转移。如果您将一个动作转移给一个小兵，请将其转移给另一个小兵。如果您在新基地上转移行动，请将其转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Zobo the Clown
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Instead of your regular action play you may play a standard action from your discard pile, and then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.
clarifications: You place the action you play on the bottom of the deck only if it would normally go to your hand or the discard pile. If it would go someplace else (e.g. the madness deck, another player's hand, buried, stored, in stasis, or boxed) it still goes to that place.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：您可以从弃牌堆中进行标准动作，而不是常规动作游戏，然后将其放在牌组底部，而不是您的手牌或弃牌堆上。
clarificationsZh: 仅当您执行的操作通常会进入您的手牌或弃牌堆时，您才将其放在牌堆的底部。如果它会去其他地方（例如疯狂套牌、另一个玩家的手、埋藏、存储、停滞或装箱），它仍然会去那个地方。

cards.name: Mumu Adams
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After the first time you play an action each turn, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合第一次执行某个动作后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Nickelsmart
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If there are at least two standard actions in your discard pile, choose one of them at random, play it as an extra action and then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.
clarifications: You place the action you play on the bottom of the deck only if it would normally go to your hand or the discard pile. If it would go someplace else (e.g. the madness deck, another player's hand, buried, stored, in stasis, or boxed) it still goes to that place.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果你的弃牌堆中至少有两个标准动作，则随机选择其中一个，将其作为额外动作进行，然后将其放在你的牌库底部，而不是你的手牌或弃牌堆上。
clarificationsZh: 仅当您执行的操作通常会进入您的手牌或弃牌堆时，您才将其放在牌堆的底部。如果它会去其他地方（例如疯狂套牌、另一个玩家的手、埋藏、存储、停滞或装箱），它仍然会去那个地方。

cards.name: Donald McRonald
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal two actions. Draw one and discard the other. Shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 从你的牌组中展示卡牌，直到你展示两个动作。画一个并丢弃另一个。洗牌。

cards.name: Mime
cards.text: Power 3 - You may choose a standard action in your discard pile that you haven't played this turn, play it as an extra action, then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.
clarifications: You place the action you play on the bottom of the deck only if it would normally go to your hand or the discard pile. If it would go someplace else (e.g. the madness deck, another player's hand, buried, stored, in stasis, or boxed) it still goes to that place.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以在你的弃牌堆中选择一个你本回合没有玩过的标准动作，将其作为额外动作进行，然后将其放在你的牌库底部，而不是你的手牌或弃牌堆上。
clarificationsZh: 仅当您执行的操作通常会进入您的手牌或弃牌堆时，您才将其放在牌堆的底部。如果它会去其他地方（例如疯狂套牌、另一个玩家的手、埋藏、存储、停滞或装箱），它仍然会去那个地方。

cards.name: Harlequin
cards.text: Power 2 - You may search your deck for an action and place it in your discard pile.
clarifications: Reminder: Shuffle the deck afterwards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以在你的套牌中搜索一个动作并将其放入你的弃牌堆中。
clarificationsZh: 提醒：之后洗牌。

cards.name: Banana Peel
cards.text: Move up to two of your minions from one base to another. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.
clarifications: The minions have to start at the same base and end at the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两名随从从一个基地移动到另一个基地。如果这张牌是从弃牌堆打出的，你可以进行一次额外的行动。
clarificationsZh: 小兵必须在同一基地开始并在同一基地结束。

cards.name: Colorful Scarves
cards.text: Draw two cards. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may discard a card to draw an additional card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。如果这张牌是从弃牌堆中打出的，你可以弃掉一张牌来抽一张额外的牌。

cards.name: Confetti Bucket
cards.text: Discard up to four cards, and then draw as many cards as you discarded.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 弃掉最多四张牌，然后抽取与弃牌数量相同的牌。

cards.name: Clown Car
cards.text: Shuffle up to two cards from your discard pile into your deck. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将至多两张牌从弃牌堆洗入牌库。如果这张牌是从弃牌堆打出的，你可以进行一次额外的行动。

cards.name: Clown in a Box
cards.text: Play an extra minion of power 3 or less. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion can be of power 4 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Clown in a Box 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 额外使用一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。如果这张牌是从弃牌堆中打出的，那么该随从的力量可以是 4 或更少。

cards.name: Clown Pyramid
cards.text: One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each of your minions at its base. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 直到回合结束时，你的一名随从在其基地的每一个随从都会获得 +1 力量。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Juggling
cards.text: Each player looks at the top three cards of their deck, discards one action from them or reveals there are no actions, and returns the rest in the same order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 每个玩家查看自己牌组顶部的三张牌，丢弃其中的一个动作或显示没有动作，然后按相同顺序返回其余的牌。

cards.name: Pie in the Face
cards.text: One of your minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion gains +4 power instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Pie in the Face 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+2力量直到回合结束。如果这张牌是从弃牌堆中打出的，则该随从获得 +4 力量。

cards.name: Sheriff
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: Before this base scores, this minion may duel another player’s minion here. Destroy the losing minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，该随从可以在这里与其他玩家的随从决斗。消灭失败的随从。

cards.name: Pinkerton
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per duel, when one of your minions is in a duel, you may place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer limited to just your minions on the same base)
clarifications: This may affect itself in a duel. The power counter is placed before the dueling cards are placed on the table.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每次决斗一次，当你的一个随从参与决斗时，你可以在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 这可能会在决斗中影响到自己。能量计数器放置在决斗牌放在桌子上之前。

cards.name: Gunfighter
cards.text: Power 3 - This minion may duel another player’s minion here. Destroy the losing minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 该随从可以在这里与其他玩家的随从决斗。消灭失败的随从。

cards.name: Deputy
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn or during a duel involving your minion, you may discard this card from your hand to give a minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: You may wait until after your opponent has revealed their dueling card to decide whether to discard the Deputy.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：在你的回合中或在涉及你的随从的决斗中，你可以将这张卡从你的手上丢弃，从而使一个随从获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 您可以等到对手亮出决斗牌后再决定是否丢弃副手。

cards.name: Dynamite Surprise
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores where you have a minion and are not winning, destroy a minion of power 4 or less there. Special: If another player’s card reveals or looks at a card in your hand or deck, destroy one of their minions of power 4 or less.
