clarifications: This triggers from your hand, or if revealed from your deck. It is not triggered if another player looks at it in your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你有一个随从但没有获胜的基地计分前，消灭那里的一个力量为4或更少的随从。特殊：如果其他玩家的牌展示或查看了你手上或牌组中的一张牌，则消灭他们的一个力量为 4 或更少的随从。
clarificationsZh: 这会从你的手上触发，或者从你的牌组中显示出来。如果其他玩家在你的牌组中查看它，则不会触发它。

cards.name: Form a Posse
cards.text: Each of your minions gains +1 power and cannot be destroyed, moved, or returned to the hand until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个随从获得+1力量，并且在回合结束之前不能被摧毁、移动或返回手牌。

cards.name: Gold in Them Thar Hills
cards.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Reveal and draw one of them; you may play it as an extra card. Return the rest in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Gold in Them Thar Hills 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的三张牌。揭示并画出其中之一；你可以把它当作一张额外的牌来玩。以任意顺序返回其余部分。

cards.name: Gold Strike
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你在这里打出一个随从后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: High Noon
cards.text: One of your minions duels another player’s minion at the same base. Destroy the losing minion. If your minion wins, you may play an extra minion there.
clarifications: If your opponent wins they do not get an extra minion, and neither do you if your minion is destroyed. “There” is where your winning minion is at the end of the duel.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从与同一基地的另一位玩家的随从决斗。消灭失败的随从。如果你的随从获胜，你可以在那里多打一个随从。
clarificationsZh: 如果你的对手获胜，他们不会获得额外的随从，如果你的随从被摧毁，你也不会获得额外的随从。 “那里”是决斗结束时你的获胜随从所在的位置。

cards.name: Quick Draw
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. If it is in a duel, it gains +4 power until the end of the turn, otherwise it gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The amount of power gained is determined when this card is played and does not change even if the minion’s dueling status changes.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。如果是在决斗中，则直到回合结束为止获得+4力量，否则直到回合结束为止获得+2力量。
clarificationsZh: 获得的力量量是在打出这张卡时决定的，即使随从的决斗状态发生变化也不会改变。

cards.name: Run 'Em Off
cards.text: One of your minions duels another player’s minion at the same base. The winning minion gains +3 power until the end of the turn, and its controller moves the losing minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从与同一基地的另一位玩家的随从决斗。获胜的随从获得+3力量直到回合结束，并且其控制者将失败的随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Stagecoach
cards.text: Move or transfer up to two of your cards on the same base to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将同一基地上的最多两张卡移动或转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Pecos Bill
cards.text: Special: When you become the challenger in a duel, you may discard a card to play this titan there. Do not resolve any titan clashes until after the end of the duel. Ongoing: During duels here, other players may not move minions from here or return them to a player’s hand. Ongoing: After you win a duel, draw a card.
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你在决斗中成为挑战者时，你可以弃掉一张牌来扮演这个泰坦。在决斗结束之前不要解决任何泰坦冲突。进行中：在此决斗期间，其他玩家不得将小兵从此处移动或将其返回玩家手上。进行中：赢得决斗后，抽一张牌。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Cyberback
cards.text: Power 5 - Effect: Ongoing: You may play actions onto this minion from your discard pile instead of from your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 效果：持续：你可以从你的弃牌堆而不是从你的手牌对该随从进行行动。

cards.name: Clyde 2.0
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: If your actions played on minions here go to the discard pile, you may place them into your hand instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果你在这里对小兵进行的行动进入弃牌堆，你可以将它们放入你的手牌中。

cards.name: Baboom
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Play an action on this minion as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：对该随从执行一个动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: Furious George
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Has +1 power for each action played on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：对其进行的每个动作都具有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Cyberevolution
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +3 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+3力量。

cards.name: Flying Monkey
cards.text: Play on a minion. Special: After this base scores, you may move this minion to another base and destroy this action.
clarifications: You cannot move the minion to the base that replaces the scored base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。特殊：在此基地计分后，你可以将该随从移动到另一个基地并摧毁该行动。
clarificationsZh: 你不能将小兵移动到取代计分基地的基地。

cards.name: Going Bananas
cards.text: Choose a base. Destroy other players’ actions played on that base and on minions there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。摧毁其他玩家在该基地和那里的小兵上进行的行动。

cards.name: Juiced Up
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power for each action on it (including this one).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从的每一个动作（包括这个）都有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Missing Uplink
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: Draw an additional card at the end of your turn.
clarifications: The end of the turn is after the Draw Two Cards phase, so you don’t check for hand size after Missing Uplink’s draw.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：在你的回合结束时再抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 回合结束是在抽两张牌阶段之后，因此在 Missing Uplink 抽牌后您无需检查手牌大小。

cards.name: Monkey on Your Back
cards.text: Play on your minion. Talent: Destroy another player’s minion here of power 4 or less. Place this card on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Monkey on Your Back 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。天赋：消灭另一个玩家的力量为 4 或以下的随从。将这张卡放在你牌库的底部。

cards.name: Monkey See, Monkey Do
cards.text: Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Place any number of actions revealed into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Monkey See, Monkey Do 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的 5 张牌。将任意数量的显示行动放入你的手牌中。将其余的洗入你的套牌中。

cards.name: Shielding
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion and other actions on it are not affected by other players’ actions.
clarifications: When played on a minion, destroy other players’ actions on that minion (since they are affecting the minion). This card does not protect itself, but if both Shieldings are on the same minion, they protect each other.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从及其上的其他行动不受其他玩家行动的影响。
clarificationsZh: 当对一个小兵进行游戏时，摧毁其他玩家对该小兵的行动（因为他们正在影响该小兵）。这张卡不能保护自己，但如果两个护盾都在同一个随从身上，它们就会互相保护。

cards.name: King Rex
cards.text: Power 7 - (no ability)
clarifications: The ability is deliberately blank. (What, do you think King Rex isn't strong enough already?)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 7 - （无能力）
clarificationsZh: 能力故意留白。 （怎么，你觉得雷克斯王还不够强大吗？）

cards.name: Lasertops
cards.text: Power 4 - You may destroy a minion here of printed power 2 or less.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (now optional and uses printed power)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以在这里消灭一个印制力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Armor Stego
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Until the start of your turn, this minion has +2 power during other players' turns.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：直到你的回合开始之前，该随从在其他玩家的回合中拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: War Raptor
cards.text: Power X - Ongoing: Gains +1 Power for each War Raptor on this base (including this one).
clarifications: A War Raptor's power is 2 when in hand, deck, or discard pile, and only changes to 3 after it's on a base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power X - 持续：此基地上的每只战争猛禽（包括这个）获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 战争猛禽在手牌、牌组或弃牌堆中的力量为 2，只有在基地后才变为 3。

cards.name: Augmentation
cards.text: One minion gets +4 power until the end of your turn.
clarifications: If played during another player's turn, the effect lasts until the end of your next turn.
Augmentation only affects minions currently in play, not any future minions played later in the turn. (The dinosaurs haven't broken the space time continuum that much.)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 一名随从获得+4力量直到你的回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 如果在其他玩家的回合中使用，该效果将持续到你的下一个回合结束。
增强仅影响当前在场的小兵，不会影响本回合稍后出场的任何未来小兵。 （恐龙并没有那么严重地破坏时空连续体。）

cards.name: Howl
cards.text: Each of your minions gains +1 power until the end of your turn.
clarifications: If played during another player's turn, the effect lasts until the end of your next turn.
Howl only affects minions currently in play, not any future minions played later in the turn. (The dinosaurs haven't broken the space time continuum that much.)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个随从获得+1力量直到你的回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 如果在其他玩家的回合中使用，该效果将持续到你的下一个回合结束。
嚎叫只会影响当前在场的随从，不会影响本回合稍后出场的任何未来的随从。 （恐龙并没有那么严重地破坏时空连续体。）

cards.name: Natural Selection
cards.text: Choose one of your minions on a base. Destroy a minion there with less power than yours.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在基地上选择一个你的随从。消灭那里的一个力量比你弱的随从。

cards.name: Rampage
cards.text: Reduce the breakpoint of a base by the power of one of your minions on that base until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Use the minion's current power. If the minion's power is then changed after playing Rampage, the breakpoint reduction remains the same as when it was played - it is not reevaluated if the minion's power changes.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 通过你在该基地上的一个随从的力量来减少该基地的断点，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 使用小兵当前的力量。如果在玩《横冲直撞》后，小兵的力量发生了变化，则断点减少量将保持与玩游戏时相同 - 如果小兵的力量发生变化，则不会重新评估。

cards.name: Survival of the Fittest
cards.text: Destroy the lowest-power minion (you choose in case of a tie) on each base with a higher-power minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Survival of the Fittest 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 用一个更高功率的小兵摧毁每个基地上功率最低的小兵（在平局的情况下你选择）。

cards.name: Tooth and Claw...and Guns
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players' cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Tooth and Claw...and Guns 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从不受其他玩家卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Upgrade
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。

cards.name: Wildlife Preserve
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here are not affected by other players' actions.
clarifications: Discard any actions controlled by other players that have been already played on your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：你的小兵不会受到其他玩家行为的影响。
clarificationsZh: 放弃其他玩家控制的、已经对你的小兵执行过的任何动作。

cards.name: Fort Titanosaurus
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if you have not played a minion, you may destroy one of your minions to play this titan on its base. Place +1 power Counters on it equal to the power of the destroyed minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play an action that directly affects one or more minions, you may place a +1 power counter on one of those minions and/or on this titan. Talent: If this titan has four or more +1 power counters on it, draw a card.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你还没有使用小兵，你可以消灭你的一个小兵，在其基地上使用这个泰坦。在其上放置+1 力量指示物，其数值等于被摧毁的随从的力量。持续：每回合一次，在你执行直接影响一个或多个随从的动作后，你可以在其中一个随从和/或这个泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：如果该泰坦身上有四个或更多+1能量指示物，则抓一张牌。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Disco Dancers
mechanics: Minions That Copy Standard Actions Played On Others

Each of the effect-copying cards (Dancing King, Diva, We are Family and Funky Town) can only copy one effect per action (even Dancing King!) Diva, We are Family and Funky Town have a further restriction in that they can only copy one effect per action per turn.
They can only copy effects that count as affecting. More particularly, merely "choosing" and "playing" a minion don't count as affecting.

You can only copy an effect on a minion if that minion isn't already one of the minions that are directly affected by the action. However, that minion doesn't have to match the action's requirements and can get multiple copies of that effect from different effect-copying cards.

Cards are still resolved in order, so if the card did something before the actual affecting part, you don't go back and redo the previous part. In particular, with "Do X to affect a minion"-type of abilities, if you duplicate the affection, you don't redo X.

After copying the effect, you resolve the rest of the ability exactly as written. If copying the effect influences the rest of the ability, it will be explicitly written. If it's not explicitly written, then there's no influence whatsoever.

* If the rest of the ability refers to the minion (or minions) that was directly affected, only apply it to the minion that was directly affected, not the minions that got a copy of the effect. For example, with Headlong, you move a minion and place +1 power counter "on that minion". If you copy the movement with Diva, the rest of the ability, which says "Place two +1 power counters on that minion", should only be resolved by treating "that minion" as meaning "the minion directly affected" (so not the Diva). The rules even give the example of Fast as Lightning where if you duplicate the part that says "it gains +2 power", the rest of the ability that says "if it would go to the discard pile it is returned to its owner’s hand instead" won't be duplicated and will therefore only apply to the minion that was directly affected.

If the effect you want to duplicate only happens at a later time than when the action was played, you must declare that you duplicate it when the action is played, not when the effect happens. For example, Fast as Lightning's return-to-hand effect only happens if the minion is discarded, which can happen at any point of the turn, e.g. after its base is scored. The rulebook state that if you want to copy that return-to-hand effect, you must decide it when the action is played, not when the effect is happening. Other examples of effects happening at a later time: I Select You! places the minion under the deck at the end of the turn, I Will Survive and any after-scoring effects that state "instead of the discard pile" will only affect the minion when it is time to discard the minion, not when the action is played.

cards.name: Dancing King
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: When a standard action directly affects one or more minions here, you may choose another minion here to be affected the same way.
clarifications: Here, “another minion” means different from the ones already affected, not different from Dancing King.

Dancing King cannot copy effects of actions played on minions or bases, nor of actions previously played. It cannot copy an effect already copied from a third minion by another Diva etc. It can copy once per action causing the effect, not once per minion being affected. “The same way” means e.g. moving it to the same base, or giving control of it to the same player. It can copy an effect even if it does not fit the original prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”). You must choose whether to copy an effect when the action is played, not when the effect happens. If an effect has multiple parts, choose only one part to copy. The copied effect is considered to come from the original standard action causing the effect, not from the Diva etc. allowing additional affected targets.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 持续：当一个标准动作直接影响这里的一个或多个小兵时，你可以选择这里的另一个小兵以同样的方式受到影响。
clarificationsZh: 在这里，“另一个奴才”的意思是与已经受到影响的奴才不同，与舞王没有什么不同。

舞王无法复制在小兵或基地上执行的动作的效果，也不能复制之前执行的动作的效果。它无法复制已经由另一个 Diva 等从第三个随从复制的效果。它可以在导致该效果的每个动作复制一次，而不是每个受到影响的随从复制一次。 “同样的方式”意味着例如将其移动到同一基地，或将其控制权交给同一玩家。即使效果不符合原始先决条件（例如“功率 3 或更高”），它也可以复制效果。您必须选择是否在执行动作时复制效果，而不是在效果发生时复制效果。如果效果有多个部分，请仅选择一个部分进行复制。复制的效果被认为来自导致该效果的原始标准动作，而不是来自 Diva 等，从而允许其他受影响的目标。

It cannot copy an effect already copied from a third minion by another Diva etc. It can copy once per action causing the effect, not once per minion being affected. “The same way” means e.g. moving it to the same base, or giving control of it to the same player. It can copy an effect even if it does not fit the original prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”). You must choose whether to copy an effect when the action is played, not when the effect happens. If an effect has multiple parts, choose only one part to copy. The copied effect is considered to come from the original standard action causing the effect, not from the Diva etc. allowing additional affected targets.

cards.name: Turn The Beat Around
cards.text: Choose a minion to gain +1 power until the end of the turn. For each minion affected by this, a minion there of your choice gains -1 power until the end of the turn. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
clarifications: “Each minion affected by this” means the minions that gain the +1 power described earlier, not those that get the -1 power described later. Multiple -1 power losses may be assigned to the same minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Turn The Beat Around 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。对于每个受此影响的随从，你选择的随从获得 -1 力量，直到回合结束。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。
clarificationsZh: “受此影响的每个小兵”指的是前面描述的获得+1力量的小兵，而不是后面描述的获得-1力量的小兵。多个 -1 功率损失可以分配给同一个小兵。

cards.name: We are Family
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: Once each turn, when a standard action directly affects one or more other minions here, you may choose this minion to be affected the same way.
clarifications: We Are Family cannot copy effects of actions played on minions or bases, nor of actions previously played. It cannot copy an effect already copied from a third minion by another Diva etc. It can copy once per action causing the effect, not once per minion being affected. “The same way” means e.g. moving it to the same base, or giving control of it to the same player. It can copy an effect even if it does not fit the original prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”). You must choose whether to copy an effect when the action is played, not when the effect happens. If an effect has multiple parts, choose only one part to copy. The copied effect is considered to come from the original standard action causing the effect, not from the Diva etc. allowing additional affected targets.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：每回合一次，当一个标准动作直接影响此处的一个或多个其他随从时，你可以选择以同样的方式影响该随从。
clarificationsZh: 我们是一家人不能复制在小兵或基地上进行的动作的效果，也不能复制之前进行的动作的效果。它无法复制已经由另一个 Diva 等从第三个随从复制的效果。它可以在导致该效果的每个动作复制一次，而不是每个受到影响的随从复制一次。 “同样的方式”意味着例如将其移动到同一基地，或将其控制权交给同一玩家。即使效果不符合原始先决条件（例如“功率 3 或更高”），它也可以复制效果。您必须选择是否在执行动作时复制效果，而不是在效果发生时复制效果。如果效果有多个部分，请仅选择一个部分进行复制。复制的效果被认为来自导致该效果的原始标准动作，而不是来自 Diva 等，从而允许其他受影响的目标。

mechanicsZh: 复制其他人的标准动作的小兵
每张效果复制卡（Dancing King、Diva、We are Family 和 Funky Town）每个动作只能复制一个效果（甚至 Dancing King！）Diva、We are Family 和 Funky Town 还有进一步的限制，即它们每回合每个动作只能复制一个效果。
他们只能复制算作有影响的效果。更具体地说，仅仅“选择”和“扮演”一个随从并不算影响。
仅当该随从还不是直接受该操作影响的随从之一时，您才能在该随从上复制效果。然而，该随从不必符合该动作的要求，并且可以从不同的效果复制卡中获得该效果的多个副本。
卡牌仍然按顺序解决，因此如果卡牌在实际影响部分之前做了某些事情，你就不会返回并重做之前的部分。特别是，对于“做X来影响小兵”类型的能力，如果你复制了影响，你就不会重做X。
复制效果后，您将完全按照所写内容解决该能力的其余部分。如果复制效果影响其他能力，则会明确写明。如果没有明确写出来，那么就没有任何影响。

* 如果该能力的其余部分是指直接受到影响的小兵（或多个小兵），则仅将其应用于直接受影响的小兵，而不是获得该效果副本的小兵。例如，使用Headlong，你可以移动一个随从并在“该随从上”放置+1能量指示物。如果你复制了 Diva 的动作，则该能力的其余部分（即“在该随从上放置两个 +1 力量指示物”）只能通过将“该随从”视为“直接受影响的随从”（因此不是 Diva）来解决。规则甚至给出了快如闪电的例子，如果你复制“它获得+2力量”的部分，则“如果它会进入弃牌堆，则会返回到其所有者的手上”的能力的其余部分将不会被复制，因此仅适用于直接受影响的小兵。

如果您想要复制的效果仅在动作执行后的时间发生，则必须声明您是在动作执行时复制它，而不是在效果发生时复制。例如，快如闪电的返回手牌效果仅在随从被丢弃时才会发生，这可能发生在回合的任何时刻，例如其底座得分后。规则手册规定，如果你想复制返回手牌效果，你必须在执行动作时决定，而不是在效果发生时决定。稍后发生的效果的其他示例：我选择了你！在回合结束时将随从放置在牌组下方，“我会生存”，并且任何声明“而不是弃牌堆”的得分后效果只会在需要丢弃随从时影响该随从，而不是在执行该动作时影响该随从。

cards.name: Loot Lover
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +2 power for each treasure card on it. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：该随从身上每张宝藏卡的力量 +2。澄清：

cards.name: Gold Digger
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Draw a card from the treasure discard pile. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：从宝藏弃牌堆中抽一张牌。澄清：

cards.name: Gem Grabber
cards.text: Power 2 - Discard the top two cards of the treasure deck. If one of them is an action that can be played on a minion, draw it. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 弃掉宝藏牌堆顶部的两张牌。如果其中一个动作可以对小兵执行，则将其绘制出来。澄清：

cards.name: Anything For Money
cards.text: Discard any number of cards. For each treasure card discarded, draw a card. For each other card discarded, draw a treasure card. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的卡片。每丢弃一张宝藏卡，抓一张卡。每丢弃一张其他牌，抽一张宝藏牌。澄清：

cards.name: Cash Out
cards.text: Play up to 3 treasure cards from your hand as extra cards. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的手中打出最多 3 张宝藏卡作为额外卡。澄清：

cards.name: Cunning Plan
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, instead of playing a card, you may increase or decrease the breakpoint of this base by 4 until the start of your turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：每回合一次，你可以不打牌，而是增加或减少该基地的断点 4 点，直到你的回合开始。澄清：

cards.name: Greed is Good
cards.text: Draw a card from the treasure deck or its discard pile. You may play an extra action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从宝藏牌或其弃牌堆中抽一张牌。你可以进行一个额外的动作。澄清：

cards.name: Hidden Assets
cards.text: Discard the top three cards of the treasure deck. Draw a card and play an extra action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃宝藏牌组顶部的三张牌。抽一张牌并执行一个额外动作。澄清：

cards.name: Mine!
cards.text: Search the treasure deck for an action that can be played on a minion and play it. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在宝藏牌组中搜索可以对小兵执行的动作并执行它。澄清：

cards.name: No! My Precious!
cards.text: Destroy an action. Play an extra action. Special: Play when treasures are distributed from a base to draw one of those treasures instead. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 破坏一个动作。进行一个额外的动作。特殊：当宝藏从基地分发时进行游戏，以抽取其中一件宝藏。澄清：

cards.name: Salvage
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, play an action from the treasure discard pile on one of your minions there. You may use a talent on that action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，对你的一个随从从宝藏丢弃堆中执行一个动作。你可以在该动作上使用天赋。澄清：

cards.name: Eldest Thing
cards.text: Power 10 - You must either destroy two of your other minions or place this minion on the bottom of your deck. Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players' cards. Clarifications: *If you cannot destroy two of your minions successfully, you must place Eldest Thing on the bottom of your deck.
clarifications: If you cannot destroy two of your minions successfully, you must place Eldest Thing on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 10 - 你必须消灭另外两个随从，或者将这个随从放在你的牌库底部。持续：该随从不受其他玩家卡牌的影响。说明： *如果你不能成功消灭你的两个随从，你必须将最古老的东西放在你的牌组底部。
clarificationsZh: 如果你不能成功消灭你的两个随从，你必须将最古老的东西放在你的牌组底部。

cards.name: Shoggoth
cards.text: Power 6 - Each other player may draw a Madness card. For each other player who does not, you may destroy one of their minions here. Then, if you have less than 12 total power here, draw two Madness cards. Clarifications: *"12 total power here" includes Shoggoth's power.
clarifications: "12 total power here" includes Shoggoth's power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 其他每个玩家都可以抽一张疯狂卡。对于其他不这样做的玩家，你可以在这里消灭他们的一个随从。然后，如果你的总力量少于 12，则抓两张疯狂卡。说明： *“这里的 12 总力量”包括修格斯的力量。
clarificationsZh: “这里的 12 总力量”包括修格斯的力量。

cards.name: Mi-go
cards.text: Power 3 - Each other player may draw a Madness card. For each other player that does not, you may draw a card. If no other players drew a Madness card, you may place a +1 power counter on a minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 其他每个玩家都可以抽一张疯狂卡。对于每个不这样做的玩家，您可以抽一张牌。如果没有其他玩家抽到疯狂卡，你可以在随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Byakhee
cards.text: Power 2 - Each other player with a minion here draws a Madness card. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 每个拥有随从的其他玩家都抽一张疯狂卡。澄清：无

cards.name: Begin the Summoning
cards.text: Place a minion from your discard pile on top of your deck. You may play an extra action. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个随从放到你的牌组顶部。你可以进行一个额外的动作。澄清：无

cards.name: Dunwich Horror
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +5 power. Special: Before this base scores, this minion's controller must either draw two Madness cards or destroy this minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+5力量。特殊：在此基地计分前，该随从的操控者必须抓两张疯狂牌或消灭该随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Insanity
cards.text: Each other player draws two Madness cards. Place this action in the box. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家各抓两张疯狂卡。将此操作放入框中。澄清：无

cards.name: Power of Madness
cards.text: For each other player, name an action and reveal their hand. They must discard all copies of that action and then shuffle their discard pile into their deck. Clarifications: Other players' discard piles are still shuffled into their decks even if this card does not force any discards.
clarifications: Other players' discard piles are still shuffled into their decks even if this card does not force any discards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 为每个其他玩家指定一个动作并展示他们的手牌。他们必须弃掉该动作的所有副本，然后将弃牌堆洗入牌库。说明：即使这张牌不强制任何弃牌，其他玩家的弃牌堆仍会被洗入他们的牌库中。
clarificationsZh: 即使这张牌不强制任何弃牌，其他玩家的弃牌堆仍会被洗入他们的牌库中。

cards.name: Spreading Horror
cards.text: Each other player may discard two non-Madness cards. For each other player who does not, you may play a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile on a different base. Clarifications: "On a different base" means on a base that you have not already played a minion on with this ability. For example, if three other players choose to not discard cards, you can play three minions from your discard pile, but they must be on three different bases.
clarifications: "On a different base" means on a base that you have not already played a minion on with this ability. For example, if three other players choose to not discard cards, you can play three minions from your discard pile, but they must be on three different bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家可以丢弃两张非疯狂牌。对于其他不这么做的玩家，你可以从不同基地的弃牌堆中使用一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。说明：“在不同的基地”是指在你尚未使用该能力使用随从的基地上。例如，如果其他三名玩家选择不弃牌，您可以从弃牌堆中打出三个小兵，但它们必须位于三个不同的基地上。
clarificationsZh: “在不同的基地上”是指在一个你还没有使用此能力扮演随从的基地上。例如，如果其他三名玩家选择不弃牌，您可以从弃牌堆中打出三个小兵，但它们必须位于三个不同的基地上。

cards.name: The Price of Power
cards.text: Each other player reveals their hand. For each Madness card revealed, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. Special: Play before a base scores. Reveal the hands of all other players with a minion there instead. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Price of Power 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 其他玩家均亮出自己的牌。每展示一张疯狂卡牌，就在你的一个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。显示所有其他玩家的手牌，并有一个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Touch of Madness
cards.text: Each other player draws a Madness card. Draw a card and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家各抓一张疯狂卡。抽一张牌并执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Unfathomable Goals
cards.text: Each other player reveals their hand. If a player reveals at least two Madness cards, play an extra minion. If at least four total Madness cards are revealed, play an extra action. Clarifications: If the minion play causes another player to draw Madness (e.g. Byakhee) the new Madness does not count as being revealed for the extra action criteria.
clarifications: If the minion play causes another player to draw Madness (e.g. Byakhee) the new Madness does not count as being revealed for the extra action criteria.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家均亮出自己的牌。如果玩家展示了至少两张疯狂牌，则额外打出一张随从。如果总共至少有四张疯狂牌被翻开，则进行一次额外行动。澄清：如果小兵的玩法导致其他玩家抽出疯狂（例如Byakhee），则新的疯狂不会被视为额外行动标准的揭示。
clarificationsZh: 如果小兵的玩法导致另一位玩家抽出疯狂（例如Byakhee），则新的疯狂不会被视为根据额外行动标准而被揭示。

cards.name: Fae Fighter
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another player plays a minion, you may place a +1 power counter on it to place a +1 power counter on one of your minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在另一位玩家使用随从后，您可以在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，从而在您的一个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Lord of the Prance
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Another player of your choice draws a card. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Lord of the Prance 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：你选择的另一位玩家抓一张牌。画一张卡片。

cards.name: Flower Child
cards.text: Power 2 - You may give another player control of this minion until it leaves play, to take control of one of that player’s minions of power 3 or less until it leaves play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以让另一位玩家控制该随从，直至其离开战场，以控制该玩家的一名力量为 3 或更低的随从，直至其离开战场。

cards.name: Elf-Help Guru
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Give all other players’ minions here +1 power each until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：给予所有其他玩家的随从 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: After You
cards.text: Each other player draws a card. Draw a card for each player in the game, including yourself.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家各抓一张牌。为游戏中的每个玩家抽一张牌，包括你自己。

cards.name: Dancing Root
cards.text: All players shuffle their discard piles into their decks. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 所有玩家将他们的弃牌堆洗入他们的牌库中。画一张卡片。

cards.name: Helping Hands
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores where you have a minion. Give another player's minion there +2 power and one of your minions there -2 power until the end of the turn. If that player is the winner, you get one of their VP from that base's printed awards. Shuffle this card into that player's deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在你有随从的基地计分前进行游戏。给予另一位玩家的随从 +2 力量，并给予你的一名随从 -2 力量，直到回合结束。如果该玩家获胜，您将从该基地打印的奖励中获得他们的副总裁之一。将这张卡洗入该玩家的牌库中。

cards.name: Pumping Iron
cards.text: Choose another player. That player chooses a non-monster minion to gain +2 power until the end of the turn. You choose a minion to gain +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择另一位玩家。该玩家选择一个非怪物随从获得+2力量直到回合结束。你选择一个随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Run Away!
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores if you have a minion there. Move one of your minions and another player’s minion from there to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：如果你有随从的话，请在基地计分前进行游戏。将你的一个随从和另一名玩家的随从从那里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Run Away More!
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. Move any number of your minions from that base to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。将任意数量的随从从该基地移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Trade
cards.text: Draw a random card from another player’s hand and place it in yours, then place this card in that player’s hand. You may play an extra action this turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从另一个玩家的手上随机抽一张牌并将其放入你的手上，然后将这张牌放入该玩家的手上。本回合你可以执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Traveling Elf
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。天赋：将此随从移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Idaho Smith
cards.text: Power 5 - You may play the top base of the base deck, and move this minion and any number of your other minions from here to there.
clarifications: The new base is replaced after it scores, so this permanently increases the number of bases in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 您可以使用基础牌组的顶部基地，并将该随从和任意数量的其他随从从这里移动到那里。
clarificationsZh: 新基地在得分后会被替换，因此这会永久增加比赛中的基地数量。

cards.name: Guide
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After the first time each of your minions moves in a turn it gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：你的每个随从在回合中第一次移动后，它会获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Crypt Looter
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: After a new base comes into play, you may play this minion on it as an extra minion.
clarifications: This triggers even when a base with minions on it changes (e.g. by Terraforming).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 特殊：新基地投入使用后，您可以在该基地上使用该随从作为额外随从。
clarificationsZh: 即使当其上有小兵的基地发生变化（例如通过地形改造）时，也会触发此操作。

cards.name: Glory Hound
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top two cards of the base deck. Return them to the top and/or bottom of the deck in any order.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (can put both on top or both on bottom)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 查看基础牌组顶部的两张牌。以任意顺序将它们放回牌组的顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: Dr Livingstone, I Presume?
cards.text: Choose a minion. If it is the only minion on its base, shuffle it into its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Dr Livingstone, I Presume? 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 我想是利文斯顿博士吧？
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。如果它是其基地上唯一的随从，则将其洗入其拥有者的牌库中。

cards.name: Forgotten Horrors
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here or play a card that moves your minions to here, draw a card and transfer this action to another base.
clarifications: Actions that move multiple minions (e.g. X Never Marks the Spot, Full Sail) and minions that move other minions to their base (e.g. Twister) only get one card draw from this.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：当你在这里打出一个小兵或者打出一张将你的小兵移动到这里的牌后，抽一张牌并将这个行动转移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 移动多个小兵的行动（例如 X Never Marks the Spot、Full Sail）和将其他小兵移动到其基地的小兵（例如 Twister）只能从中抽一张牌。

cards.name: Fortune and Glory
cards.text: Choose a base. You may move up to two minions from there to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。你最多可以将两个小兵从那里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: I Said No Camels!
cards.text: Choose a base. Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions there OR draw a card for each of your minions there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: I Said No Camels! 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。在你的每个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物，或者为你的每个随从抽一张牌。

cards.name: It Belongs in a Museum
cards.text: Choose two minions on different bases. Move each one to the other’s base.
clarifications: If there’s only one eligible minion in play, you cannot move it with this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: It Belongs in a Museum 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择不同基地的两个小兵。将每个人移动到另一个人的基地。
clarificationsZh: 如果场上只有一个符合条件的随从，你就不能用这张卡移动它。

cards.name: Lost City
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, reveal the top two cards of the base deck. Choose one to replace the scored base and discard the other. Play a minion on the new base as an extra minion.
clarifications: Even if a different ability chooses the next base, Lost Cities can still let you play a minion on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分后，展示基础牌组顶部的两张牌。选择一个替换已计分的基地并丢弃另一个。在新基地上扮演一个额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 即使不同的能力选择了下一个基地，《失落之城》仍然可以让你在上面扮演一个随从。

cards.name: X Never Marks the Spot
cards.text: Move any number of your minions.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (any number instead of all)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: X Never Marks the Spot 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 移动任意数量的随从。

cards.name: You Call This Archaeology
cards.text: Move one of your minions. Special: You may play this before or after a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: You Call This Archaeology 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 移动你的一名随从。特别：您可以在基地计分前或之后玩此游戏。

cards.name: Very Large Boulder
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion play, you may play this titan on a base that has no player's minions. Ongoing: Once per turn, after a minion moves from here, you may move this titan to the same base. Then destroy a minion at that base with less power than the number of +1 power counters on this titan. Ongoing: At the end of your turn, if this titan didn't move, place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.textZh: 特殊：您可以在没有玩家随从的基地上玩这个泰坦，而不是常规的随从游戏。持续：每回合一次，当一个随从从这里移动后，你可以将该泰坦移动到同一个基地。然后消灭该基地的一个力量小于该泰坦上+1力量指示物数量的随从。进行中：在你的回合结束时，如果这个泰坦没有移动，则在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Extramorphs
mechanics: Playing Minions Off The Top Of Your Deck

cards.name: Hive Queen
cards.text: Power 5 - You may search your deck and/or discard pile for an Egg Field and draw it. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions at bases where you have an Egg Field have -1 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索蛋田并抽出它。天赋：直到你的下一个回合开始之前，在你拥有蛋田的基地上的其他玩家的随从拥有-1力量。

cards.name: Alien Life Form
cards.text: Power 4 - You may destroy a minion of power 3 or less here. If this minion was played off the top of a deck, place two +1 power counters on it. Talent: Remove a +1 power counter from this minion to move it to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以在这里消灭一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。如果这个随从是在牌库顶部使用的，则在其上放置两个+1能量指示物。天赋：移除该随从的+1能量指示物，将其移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Extradrone
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move another player’s minion of power 3 or less here to another base; if you do, you may move this minion to that base. If this minion was played off the top of a deck, place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以将其他玩家的力量为 3 或更少的随从移至另一个基地；如果你这样做了，你可以将这个随从移到那个基地。如果这个随从是在牌库顶部使用的，则在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Chestbreaker
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: If this minion was on a base at the start of the turn, place it on the bottom of your deck to choose power 3 or 4 and play an extra minion of that power off the top of your deck here.
clarifications: You must choose the power you want before playing the minion off the top of the deck. Chestbreaker is placed on the bottom of the deck beforehand, so it does get shuffled in.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：如果该随从在回合开始时位于基地，则将其放在你的牌组底部以选择力量 3 或 4，并在此处的牌组顶部打出一个具有该力量的额外随从。
clarificationsZh: 在将随从从牌组顶部打出之前，您必须选择所需的力量。破胸者预先放置在牌组的底部，因此它确实会被洗入。

cards.name: Close Encounters
cards.text: Draw a card. You may place a card from your hand on top of your deck. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 画一张卡片。您可以将手牌中的一张牌置于牌组顶部。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Distress Call
cards.text: Move a minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Egg Field
cards.text: Play on a base. You may search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for a Head Grabber and play it on a minion of power 3 or less here as an extra action. Talent: Play an extra minion of power 2 or less off the top of your deck here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。你可以在你的手牌、套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜寻抓头者，并以额外动作对力量为 3 或以下的随从使用它。天赋：在你的牌组顶部额外打出一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Five by Five
cards.text: Draw five cards, then place five cards from your hand on top of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓五张牌，然后将五张手牌按任意顺序放置到牌库顶。

cards.name: Game Over, Dude!
cards.text: Choose a base and a power less than 5. Play an extra minion of that power off the top of your deck there.
clarifications: You must choose the power you want before playing the minion off the top of the deck. Chestbreaker is placed on the bottom of the deck beforehand, so it does get shuffled in.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地和一个小于 5 的力量。从你的牌组顶部打出一个额外的该力量的随从。
clarificationsZh: 在将随从从牌组顶部打出之前，您必须选择所需的力量。破胸者预先放置在牌组的底部，因此它确实会被洗入。

cards.name: Head Grabber
cards.text: Action card text in a sentence.
clarifications: You must choose the power you want before playing the minion off the top of the deck. Chestbreaker is placed on the bottom of the deck beforehand, so it does get shuffled in.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 句子中的行动卡文本。
clarificationsZh: 在将随从从牌组顶部打出之前，您必须选择所需的力量。破胸者预先放置在牌组的底部，因此它确实会被洗入。

cards.name: Nuke It From Orbit
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If this card was on a base at the start of the turn, destroy this base and all other cards on it. Replace it normally. Place this card in the box.
clarifications: If this card leaves play without using its Talent, it does not go to the box.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Nuke It From Orbit 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 从轨道上用核武器攻击它
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：如果回合开始时这张卡位于基地上，则摧毁该基地及其上的所有其他卡。正常更换即可。将这张卡放入盒子中。
clarificationsZh: 如果这张牌在没有使用其天赋的情况下离开游戏，它不会进入盒子。

cards.name: Time to Go
cards.text: Shuffle up to three cards from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的最多三张牌洗入牌库。

cards.name: Titania
cards.text: Power 5 - Return an opponent’s minion to its owner’s hand, OR play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 将对手的随从移回其所有者手上，或者额外使用一个随从。

cards.name: Glymmer
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Until the start of your next turn, either another minion has -4 power (minimum power 0), OR this minion has +1 power.
clarifications: The effects of this ability last until the start of your next turn even if Glymmer leaves play, and even if another player takes control of Glymmer and also uses its talent.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：直到你的下一回合开始，另一个随从拥有 -4 力量（最小力量为 0），或者该随从拥有 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 即使格莱默离开战场，即使另一名玩家控制了格莱默并使用其天赋，该能力的效果也会持续到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Puck
cards.text: Power 3 - Play an extra action OR draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 进行额外动作或抽一张牌。

cards.name: Tinx
cards.text: Power 2 - You may transfer an action played on another minion to this one.
clarifications: Transferring an action does not change the action’s controller.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将在另一个随从身上执行的动作转移到这个随从上。
clarificationsZh: 转移动作不会改变动作的控制器。

cards.name: Daisy Chain
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: If you control this minion it has +2 power, otherwise it has -2 power.
clarifications: Transferring an action does not change the action’s controller.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：如果你控制这个随从，它的力量为+2，否则它的力量为-2。
clarificationsZh: 转移动作不会改变动作的控制器。

cards.name: Enchantment
cards.text: Play on a base and choose one: Ongoing: All minions here have +1 power. OR Ongoing: All minions here have -1 power.
clarifications: Transferring this to another base does not change which part of its ability is used.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在基地上玩并选择一个： 持续：这里的所有小兵都有 +1 力量。或正在进行：这里所有小兵的力量为-1。
clarificationsZh: 将其转移到另一个基地不会改变其能力的使用部分。

cards.name: Fairy Ballet
cards.text: Draw two cards, OR draw a card and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌，或者抽一张牌并进行额外动作。

cards.name: Ladybug
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed. Talent: Transfer this action to another minion.
clarifications: Transferring an action does not change the action’s controller.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从无法被消灭。天赋：将此动作转移给另一个随从。
clarificationsZh: 转移动作不会改变动作的控制器。

cards.name: Leaf Armor
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability "Talent: This minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn."
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从拥有“天赋：该随从获得+2力量直到回合结束”的能力。

cards.name: Magic Acorns
cards.text: Each other player discards a card at random, OR you draw a card and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家随机丢弃一张牌，或者您抽一张牌并进行额外的操作。

cards.name: Magic Ward
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players cannot play actions on this base or on minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：其他玩家无法在此基地或此处的小兵上进行行动。

cards.name: Playful Tricks
cards.text: Destroy up to 2 actions played on minions and/or bases OR play Spirit of the Forest.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁最多 2 个在小兵和/或基地上进行的动作或玩森林之灵。

cards.name: Spirit of the Forest
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion and action play, you may play this titan. Ongoing: Once per turn, when you use an ability that says OR, you may use both parts in any order. Ongoing: If this titan would be removed when it loses a clash of titans, you may move it to another base instead.
cards.textZh: 特殊：您可以扮演这个泰坦，而不是常规的小兵和动作游戏。持续：每回合一次，当你使用“OR”能力时，你可以按任意顺序使用这两个部分。正在进行中：如果该泰坦在泰坦冲突中失败后将被移除，您可以将其移至另一个基地。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Spirit of the Forest · Smash Up

cards.name: Elsa
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Play Olaf or a Snowgie from your hand or discard pile as an extra character, OR place Marshmallow into your hand from your discard pile.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：从你的手牌或弃牌堆中扮演奥拉夫或雪人作为额外角色，或者将棉花糖从你的弃牌堆放入你的手牌。

cards.name: Anna
cards.text: power 4 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for Elsa or Kristoff, reveal it, and draw it. Shuffle your deck if you searched it. Ongoing: Your other characters here cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索艾尔莎或克里斯托夫，展示它并抽出它。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。进行中：你的其他角色不能被其他玩家的卡牌摧毁。

cards.name: Kristoff
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: This character has +2 power if Anna and/or Sven are here. Talent: Search your deck and/or discard pile for Anna or Sven, reveal it, and draw it. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果安娜和/或斯文在这里，则该角色拥有 +2 力量。天赋：在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索安娜或斯文，展示它并抽出它。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。

cards.name: Marshmallow
cards.text: power 3 - Ongoing: If Elsa is here, this character has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果艾尔莎在这里，则该角色的力量 +2。

cards.name: Olaf
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Look at the top two cards of your deck. You may place any number of them into your discard pile. Return the rest in any order.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：查看你牌组顶的两张牌。您可以将任意数量的它们放入您的弃牌堆中。以任意顺序返回其余部分。

cards.name: Sven
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Move one of your characters to this base, OR search your deck and/or discard pile for Kristoff, reveal it, draw it, and shuffle your deck if you searched it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将你的一个角色移动到这个基地，或者在你的牌组和/或弃牌堆中搜索克里斯托夫，展示它，抽出它，如果你搜索到它，然后洗牌你的牌组。

cards.name: Snowgie
cards.text: power 2 - If one of your characters here has 5 or more power, place a +1 power counter on this character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果你的其中一个角色拥有 5 或更多力量，请在该角色上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Act of True Love
cards.text: Destroy one of your characters to play another character from your discard pile as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 摧毁你的一个角色，从你的弃牌堆中扮演另一个角色作为额外角色。

cards.name: Big Summer Blowout
cards.text: Discard a card to place a character from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 弃掉一张牌，将弃牌堆中的一个角色放入你的手上。

cards.name: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
cards.text: Play Olaf, Marshmallow, or a Snowgie from your discard pile as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 使用弃牌堆中的奥拉夫、棉花糖或雪人作为额外角色。

cards.name: Frozen Port
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Other players cannot play their first character each turn here if they can play it on another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。正在进行：如果其他玩家可以在另一个基地上玩他们的第一个角色，则他们不能在每个回合中扮演他们的第一个角色。

cards.name: Hans Westergaard
cards.text: Each player reveals a character from their hand or reveals their hand to show it has no characters. All revealed characters are shuffled into their owners’ decks.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 每个玩家从他们的手牌中展示一个角色，或者展示他们的手牌以表明它没有角色。所有显示的角色都会被洗入其所有者的套牌中。

cards.name: Let It Go
cards.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Draw one and place the rest in your discard pile and/or on top of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的三张牌。抽一张，然后将其余的放入你的弃牌堆中和/或以任何顺序放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Lock the Gates
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards. Talent: Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or return it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：你的角色不能被其他玩家的卡牌摧毁。天赋：查看你牌库顶牌。丢弃它或退回它。

cards.name: Reindeers Are Better Than People
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a character. Shuffle your deck if you searched it. If the card is power 3 or less, play it as an extra character; otherwise, discard it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组和/或弃牌堆中搜索角色。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。如果该牌的力量为 3 或更少，则将其作为额外角色使用；否则，丢弃它。

cards.name: Viscount
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play a fusion and use its Action ability, you may give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn OR place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：每回合一次，在你进行融合并使用其行动能力后，你可以给予该随从 +2 力量直至回合结束，或者在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Can-Do
cards.text: Power 4 - Fusion - Minion: You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less here, or an extra action. / Action: You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less, and an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 融合 - 小兵：你可以在这里扮演一个额外的力量为 2 或更少的小兵，或者一个额外的动作。 /行动：你可以额外扮演一个力量为2或更少的随从，以及一个额外的行动。

cards.name: Dice Ninja
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: Draw a card. / Action: Draw two cards
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：抓一张牌。 / 行动：抽两张牌

cards.name: Rosie
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion -Minion: You may place a +1 power counter on another minion here. / Action: Place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：你可以在此处的另一个小兵身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。 / 行动：在你的随从身上放置两个总计+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Mabel Lean
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: If this is your only minion here, you may place a +1 power counter on it. / Action: Play an extra minion of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：如果这是你这里唯一的小兵，你可以在它上面放置一个 +1 力量指示物。 / 行动：额外扮演一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: M.O.W.A.T.
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: You may give another minion +1 power until the end of the turn. / Action: Give a minion +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：你可以给予另一个小兵 +1 力量，直到回合结束。 / 行动：给予一个随从+3力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Obstruction
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: Each of your minions here gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Action: Place a minion of power 3 or less on the bottom of its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：你的每个小兵在回合结束前获得 +1 力量。行动：将一个力量为 3 或以下的随从置于其拥有者牌库的底部。

cards.name: Sawbones
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: Shuffle an action from your discard pile into your deck. / Action: Shuffle a minion from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：将弃牌堆中的一个动作洗入你的牌库。 / 行动：将弃牌堆中的一个随从洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Shellback
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - You may return one of your non-Shellback fusions to your hand. / Action: Copy the Action ability on one of your other fusions in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 你可以将其中一项非 Shellback 融合返回你的手上。 / 行动：将行动能力复制到场上的其他融合之一上。

cards.name: Ski Lift
cards.text: Power 2 - Fusion - Minion: You may move one of your minions from another base to here. / Action: Move a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 融合 - 小兵：你可以将你的一个小兵从另一个基地移动到这里。 / 行动：移动一个随从。

cards.name: Now You Know: Home Safety
cards.text: Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If it is a fusion, you may also use its Action ability. Special: You may play this before a base scores to copy the Action ability of one of your fusions there instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Now You Know: Home Safety 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 现在您知道了：家庭安全
cards.textZh: 额外使用一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。如果是融合，你也可以使用它的行动能力。特殊：你可以在基地计分前玩这个来复制你的融合之一的行动能力。

cards.name: Go, Gerald
cards.text: Choose a base. Give each of your minions played there this turn +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。给予本回合中你的每个随从 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Felicia Day
cards.text: Power 4 - Move all minions to this base.
clarifications: All minions move as a group to the base at the same time. Minions in that group that react to other minions moving (e.g., Cub Scout) are not triggered by minions within that group. The minions are all moved by Felicia Day’s controller.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 将所有小兵移至此基地。
clarificationsZh: 所有小兵作为一个整体同时移动到基地。该组中对其他小兵移动做出反应的小兵（例如童子军）不会被该组内的小兵触发。小黄人都被费利西亚·戴的控制器感动了。

cards.name: Wil Wheaton
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: You may play this minion when an opponent plays an action. Discard that action; it has no effect.
clarifications: This triggers after an action card is played, but before its ability is carried out. Allow a reasonable reaction time as for Control Minion, above.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：当对手执行某个动作时，你可以使用该随从。放弃该动作；它没有效果。
clarificationsZh: 这会在打出行动卡之后、执行其能力之前触发。与上面的控制小兵一样，留出合理的反应时间。

cards.name: Game Guru
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players’ abilities.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：该随从不受其他玩家能力的影响。

cards.name: Fan
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn, you may discard this card from your hand to draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：在你的回合中，你可以将这张卡从手上弃掉以抽一张牌。

cards.name: Banned List
cards.text: For each other player, name a card and look at that player’s hand. They must place any copies of that card from their hand on the bottom of their deck.
clarifications: If players new to Smash Up cannot remember a card’s name, you may allow them to identify a card through its power, ability and/or art.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对于每个其他玩家，说出一张牌并查看该玩家的手牌。他们必须将手上该卡牌的任何副本放在牌组底部。
clarificationsZh: 如果 Smash Up 新手无法记住卡牌的名称，您可以允许他们通过其力量、能力和/或艺术来识别卡牌。

cards.name: Control Minion
cards.text: Choose a minion. You control that minion until the end of the turn. Special: Play when another player plays a minion. You gain control of that minion until the end of the turn.
clarifications: If you take control of a minion as it is played, you still cannot change which base it is played on. Allow a reasonable reaction time for the holder of these cards, and be willing to let card resolution be interrupted and undone if the player plays too quickly.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。你控制该随从直到回合结束。特殊：当其他玩家扮演随从时进行游戏。你获得该随从的控制权直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 如果你在玩小兵时控制它，你仍然无法改变它在哪个基地上玩。为这些卡牌的持有者留出合理的反应时间，并愿意在玩家玩得太快时让卡牌解析被中断和撤销。

cards.name: Cosplay
cards.text: Special: Play when you gain 1 or more VP. Gain an additional 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：当您获得 1 个或更多 VP 时即可开始游戏。获得额外 1 个 VP。

cards.name: Force of Wil
cards.text: Special: Play when an opponent plays an action. Discard that action; it has no effect.
clarifications: This triggers after an action card is played, but before its ability is carried out. Allow a reasonable reaction time as for Control Minion, above.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：当对手采取行动时进行。放弃该动作；它没有效果。
clarificationsZh: 这会在打出行动卡之后、执行其能力之前触发。与上面的控制小兵一样，留出合理的反应时间。

cards.name: Griefer
cards.text: Choose one effect for each other player: That player discards a random card, or destroys one of his or her minions, or shuffles his or her discard pile into his or her deck.
clarifications: You don’t have to choose the same effect for each player.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 为每个其他玩家选择一个效果：该玩家随机丢弃一张牌，或消灭他或她的一个随从，或将他或她的弃牌堆洗入他或她的牌库。
clarificationsZh: 您不必为每个玩家选择相同的效果。

cards.name: Min-Maxing
cards.text: Look at an opponent’s hand. You may play an action from that opponent’s hand as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 看看对手的手牌。你可以从对手的手牌中执行一个动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: Mulligan
cards.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may draw them and shuffle the rest of your hand into your deck.
clarifications: If you don’t draw the cards, return them to the top of the deck in the same order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的 5 张牌。你可以抽出它们并将剩余的手牌洗入你的牌库。
clarificationsZh: 如果你没有抽到牌，则将它们按相同顺序放回牌堆顶部。

cards.name: Non-Infinite Loop
cards.text: Play an extra standard action, then you may place it back into your hand instead of where it would normally go.
clarifications: The extra action must be played at once. If you choose an action whose conditions for play are not met (e.g., Cosplay, Force of Wil), it has no effect and you just return it to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 执行一个额外的标准动作，然后您可以将其放回您的手上，而不是通常放置的位置。
clarificationsZh: 额外动作必须立即进行。如果你选择的动作不满足使用条件（例如角色扮演、威尔之力），则它没有任何效果，你只需将其返回到你的手上。

cards.name: Rules Lawyer
cards.text: Transfer an action played on a base to another base, or transfer an action played on a minion to another minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将在一个基地上执行的动作转移到另一个基地，或将在一个小兵上执行的动作转移到另一个小兵上。

cards.name: Spectre
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: If you have 2 or fewer cards in your hand, any time you can play a minion, you can play this card from your discard pile instead.
clarifications: This can substitute for playing a generic extra minion (c.f., Hidden Ninja, Commission), but not for playing a specific extra minion (c.f., Hoverbot, Sprout, Tenacious Z). You cannot play Spectre if it does not meet the extra minion’s conditions (c.f. Homeworld, Secret Grove).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 特殊：如果你手中的牌数量为 2 张或更少，则任何时候你可以打出随从时，你都可以从弃牌堆中打出这张牌。
clarificationsZh: 这可以替代扮演通用的额外小兵（参见，Hidden Ninja，Commission），但不能替代扮演特定的额外小兵（参见，Hoverbot，Sprout，Tenacious Z）。如果幽灵不符合额外小兵的条件，你就不能玩它（参见《Homeworld》、《Secret Grove》）。

cards.name: Haunting
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If you have two or fewer cards in your hand, this minion has +3 power and is not affected by other players’ cards.
clarifications: Since it is Ongoing, this ability does not activate while it’s in your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果你手上有两张或更少的牌，则该随从拥有 +3 力量，并且不受其他玩家牌的影响。
clarificationsZh: 由于它是持续性的，因此该能力在你手上时不会激活。

cards.name: Spirit
cards.text: Power 3 - Choose a minion. You may discard cards equal to its power to destroy it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 选择一个随从。你可以丢弃相当于其力量的牌来摧毁它。

cards.name: Ghost
cards.text: Power 2 - You may discard a card from your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以从手上弃掉一张牌。

cards.name: Across the Divide
cards.text: Choose a card name. Place any number of minions with that name from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择卡名。将任意数量具有该名称的随从从你的弃牌堆放入你的手牌。

cards.name: Door to the Beyond
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have two or fewer cards in your hand, each of your minions here has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Door to the Beyond 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：如果你手上有两张或更少的牌，则这里的每个随从都有+2力量。

cards.name: Ghostly Arrival
cards.text: You may play an extra minion and/or an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你可以扮演一个额外的随从和/或一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Incorporeal
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。持续：该随从不受其他玩家卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Make Contact
cards.text: Play on a minion. If you have any cards in your hand, destroy this action. Otherwise, take control of this minion. Ongoing: After this action leaves play, give control of this minion to its owner.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (can be played with other cards in hand, but is destroyed immediately if so) and Wording
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。如果你手上有任何牌，则破坏该行动。否则，控制这个随从。进行中：该行动离开战场后，将此随从的控制权交给其所有者。

cards.name: Séance
cards.text: If you have 2 or fewer cards in your hand, draw until you have 5 cards
clarifications: When playing Séance, do not count it toward the cards in your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 如果你的手牌数量为 2 张或更少，则抽牌直至你的手牌数量为 5 张
clarificationsZh: 玩降神会时，不要将其计入手牌中。

cards.name: Shady Deal
cards.text: If you have two or fewer cards in your hand, gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 如果你的手牌数量为两张或更少，则获得 1 点 VP。

cards.name: The Dead Rise
cards.text: Discard any number of cards. Play an extra minion from your discard pile with power less than the number of cards you discarded
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的卡片。从你的弃牌堆中打出一个额外的随从，其力量小于你弃牌的牌数

cards.name: Creampuff Man
cards.text: Special: On your turn, you may play this titan if you have no cards in your hand. Ongoing: You have +5 power here minus the number of cards in your hand (minimum 0). Talent: Choose a standard action from your discard pile. Discard a card to play the chosen action as an extra action. Place it on the bottom of your deck instead of the discard pile.
cards.errata: Yes (cannot play the card you discard)
clarifications: A standard action is one that is not played on a base or on a minion, but simply played, resolved, and discarded.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你手上没有牌，你可以使用这个泰坦。持续：你的力量+5减去你手上的牌数（最少0）。天赋：从你的弃牌堆中选择一个标准动作。弃掉一张牌以将所选动作作为额外动作进行。将其放在牌组底部而不是弃牌堆上。
clarificationsZh: 标准动作不是在基地或小兵上进行的，而是简单地进行、解决和丢弃的动作。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Killer Queen
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Draw a minion of power 1 or less off the top of your deck OR choose another minion you played this turn and place a +1 power counter on this minion and that minion. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：从你的牌库顶部抽取一个力量为 1 或更少的随从，或者选择你本回合使用的另一个随从，并在这个随从和那个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：*无

cards.name: Drone
cards.text: Power 3 - Place a +1 power counter on this minion. Ongoing: When one of your minions would be destroyed, you may remove a +1 power counter from this minion instead. Talent: Remove a +1 power counter from this minion to draw a card. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。进行中：当你的一个随从将被消灭时，你可以从该随从身上移除一个+1力量指示物。天赋：移除该随从的+1力量指示物以抓一张牌。澄清：*无

cards.name: Soldier
cards.text: Power 3 - Place two +1 power counters on this minion. Talent: Transfer a +1 power counter between two of your minions. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 在这个随从身上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：在你的两个随从之间转移+1能量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Worker
cards.text: Power 0 - Place two +1 power counters on this minion. Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, if it had no +1 power counters on it, you may play it on another base. Clarifications: If a Worker with 1 power counter goes to the discard while Death on Six Legs is in play, you may transfer the power counter to the titan before checking whether you can replay Worker.
clarifications: If a Worker with 1 power counter goes to the discard while Death on Six Legs is in play, you may transfer the power counter to the titan before checking whether you can replay Worker.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 在这个随从身上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。进行中：当这个随从从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，如果它上面没有+1力量指示物，你可以在另一个基地上玩它。说明：如果在进行“六足死亡”时，具有 1 个能量指示物的工人被丢弃，您可以在检查是否可以重玩工人之前将能量指示物转移给泰坦。
clarificationsZh: 如果在进行“六足死亡”时，拥有 1 个能量指示物的工人被丢弃，您可以在检查是否可以重玩工人之前将能量指示物转移给泰坦。

cards.name: A Kind of Magic
cards.text: Transfer any number of +1 power counters between your cards. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: A Kind of Magic 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的卡之间转移任意数量的+1能量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Gimme the Prize
cards.text: Place two +1 power counters on a minion and a +1 power counter on another minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在一个随从上放置两个 +1 能量指示物，在另一个随从上放置一个 +1 能量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Headlong
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base. Place two +1 power counters on that minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从转移到另一个基地。在该随从身上放置两个+1力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: The Show Must Go On
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here with +1 power counters are not affected by other players’ cards. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Show Must Go On 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你这里拥有+1力量指示物的随从不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。澄清：无

cards.name: Under Pressure
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, transfer any number of +1 power counters from one of your minions to another minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，将任意数量的+1力量指示物从你的一个随从转移到另一个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: We Are the Champions
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, transfer any number of +1 power counters from one of your minions there to another minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: We Are the Champions 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分后，将任意数量的+1力量指示物从你的一个随从转移到另一个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: We Will Rock You
cards.text: Each of your minions on one base gain +1 power until the end of the turn for each +1 power counter on them. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: We Will Rock You 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 一个基地上的每个随从都会获得 +1 力量，直至回合结束，其上每有一个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Who Wants to Live Forever?
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Search your deck for a card and place it on top of your deck without revealing it. Clarifications: The destruction is not linked to the benefit, so if you do not have a minion in play to destroy, or the destruction is prevented in some way, you still gain the searching ability.
clarifications: The destruction is not linked to the benefit, so if you do not have a minion in play to destroy, or the destruction is prevented in some way, you still gain the searching ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Who Wants to Live Forever? 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一名随从。在你的牌组中搜索一张牌，并将其放在你的牌组顶部，但不要露出它。澄清：破坏与收益无关，所以如果你没有随从在场上进行破坏，或者破坏以某种方式被阻止，你仍然获得搜索能力。
clarificationsZh: 破坏与收益无关，所以如果你没有随从在场上进行破坏，或者破坏以某种方式被阻止，你仍然获得搜索能力。

cards.name: Death on Six Legs
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if there are six or more +1 power counters on your minions, you may discard a card to play this titan. Ongoing: Before a minion goes to the discard pile, you may transfer one of its +1 power counters to this titan. Talent: Play an extra action. Clarifications: *None
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你的随从上有六个或更多+1能量指示物，你可以弃掉一张牌来使用这个泰坦。进行中：在一个随从进入弃牌堆之前，你可以将其一个+1能量指示物转移给该泰坦。天赋：进行额外动作。澄清：*无
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Death on Six Legs · Smash Up

cards.name: Chaos Lord
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After you flip a coin, if it was heads, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions; if tails, draw a card then discard a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：掷硬币后，如果正面朝上，则在你的一个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物；如果出现反面，则抓一张牌，然后弃掉一张牌。

cards.name: Diviner
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, immediately after you flip a coin you may discard a card to change its result. After the first time each turn you flip a coin, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，在掷硬币后您可以立即丢弃一张牌以更改其结果。每轮第一次掷硬币后，抽一张牌。

cards.name: Blaster
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: Before this base scores, flip a coin. If heads, you may give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn. If tails, you may move this minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 特别：在此基地计分前，掷一枚硬币。如果正面，你可以给予该随从+2力量直到回合结束。如果是反面，你可以将这个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Gobbo
cards.text: Power 2 - Flip a coin for each Gobbo in play (including this one). For each heads, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 为游戏中的每个 Gobbo（包括这个）抛一枚硬币。对于每个头，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: "Magic" Helmet
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has +4 power. Before this base scores, flip a coin. If tails, destroy this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：该随从拥有+4力量。在此基地计分前，抛一枚硬币。如果是反面，则消灭该随从。

cards.name: A Little Help
cards.text: Flip a coin. If heads, you may play an extra minion. If tails, you may play two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抛一枚硬币。如果正面，你可以多打一个随从。如果出现反面，您可以进行两次额外的行动。

cards.name: Bushwacking
cards.text: Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, destroy the minion. If tails, move it to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从并掷硬币。如果是正面，则消灭该随从。如果是反面，则将其移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Demolition
cards.text: Flip three coins. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. For each tails, you may destroy an action on a base or on a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 翻转三个硬币。对于每个头，在你的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。对于每条尾巴，你可以摧毁基地或小兵上的一个动作。

cards.name: Goblin Recruiters
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you flip a coin, if it was heads, draw a card; if tails, you may shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：掷硬币后，如果是正面，则抓一张牌；如果是正面，则抓一张牌；如果是正面，则抓一张牌。如果出现反面，你可以将弃牌堆中的一张牌洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: He Who Smelt It
cards.text: Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion and you may choose another minion and flip again. If tails, you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: He Who Smelt It 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从并掷硬币。如果正面，则在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物，然后您可以选择另一个随从并再次翻转。如果出现反面，您可以采取额外行动。

cards.name: Make Your Own Luck
cards.text: Special: Play immediately after you flip a coin. Change its result.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Make Your Own Luck 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：掷硬币后立即玩。改变它的结果。

cards.name: Revving Up
cards.text: Choose a base. Flip a coin for each of your minions there. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion. For each tails, that minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。为你的每个小黄人抛一枚硬币。对于每个头，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。对于每条尾巴，该随从获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

factions.name: Grannies
mechanics: Arranging Cards On The Top Or Bottom Of The Deck

cards.name: Matriarch
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Reveal the bottom two cards of your deck. Draw any minions revealed, and discard the rest.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：展示你牌组底部的两张牌。抽出任何显露的随从，并丢弃其余的。

cards.name: Granny
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Look at the top card of your deck. Place it on the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：查看你牌库顶牌。将其放在牌组的顶部或底部。

cards.name: Nana
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, draw it or play it as an extra action. Otherwise place it on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 展示你牌组顶牌。如果是一个动作，请将其画出来或作为额外动作进行播放。否则将其放在牌组的底部。

cards.name: Grandma
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top card of your deck. Place it on the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 查看你牌组顶牌。将其放在牌组的顶部或底部。

cards.name: Always Room at Granny's
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores. Place up to three of your minions there on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Always Room at Granny's 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分后进行比赛。以任意顺序将最多三个随从放置在牌组的顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: Attic Treasures
cards.text: Place up to three cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order. Draw that many cards.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (up to 3, instead of exactly 3)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你手上的最多三张牌以任意顺序放置到你的牌库底部。抽那么多牌。

cards.name: Chicken Soup
cards.text: Place up to two cards from your discard pile on the top and/or bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中最多两张牌放在牌组的顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: Don't Mess With My Babies!
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be affected by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Don't Mess With My Babies! 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Family Reunion
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, reveal the bottom card of your deck. If it is a minion, draw it, otherwise place it on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你在这里打出一个随从后，展示你牌组底下的牌。如果它是随从，则将其抽出，否则将其置于你的牌库顶部。

cards.name: Granny's Purse
cards.text: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, you may draw it or return it. Otherwise place it on the bottom of your deck. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶牌。如果是一个动作，你可以绘制它或返回它。否则将其放在牌组的底部。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Hush, My Stories are On
cards.text: Reveal the bottom card of your deck and draw it. If it is a minion you may play it as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Hush, My Stories are On 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 展示你牌库底下的牌并抽出它。如果它是一个小兵，你可以将它作为额外的小兵来玩。

cards.name: Knitting Circle
cards.text: Destroy up to three actions played on minions and/or bases. Draw a card for each one destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁在小兵和/或基地上进行的最多三个动作。每摧毁一个就抽一张牌。

cards.name: Great Grandma
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if you have no titan in play, you may say either “action” or “minion”, and reveal either the top or bottom two cards of your deck. If both cards are of that type, play this titan. Return them in the same order. Ongoing: After you reveal or look at one or more cards from your deck, you may give one of your minions +1 power until the end of the turn. Talent: Reveal the bottom card of your deck. If it is a minion of power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion; otherwise, return it.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你场上没有泰坦，你可以说“行动”或“小兵”，并展示你牌组顶部或底部的两张牌。如果两张牌都是这种类型，就打这张泰坦。以相同的顺序返回它们。持续：当你展示或查看牌组中的一张或多张牌后，你可以给予你的一个随从+1力量，直到回合结束。天赋：展示你牌库底下的牌。如果它是力量为3或以下的随从，则在这里将其作为额外随从使用；否则，退回。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 将牌排列在牌堆的顶部或底部

cards.name: Big Bad Wolf
cards.text: Power 6 - If the minion Red Riding Hood isn’t in play, you may destroy a minion here of power 4 or less. Ongoing: After this minion is destroyed, play another minion from your discard pile here as an extra minion.
clarifications: Because these say “the minion X” they ignore Grimms’ Blessing when determining how they work, since it is not a minion even if it also has the name “X”.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 如果小兵小红帽不在场，你可以消灭这里力量为 4 或以下的小兵。进行中：在这个随从被消灭后，从你的弃牌堆中打出另一个随从作为额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 因为这些人说“小黄人X”，所以在确定它们如何工作时，他们忽略了格林的祝福，因为即使它也有“X”这个名字，它也不是一个小黄人。

cards.name: Charming Princess
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If Prince Charming is here, play an extra minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果白马王子在这里，就在这里扮演一个额外的随从。

cards.name: Prince Charming
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If Charming Princess is here, play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果迷人公主在这里，则执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Red Riding Hood
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If the minion Big Bad Wolf is not in play, each of your minions here has +1 power.
clarifications: Because these say “the minion X” they ignore Grimms’ Blessing when determining how they work, since it is not a minion even if it also has the name “X”.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果小兵大灰狼不在场，则这里的每个小兵都有 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 因为这些人说“小黄人X”，所以在确定它们如何工作时，他们忽略了格林的祝福，因为即使它也有“X”这个名字，它也不是一个小黄人。

cards.name: Rumpelstiltskin
cards.text: Power 3 - Search your deck for a card and place it on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 在你的牌组中搜索一张牌并将其放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: The Frog Prince
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After you play another minion here, you may shuffle this minion into your deck to play a minion from your discard pile here as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：当你在这里打出另一个随从后，你可以将这个随从洗入你的牌库，从你的弃牌堆中打出一个随从作为额外的随从。

cards.name: Gretel
cards.text: Power 2 - This minion has +2 power if Hansel is here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果汉塞尔在这里，该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Hansel
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: This minion has +2 power if Gretel is here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：如果格蕾特在这里，该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Rose Red
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: This minion has +2 power if The Other Snow White is here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：如果另一个白雪公主在这里，则该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: The Other Snow White
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: This minion has +2 power if Rose Red is here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Other Snow White 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：如果玫瑰红在这里，则该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Another Story
cards.text: Shuffle up to three cards from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的最多三张牌洗入牌库。

cards.name: Basket of Goodies
cards.text: Search your deck for an action and place it on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索一个动作并将其放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Breadcrumbs
cards.text: Move up to two of your minions from one base to another.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两名随从从一个基地移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Fairy Godmother's Blessing
cards.text: Search your deck for a minion and place it on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索一个随从，并将其放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Grimms' Blessing
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have two or more minions here, treat this card as if it also has the names of every minion you own. Using this ability does not count as using any minion’s ability.
clarifications: If triggered, this card’s presence counts for triggering or benefitting from other cards at its base. (Examples: It counts as Hansel for Gretel or as Prince Charming for Charming Princess; Microbot Fixer would give it +1 power; it would give another +1 to War Raptors but not get power from them since it doesn’t have their ability.) This card doesn’t prevent cards with limits on how often they are used (like Shinobi) from using their own abilities. See also the entry on Big Bad Wolf above.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：如果你这里有两个或更多随从，则将这张卡视为也包含你拥有的每个随从的名字。使用此能力并不算作使用任何随从的能力。
clarificationsZh: 如果触发，这张卡的存在将计入触发或从其基地的其他卡牌中受益。 （例如：它算作格蕾特的汉塞尔或迷人公主的白马王子；微型机器人固定器会给它+1力量；它会给战猛龙另外+1力量，但不会从他们那里获得力量，因为它没有他们的能力。）这张卡不能阻止使用频率有限制的卡牌（比如忍者）使用自己的能力。另请参阅上面有关大灰狼的条目。

cards.name: Mouse, Bird and Sausage
cards.text: Choose up to two minions of the same faction at a base to gain +2 power each until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Mouse, Bird and Sausage 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在基地选择最多两名同一阵营的随从，每人获得+2力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Teamwork
cards.text: Choose a minion in play. Search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for a minion whose name appears in an ability on the chosen minion. Place it into your hand or play it as an extra minion.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
