cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个在场的随从。在你的手牌、套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索名字出现在所选随从的技能中的随从。将其放入你的手上或将其作为额外的随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: The Woodsman's Axe
cards.text: Destroy an action played on a base to play an extra action, OR destroy the minion Big Bad Wolf to search your deck for a minion and play it at the same base as an extra minion.
clarifications: Because these say “the minion X” they ignore Grimms’ Blessing when determining how they work, since it is not a minion even if it also has the name “X”.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁在基地上进行的行动以进行额外的行动，或者摧毁小兵大灰狼以在你的牌组中搜索小兵并在与额外小兵相同的基地进行它。
clarificationsZh: 因为这些人说“小黄人X”，所以在确定它们如何工作时，他们忽略了格林的祝福，因为即使它也有“X”这个名字，它也不是一个小黄人。
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Shire Marshall
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Play an extra minion on a base where another player has more power than you.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在其他玩家比你拥有更多力量的基地上扮演额外的小兵。

cards.name: Pestling
cards.text: Power 3 - You may play an extra minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以在这里扮演一个额外的随从。

cards.name: Bardling
cards.text: Power 2 - If another player has more power here than you, you may play an extra minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果其他玩家在这里比你拥有更多的力量，你可以在这里扮演一个额外的随从。

cards.name: Quarterling
cards.text: Power 2 - If this is your only minion here, you may play an extra minion on this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 如果这是你这里唯一的随从，你可以在这个基地上扮演一个额外的随从。

cards.name: Last Call
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. Play a minion there. Cancel that minion’s ability until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。在那里扮演一个随从。取消该随从的能力直至回合结束。

cards.name: Lunch Run
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After each time you play a minion here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：每次你在这里打出一个随从后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Out of Nowhere
cards.text: Draw two minions off the top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的牌组顶部抽出两个随从。

cards.name: Rude Awakening
cards.text: Choose a base. Reveal your hand and play all minions in it onto that base as extra minions; cancel their abilities until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。展示你的手牌并将其中的所有小兵作为额外小兵打到该基地上；取消他们的能力直到回合结束。

cards.name: Small But Tough
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: When this minion goes to the discard pile, place it on top of your deck instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：当这个随从进入弃牌堆时，将其放在你的牌库顶部。

cards.name: Sneaksy
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here are not affected by other players’ actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：你的小兵不会受到其他玩家行为的影响。

cards.name: Spoiled Brats
cards.text: Choose any number of minions from your discard pile, shuffle them, and place them on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中选择任意数量的随从，将它们洗牌，然后将它们放在你的牌库顶部。

cards.name: Unexpected Party
cards.text: Play an extra minion on a base where you have no minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在没有小兵的基地上扮演额外的小兵。

cards.name: Red Skull
cards.text: power 5 - Ongoing: After one of your characters is destroyed, draw a card. Talent: Destroy one of your characters to draw a card.
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：当你的一个角色被消灭后，抓一张牌。天赋：摧毁你的一个角色来抽一张牌。

cards.name: Baron Strucker
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Destroy one of your characters. After it is destroyed, move up to two of your characters from other bases to here.
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：摧毁你的一个角色。当它被摧毁后，将最多两个角色从其他基地移动到这里。

cards.name: Madame Hydra
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Destroy one of your characters to give this character +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：消灭你的一个角色，使该角色获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Arnim Zola
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This character has +1 power for each of your other characters here with a printed power of 2 or less.
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：此角色对这里打印的力量为 2 或更少的每个其他角色都有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Hydra Agent
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: After this character is destroyed, play up to two extra characters of power 2 or less here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：此角色被消灭后，在此扮演最多两个力量为 2 或以下的额外角色。

cards.name: Fanatical Devotion
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here each have +2 power if one or more of your characters have been destroyed here this turn.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：如果本回合你的一个或多个角色在这里被摧毁，那么你这里的每个角色都有+2力量。

cards.name: Hail Hydra!
cards.text: Destroy one of your characters to draw cards equal to its power.
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一名角色即可抽出与其力量等值的牌。

cards.name: Hour of Destiny
cards.text: Search your deck for up to two characters of power 2 or less, reveal them, and draw them. Then shuffle your deck.
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索至多两名力量为 2 或以下的角色，将其展示并抽牌。然后洗牌。

cards.name: Reactivate Agents
cards.text: Place up to two characters of 2 power or less from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中将至多两个力量为 2 或更少的角色置入你的手牌。

cards.name: Secret Reserves
cards.text: Shuffle any number of characters of power 2 or less from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的力量为 2 或更少的角色从你的弃牌堆洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Two More Shall Take Its Place
cards.text: Destroy one of your characters. After it is destroyed, play up to two characters of power 2 or less as extra characters onto that base.
cards.textZh: 摧毁你的一个角色。当它被摧毁后，在该基地上扮演最多两个力量为 2 或更少的角色作为额外角色。

factions.name: Ignobles
mechanics: Giving Control Of Minions For Benefits

cards.name: Aunt of Drakes
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Give control of one of your minions to another player to draw a card and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：将你的一个随从的控制权交给另一位玩家，以抽一张牌并执行额外动作。

cards.name: Foot of the King
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: At the end of your turn, you may take control of a minion you own.
clarifications: These target minions from your deck whether or not you still control them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Foot of the King 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在你的回合结束时，你可以控制你拥有的一个随从。
clarificationsZh: 这些目标是你牌组中的随从，无论你是否仍然控制着它们。

cards.name: Betrothed
cards.text: Power 3 - You may give control of this minion to another player. Ongoing: The owner of this minion gains 1 VP if another player wins this base and controls this minion.
clarifications: The ability works regardless of how control was gained, and even if the Betrothed is moved to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以将此随从的控制权交给其他玩家。持续：如果其他玩家赢得该基地并控制该随从，则该随从的所有者获得 1 VP。
clarificationsZh: 无论控制权如何获得，即使订婚者被转移到另一个基地，该能力都会起作用。

cards.name: Sneaky Squire
cards.text: Power 2 - You may give control of this minion to another player to play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将这个随从的控制权交给另一个玩家来扮演额外的随从。

cards.name: Activate the Spy
cards.text: Take control of a minion you own. Play an extra action.
clarifications: These target minions from your deck whether or not you still control them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 控制你拥有的一个随从。进行一个额外的动作。
clarificationsZh: 这些目标是你牌组中的随从，无论你是否仍然控制着它们。

cards.name: Banner Call
cards.text: Take control of any number of minions you own.
clarifications: These target minions from your deck whether or not you still control them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 控制你拥有的任意数量的随从。
clarificationsZh: 这些目标是你牌组中的随从，无论你是否仍然控制着它们。

cards.name: Fate of the Favorites
cards.text: Each player destroys a minion they own.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Fate of the Favorites 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 每个玩家都会消灭自己拥有的一个随从。

cards.name: Hostage Exchange
cards.text: Give another player control of one of your minions to take control of one of their minions of equal or less power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 让另一位玩家控制你的一个随从，以控制他们的一个同等或更少力量的随从。

cards.name: Inevitable Betrayal
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, take control of a minion you own there.
clarifications: These target minions from your deck whether or not you still control them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，控制你在那里拥有的一个随从。
clarificationsZh: 这些目标是你牌组中的随从，无论你是否仍然控制着它们。

cards.name: Out of Sight
cards.text: Each player returns a minion they own to their hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 每个玩家将自己拥有的一个随从返回自己的手牌。

cards.name: Red Birthday Party
cards.text: Destroy a minion you own and all minions with less power on the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你拥有的一个随从以及同一基地上所有力量较小的随从。

cards.name: Repaying Debts
cards.text: Give control of one of your minions to another player to draw two cards and play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从的控制权交给另一位玩家，以抽两张牌并使用额外的随从。

cards.name: The Hill that Strolls
cards.text: Special: On your turn, you may play this titan if two or more minions you own are controlled by other players. Ongoing: After you give control of one of your minions to another player, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Talent: Give control of one of your minions to another player to draw a card, OR take control of a minion here you own.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你拥有的两个或更多随从被其他玩家控制，你就可以使用这个泰坦。正在进行：当你将你的一个随从的控制权交给另一位玩家后，你可以在它上面放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：将你的一个随从的控制权交给另一位玩家来抽一张牌，或者控制你拥有的一个随从。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Hill that Strolls · Smash Up

mechanicsZh: 为了利益而给予小兵控制权

cards.name: The Locals
cards.text: Power 2 - Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Place any The Locals revealed into your hand. Put the rest of the cards on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 显示你牌组顶部的三张牌。将任何翻出的当地人置于你手上。将其余的牌放在你牌库的底部。

cards.name: In Plain Sight
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here of printed power 2 or less are not affected by opponents’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的印制力量为 2 或以下的随从不会受到对手卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Mysteries of the Deep
cards.text: If you have three or more minions with the same name on a base, draw 3 cards, then you may draw 2 additional cards and 2 Madness cards.
clarifications: The minions with the same name must be on the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Mysteries of the Deep 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 如果你的基地上有 3 个或更多同名随从，则抓 3 张牌，然后你可以再抓 2 张牌和 2 张疯狂牌。
clarificationsZh: 同名的小兵必须在同一个基地。

cards.name: New Acolytes
cards.text: All players shuffle all minions in their discard piles into their decks.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 所有玩家将弃牌堆中的所有随从洗入自己的牌库。

cards.name: Recruitment
cards.text: Draw up to three Madness cards. For each one drawn, you may play an extra minion this turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽出最多三张疯狂卡。对于每抽到的一个，你可以在本回合中额外扮演一个随从。

cards.name: Return to the Sea
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, return any number of your minions with the same name on that base to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Return to the Sea 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分后，将任意数量的该基地上同名的随从返回你的手牌。

cards.name: Sacred Circle
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: You may play an extra minion here with the same name as another minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：你可以在这里额外扮演一个与另一个随从同名的随从。

cards.name: Spreading the Word
cards.text: Play up to two extra minions with the same name as a minion in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 额外扮演最多两个与场上随从同名的随从。

cards.name: The Deep Ones
cards.text: Each of your minions of power 2 or less get +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: It only affects minions currently in play, not those played later in the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个力量为 2 或更少的随从获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 它只影响当前在场的小兵，而不影响本回合稍后出场的小兵。

cards.name: Dagon
cards.text: Special: On your turn, you may play this titan on a base where you have two or more minions with the same name. Ongoing: You have +1 power here for each of your minions here that has the same name as another minion here. Talent: Play an extra minion here.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (extra minion must be played here)
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，你可以在有两个或更多同名随从的基地上扮演这个泰坦。进行中：对于每个与此处另一个随从同名的随从，你在这里拥有 +1 力量。天赋：在这里扮演一个额外的随从。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Itty Critters
mechanics: Temporarily Searching And Summoning Power 2 Or Less Minions

cards.name: Critter Champion
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Search your deck for a minion of power 2 or less and play it here as an extra minion. If you control it at the end of the turn, place it on the bottom of your deck
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
The minion they play must go to the bottom of the deck even if the card that summoned them is out of play by the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在你的牌组中搜索力量为 2 或以下的随从，并将其作为额外随从使用。如果你在回合结束时控制了它，则将其置于你牌库的底部
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。
即使召唤他们的卡牌在回合结束时已退出游戏，他们所使用的随从也必须进入牌组底部。

cards.name: Critter Coach
cards.text: Power 4 - You may search your deck for a minion of power 2 or less and play it here as an extra minion. If you control it at the end of the turn, place it on the bottom of your deck.
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
The minion they play must go to the bottom of the deck even if the card that summoned them is out of play by the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以在你的牌组中搜索力量为 2 或更少的随从，并将其作为额外的随从使用。如果你在回合结束时控制了它，则将其置于你牌库的底部。
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。
即使召唤他们的卡牌在回合结束时已退出游戏，他们所使用的随从也必须进入牌组底部。

cards.name: Calicoin
cards.text: Power 2 - You may place a +1 power counter on another minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在此处的另一个随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Floofairy
cards.text: Power 2 - You may draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以抓一张牌。

cards.name: Krakatoad
cards.text: Power 2 - You may choose another minion here to gain +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在这里选择另一个随从，获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Leafaroo
cards.text: Power 2 - You may shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将弃牌堆中的一张牌洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Shellshock
cards.text: Power 2 - You may destroy another minion of power 2 or less here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在这里消灭另一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Tadpour
cards.text: Power 2 - You may move another minion from here to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将另一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Coach Combat
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy a minion with lower power at its base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。消灭一个基地力量较低的随从。

cards.name: Critter Cube
cards.text: Choose a minion in play of power 3 or less, owned by any player, and shuffle it into your deck.
clarifications: The other players’ minion in your deck is drawn and played normally, and you control it. When it leaves play it goes back to the owner.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择场上任意玩家拥有的一个力量为 3 或以下的随从，然后将其洗入你的牌库。
clarificationsZh: 你的牌组中其他玩家的随从被抽出并正常发挥，由你控制。当它离开游戏时，它会回到主人手中。

cards.name: Evolution
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy it to either play Rainboroc there, or search your deck for a minion with up to 1 more power and play it there as an extra minion.
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。摧毁它后可以在那里打出Rainboroc，或者在你的牌组中搜索一个拥有最多1点力量的随从，然后将其作为额外的随从在那里打出。
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。

cards.name: Gotta Get 'Em All
cards.text: Shuffle one of each minion with a different name from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中每个名称不同的随从洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: I Select You!
cards.text: Search your deck for a minion of power 3 or less and play it as an extra minion. If you control it at the end the turn, place it on the bottom of your deck.
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索力量为 3 或以下的随从，并将其作为额外随从使用。如果你在回合结束时控制了它，则将它放在你的牌库底部。
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。

cards.name: Ittypedia
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, it gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：当你在这里扮演一个随从后，它会获得+1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Recall Critter
cards.text: Play a minion of power 2 or less from your discard pile as an extra minion. If you control it at the end of the turn, place it on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中使用一个力量为 2 或更少的随从作为额外的随从。如果你在回合结束时控制了它，则将其置于你牌库的底部。

cards.name: Super Effective
cards.text: Destroy an action on a minion or on a base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁对小兵或基地的行动。

cards.name: Rainboroc
cards.text: Special: After you win a base while this card is not in play, you may play it on the base that replaces it. Ongoing: After the first time each turn you play a minion here of power 2 or less, place a +1 power counter on this card. Talent: Shuffle a minion with power 2 or less from your discard pile into your deck. If you do, you may move this card to another base.
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你赢得一个基地后，当这张卡不在场上时，你可以在取代它的基地上使用它。持续：每回合你第一次在这里扮演力量为 2 或更少的随从后，在这张卡上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：将一个力量为 2 或以下的随从从你的弃牌堆洗入你的牌库。如果这样做，你可以将这张卡移动到另一个基地。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 暂时搜索并召唤力量 2 或更少的小兵

factions.name: Kaiju
mechanics: On-Base Actions That Directly Provide Power

cards.name: Kaijookey
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each of your actions played on this base.
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：你在这个基地上进行的每一个行动都会使该随从获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算数。

cards.name: Tiny Priestesses
cards.text: Power 3 - Play or move Gorgodzolla to here.
clarifications: If this is used to play or move Gorgodzolla to their base, Gorgodzolla does NOT get a +1 power counter.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 玩 Gorgodzolla 或将其移动到此处。
clarificationsZh: 如果用它来玩或移动戈戈佐拉到他们的基地，戈戈佐拉不会获得+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Johnny
cards.text: Power 2 - You may return one of your actions on a base to your hand and play it here as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将基地上的一项行动返回你的手牌，并在这里作为额外行动进行。

cards.name: Kaiju Alliance
cards.text: Reduce the breakpoint of all bases by 4 until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将所有基地的断点减少 4 点，直至回合结束。

cards.name: Kaiju Conflict
cards.text: Play two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 进行两个额外动作。

cards.name: Oh, No!
cards.text: (Power 2) - Play on a base. Play or move Gorgodzolla to here. Ongoing: You gain +2 power here.
clarifications: If this is used to play or move Gorgodzolla to their base, Gorgodzolla does NOT get a +1 power counter.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: (Power 2) - 在底座上玩耍。玩或移动戈戈佐拉到这里。进行中：你在这里获得+2力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果用它来玩或移动戈戈佐拉到他们的基地，戈戈佐拉不会获得+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Pick Up a Bus
cards.text: Choose an action in your discard pile that can be played on a base and place it into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Pick Up a Bus 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的弃牌堆中选择一个可以在基地上进行的动作并将其放入你的手上。

cards.name: Radioactive Breath
cards.text: (Power 3) - Play on a base. Destroy any number of minions here of power 2 or less. Ongoing: You gain +3 power here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: (Power 3) - 在底座上玩耍。消灭这里任意数量的力量为 2 或更少的随从。进行中：你在这里获得+3力量。

cards.name: Stomp
cards.text: (Power 2) - Play on a base. Reduce its breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn. Ongoing: You gain +2 power here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: (Power 2) - 在底座上玩耍。将其断点减少 3 直到回合结束。进行中：你在这里获得+2力量。

cards.name: Tail Smash
cards.text: (Power 4) - Play on a base. Destroy a minion you don’t control here of power 3 or less. Ongoing: You gain +4 power here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: (Power 4) - 在底座上玩耍。消灭一个你无法控制的、力量为 3 或以下的随从。进行中：你在这里获得+4力量。

cards.name: The Folly of Men
cards.text: Power 2 - Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions and other actions on this base cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards. You gain +2 power here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Folly of Men 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 在底座上玩耍。进行中：你的随从和该基地上的其他行动不能被其他玩家的卡牌摧毁。你在这里获得+2力量。

cards.name: There Goes Tokyo
cards.text: If Gorgodzolla is in play, destroy its base. Move Gorgodzolla to another base and replace the destroyed base normally.
clarifications: Cards immune to destruction are discarded instead, because their base left play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 如果戈戈佐拉在场，摧毁它的基地。将戈戈佐拉移至另一个基地并正常替换被摧毁的基地。
clarificationsZh: 免疫破坏的卡牌会被丢弃，因为它们的基础已离开游戏。

cards.name: They Say He's Got to Go
cards.text: Move a titan to another base.
clarifications: This can move any player’s titan.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: They Say He's Got to Go 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将泰坦移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 这可以感动任何玩家的泰坦。

cards.name: Wade Through the Buildings
cards.text: Power 4 - Play on a base. Destroy all other players’ actions on this base. Ongoing: You gain +4 power here.
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Wade Through the Buildings 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 在底座上玩耍。摧毁该基地上所有其他玩家的行动。进行中：你在这里获得+4力量。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算数。

cards.name: Gorgodzolla
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion play, you may play this card on a base where you have two or more actions. Ongoing: After you play an action or a minion on this base, place a +1 power counter on this card. Ongoing: After you play an action on this base, you may draw a card.
clarifications: You may play this instead of a regular minion play whether or not you have any minions in hand. No restrictions on minion play apply to titan play.
"Two or more actions" includes your actions on both the base and minions there.
cards.textZh: 特殊：你可以在有两个或更多行动的基地上打这张牌，而不是常规的小兵打法。持续：当你在这个基地上进行一个动作或一个随从后，在这张卡上放置一个+1力量指示物。进行中：当你在这个基地上执行一个动作后，你可以抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 无论你手中是否有随从，你都可以玩这个来代替常规的随从玩法。泰坦游戏对小兵游戏没有任何限制。
“两个或多个行动”包括你对基地和那里的小兵的行动。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 直接提供电力的基地行动

cards.name: Venus Man Trap
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Search your deck for a minion of power 2 or less and play it here as an extra minion. Shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在你的牌组中搜索力量为 2 或以下的随从，并将其作为额外随从使用。洗牌。

cards.name: Weed Eater
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, this minion gains +2 power until the start of your next turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，该随从获得 +2 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Water Lily
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Draw a card at the start of each of your turns. Only use one Water Lily’s ability each turn.
clarifications: If you get this using Sprout’s ability, you can use Water Lily’s ability immediately since it is still the Start Turn phase.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：在你的每个回合开始时抽一张牌。每回合仅使用一个睡莲的能力。
clarificationsZh: 如果你使用新芽的能力得到这个，你可以立即使用睡莲的能力，因为它仍然是开始回合阶段。

cards.name: Sprout
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Destroy this card at the start of your turn. You may search your deck for a minion of power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Reversion (reverted to original version from Bigger Geekier Box errata)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在你的回合开始时消灭这张卡。你可以在你的牌组中搜索力量为 3 或以下的随从，将其作为额外的随从在这里使用，然后洗牌你的牌组。

cards.name: Blossom
cards.text: Play up to three extra minions that all have the same name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演最多三个同名的额外小兵。

cards.name: Budding
cards.text: Choose a minion in play. Search your deck for a copy of that card and place it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个在场的随从。在你的牌组中搜索该卡的副本并将其放入你的手上。洗牌。

cards.name: Choking Vines
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, destroy this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：在你的回合开始时，消灭该随从。

cards.name: Deep Roots
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be moved or returned to your hand by other players' abilities.
clarifications: This does not prevent minions from being placed, shuffled or destroyed. Deep Roots does not prevent movement caused by bases (e.g., Mushroom Kingdom) or your own abilities.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从不能被其他玩家的能力移动或返回到你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 这并不能阻止随从被放置、洗牌或摧毁。 “深根”不会阻止由基地（例如蘑菇王国）或您自己的能力引起的移动。

cards.name: Entangled
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Minions may not be moved or returned to hands from any base where you have a minion. Destroy this card at the start of your turn.
clarifications: This does not prevent minions from being placed, shuffled or destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行中：小兵不得从您拥有小兵的任何基地移动或返回手中。在你的回合开始时破坏这张卡。
clarificationsZh: 这并不能阻止随从被放置、洗牌或摧毁。

cards.name: Insta-Grow
cards.text: Play an extra minion
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的随从

cards.name: Overgrowth
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, reduce the starting breakpoint of this base to 0 until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (only affects starting breakpoint, also clarified that it turns off at end of turn)
clarifications: If Overgrowth is destroyed during your turn, the breakpoint change still lasts until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：在你的回合开始时，将该基地的起始断点减少到0，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 如果过度生长在你的回合中被摧毁，断点变化仍然持续到回合结束。

cards.name: Sleep Spores
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players’ minions have -1 power here (minimum power 0).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：其他玩家的小兵在这里拥有 -1 力量（最小力量 0）。

cards.name: Killer Kudzu
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn, if this titan is not in play, place a +1 power counter on it. On your turn, if this titan has three or more counters on it, you may play it instead of your regular minion play, keeping up to six counters on it. Ongoing: After this titan leaves play, shuffle up to two minions from your discard pile into your deck OR draw two cards. Talent: Destroy this titan to play an extra minion from your discard pile with power equal to or less than the number of +1 power counters on this titan.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (now requires your regular minion play to be played)
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，如果该泰坦不在场上，则在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。在你的回合中，如果这个泰坦上有 3 个或更多指示物，你可以使用它来代替常规的随从玩法，最多保留 6 个指示物。进行中：此泰坦离开战场后，将弃牌堆中最多两个随从洗入你的牌库或抓两张牌。天赋：消灭这个泰坦，从你的弃牌堆中额外打出一个力量等于或小于这个泰坦上+1力量指示物数量的随从。

cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从的力量为-2。

cards.name: King Arthur
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Move one of your minions from another base to here. If you do, place a +1 power counter on it if you have an action on this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Galahad

cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Gawain

cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：此随从为你的其他每个力量为 4 或以上的随从提供 +1 力量。

cards.name: Guinevere
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move another of your minions from here to another base. Ongoing: Your actions on bases cannot be destroyed by other players’ abilities.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将你的另一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地。正在进行：你在基地上的行动不能被其他玩家的能力摧毁。

cards.name: Lancelot

cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Merlin
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, draw it or play it as an extra action, otherwise return it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：展示你牌组顶牌。如果它是一个动作，则绘制它或将其作为额外动作播放，否则返回它。

cards.name: Percival
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base with one or more of your actions on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将此随从移至另一个基地，并对其进行一项或多项行动。

cards.name: A Questing
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. You may move it. Ongoing: When this minion would go to the discard pile, place it on top of your deck instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。你可以移动它。进行中：当这个随从进入弃牌堆时，将其放在你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Excalibur
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power and cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards. Special: When this base scores, if this minion is King Arthur, gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Good Deed

cards.name: Merlin's Library
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Play an extra minion here OR move one of your minions to here OR transfer this action to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在这里扮演一个额外的小兵，或者将你的一个小兵移到这里，或者将此行动转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Noble Steed
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。天赋：将此随从移至另一个基地。

cards.name: The Fisher King
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, draw a card. Then if you have eight or more cards in your hand, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：当你的一个或多个随从移动到这里后，抓一张牌。然后自己的手牌有8张以上的话，将这张卡破坏，VP上升1点。

cards.name: The Grail
cards.text: Play on a base with none of your actions on it. Ongoing: After one of your minions moves to here, if you have three or more minions of power 4 or more here, place this card in the box to gain 2 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在没有任何操作的基地上进行游戏。正在进行：当你的一个随从移动到这里后，如果你有三个或更多力量为4或以上的随从，将这张卡放入盒子中以获得2点VP。

cards.name: The Green Knight
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, place a +1 power counter on one of them. Then if that minion has power 7 or more, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：当你的一个或多个随从移动到这里后，在其中一个上放置一个+1力量指示物。然后，如果该随从的力量为7或以上，则破坏这张卡以获得1点VP。

cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +3 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：该角色拥有+3力量。

cards.name: Speed Up
cards.text: Play up to two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 最多执行两个额外动作。

cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Lady Whirlwind
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If this minion has no +1 power counters on it, destroy a minion here with less power to place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果该随从身上没有 +1 力量指示物，则消灭此处力量较小的随从，在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Drunken Master
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: If this minion has no +1 power counters on it, place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：如果该随从上面没有 +1 力量指示物，则在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Cricket
cards.text: Power 2 - You may transfer a +1 power counter from one minion to another.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€

cards.name: Ancient Chinese Art
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on a minion here, OR transfer any number of +1 power counters from one minion here to another minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在此处的一个随从身上放置一个+1能量指示物，或者将任意数量的+1能量指示物从此处的一个随从转移到此处的另一个随从。

cards.name: Everybody Knew Their Part

cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Everybody Knew Their Part 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 每个人都知道自己的角色

cards.name: Everybody was Kung Fu Fighting
cards.text: Choose a base. Each player with a minion there destroys another player’s minion there.
clarifications: Players destroy in clockwise order starting with the current player. They may still destroy a minion even if all their own minions there are destroyed before it comes to them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Everybody was Kung Fu Fighting 璺?Smash Up

clarificationsZh: 玩家从当前玩家开始按顺时针顺序进行破坏。即使他们自己的所有随从在到达他们之前就被消灭了，他们仍然可能会消灭一个随从。

cards.name: Expert Timing
cards.text: Choose one of your cards. Transfer any number of +1 power counters from it to another card, and/or use a Talent on it an extra time. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一张卡。将任意数量的+1力量指示物从它转移到另一张卡上，和/或在它上面额外使用一个天赋。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。

cards.name: Fast as Lightning
cards.text: Choose a minion. Until the end of the turn, it gains +2 power, and if it would go to the discard pile it is returned to its owner’s hand instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。直到回合结束，它获得+2力量，如果它会进入弃牌堆，它会返回到其所有者的手上。

cards.name: Let's Get It On
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy one or more minions at the same base with total power less than or equal to that minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Let's Get It On 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。消灭同一基地的一个或多个总力量小于或等于该随从的随从。

cards.name: Oh-hoh-hoh-hoah
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After another player plays a minion here, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当另一位玩家在这里扮演一个随从后，在你的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Sifu
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if you have two or more +1 power counters on your minions, you may play this titan and transfer two or more +1 power counters from your minions to it. Ongoing: When you transfer one or more +1 power counters to a minion, you may place an additional +1 power counters on that minion. Talent: Transfer a +1 power counter from one of your minions to another minion OR place a +1 power counter on a minion that doesn't have one.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你的随从上有两个或更多+1能量指示物，你可以使用这个泰坦并将两个或更多+1能量指示物从你的随从转移到它身上。正在进行：当你将一个或多个+1能量指示物转移给一个随从时，你可以在该随从上放置一个额外的+1能量指示物。天赋：将一个+1能量指示物从你的一个随从转移到另一个随从，或者在没有该指示物的随从上放置一个+1能量指示物。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Luchadors

cards.name: El Sagrado
cards.text: Power 5 - Place an action from your discard pile into your hand. Talent: Play an action on another player’s minion as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 将你的弃牌堆中的一个动作放入你的手上。天赋：对另一个玩家的随从执行一个动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: Capa Roja
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion here with printed power 3 or less controlled by each other player.
clarifications: This can destroy minions with a printed power of 3 or less even if their actual power is increased to be more than 3.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以在这里消灭一个由其他玩家控制的印刷力量为 3 或更少的随从。
clarificationsZh: 这可以摧毁打印力量为 3 或更少的小兵，即使他们的实际力量增加到超过 3。

cards.name: La Torcha
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If another player’s minion here has one of your actions played on it, this minion has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果这里另一个玩家的随从执行了你的一个动作，则该随从拥有 +2 力量。

cards.name: Yellow Demon
cards.text: Power 2 - You may search your deck and/or discard pile for a Set-Up action and place it into your hand.
clarifications: A Set-Up action is an action with “Set-Up” as part of its name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索准备动作并将其放入你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 设置操作是名称中包含“设置”的操作。

cards.name: Cheap Pop
cards.text: Give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn, or +4 power instead if a minion there has a Set-Up action on it.
clarifications: A Set-Up action is an action with “Set-Up” as part of its name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 给你的一个随从+2力量直到回合结束，或者如果那里的随从有一个准备动作则+4力量。
clarificationsZh: 设置操作是名称中包含“设置”的操作。

cards.name: Out for the Count
cards.text: Choose a minion with one or more of your actions on it. Return one of those actions to your hand. Destroy that minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Out for the Count 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个带有你的一个或多个动作的随从。将其中一项动作移回你手上。消灭那个小兵。

cards.name: Pin
cards.text: Play on a minion with one of your actions on it. Ongoing: This minion’s abilities are cancelled, and its power isn’t added to its controller’s total power here.
clarifications: A minion with Pin on it still has its power, and it still is added to the total power on the base for breaking it, and it counts for cards like Third Tier. Its power does not add to its controller’s total for determining VP rewards or for cards like Marking Territory. If a Pinned minion is your only minion on a base, its presence counts for earning VP rewards there if zero is one of the top three power totals there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对一个小兵进行你的一项行动。进行中：该随从的能力被取消，并且其力量不会添加到其操控者的总力量中。
clarificationsZh: 带有Pin的随从仍然有其力量，并且它仍然会被添加到基础上的总力量中以打破它，并且对于像第三层这样的卡牌来说它也算在内。它的力量不会添加到其控制者的总力量中来确定 VP 奖励或标记领土等卡牌。如果固定的随从是基地上唯一的随从，且前三名力量总数之一为零，则该随从的出现将计入在那里获得 VP 奖励。

cards.name: Powerful Set-up
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Ongoing: Each of your minions here has +1 power.
clarifications: If this ends up on a minion you control (through action transfer, or taking control of the minion) that minion still gets the +1 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩另一个玩家的随从。进行中：你的每个随从都有+1力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果这最终发生在你控制的一个随从身上（通过动作转移，或控制该随从），该随从仍然获得+1力量。

cards.name: Quick Set-Up
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩另一个玩家的随从。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Smart Set-Up
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Ongoing: After the first time each turn a minion is played here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩另一个玩家的随从。进行中：每回合第一次在这里打出随从后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Reversal
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores where you are not winning, take control of a minion there with a Set-Up action on it until the end of the turn. Destroy any number of your actions on that minion.
clarifications: A Set-Up action is an action with “Set-Up” as part of its name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你没有获胜的基地计分前，控制那里的一个随从，并对其进行准备动作，直到回合结束。摧毁你对该随从的任意数量的行动。
clarificationsZh: 设置操作是名称中包含“设置”的操作。

cards.name: Sagrado vs the Monsters
cards.text: Choose any number of actions from your discard pile. Place one that can be played on a minion into your hand and shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Sagrado vs the Monsters 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 萨格拉多 vs 怪物
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中选择任意数量的行动。将一张可以对随从使用的牌置入你的手牌，并将其余牌洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Tag-Team
cards.text: Play an extra minion at a base where you have a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你有随从的基地扮演一个额外的随从。

mechanicsZh: 对对手的小兵采取行动

factions.name: Mad Scientists

cards.name: Herr Doktor
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on another one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在你的另一个随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: The Monster
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Remove a +1 power counter from this minion to play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：移除该随从的 +1 力量指示物以扮演额外的随从。

cards.name: Lab Assistant
cards.text: Power 3 - Place a +1 power counter on another one of your minions
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 在你的另一名随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物

cards.name: Igor
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion is destroyed or discarded, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
clarifications: You get the +1 power counter if this minion goes to the discard pile after scoring, but not after being discarded from the hand, since Ongoing abilities only work while in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在该随从被消灭或丢弃后，在你的一名随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 如果该随从在得分后进入弃牌堆，但在从手牌中弃牌后则不会，则您将获得+1力量指示物，因为持续能力仅在游戏中起作用。

cards.name: Angry Mob
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck. For each card you placed there, place a +1 power counter on that minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。将任意数量的手牌放在牌库底部。对于你放置在那里的每张卡，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Blitzed
cards.text: Remove any number of +1 power counters from your minions. Destroy a minion with power less than or equal to the number of counters you removed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的随从身上移除任意数量的+1能量指示物。消灭一个力量小于或等于你移除的指示物数量的随从。

cards.name: Body Shop
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Place a number of +1 power counters equal to that minion’s power, split any way you choose, on your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一名随从。在你的随从身上放置一些等于该随从力量的+1力量指示物，按你选择的任何方式分配。

cards.name: German Engineering
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, place a +1 power counter on it
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你在这里扮演一个随从后，在其上放置一个+1能量指示物

cards.name: Grave Situation
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If your minions here would be destroyed, return them to your hand instead.
clarifications: Minions placed into your hand do not count as being destroyed (c.f. Field of Honor).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果你的随从会被消灭，请将它们移回你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 放入你手上的小兵不算被消灭（参见《荣誉战场》）。

cards.name: IT'S ALIVE!
cards.text: Play an extra minion. Place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的随从。在其上放置一个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Jolt
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的每个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Überserum
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place a +1 power counter on this minion. This minion cannot be destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：在你的回合开始时，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。该随从无法被消灭。

cards.name: Titan Card Name
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn, you may choose two effects and do them in any order to different minions to play this titan: Place a minion you own from your hand or discard pile into the box. Destroy one of your minions. Remove a +1 power counter from one of your minions. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place or remove a power counter on your minions, draw a card. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions here OR remove two +1 power counters total from your minions to play an extra action.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，你可以选择两种效果，并以任意顺序对不同的小兵执行这些效果来扮演这个泰坦：将你拥有的一个小兵从你的手牌或弃牌堆中放入盒子中。消灭你的一名随从。从你的一名随从身上移除一个+1力量指示物。持续：每回合一次，在你的随从身上放置或移除能量指示物后，抓一张牌。天赋：在你的一个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物，或者从你的随从身上移除总共两个+1力量指示物以进行额外的动作。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 从消灭你的爪牙中受益

cards.name: Blaster Master
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Once per turn, when you would discard a card from your hand, you may choose another player to choose a card in their hand or the top card of their deck; you discard that card instead. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：每回合一次，当你要从手牌中弃掉一张牌时，你可以选择另一名玩家选择他们手上的一张牌或牌组顶牌；你弃掉那张牌。澄清：

cards.name: Happy Zapper
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Discard a card to give a minion +3 or -3 power until the start of your turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：弃掉一张牌，使一个随从获得 +3 或 -3 力量，直到你的回合开始。澄清：

cards.name: Wand Whiz
cards.text: Power 3 - You may discard a card to play an extra minion or action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以弃掉一张牌来打出额外的随从或行动。澄清：

cards.name: Scroll Shuffler
cards.text: Power 2 - You may shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck. If you shuffled a minion of power 2 or less, place two +1 power counters on this minion. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以将弃牌堆中的一张牌洗入你的牌库。如果你洗牌了一个力量为 2 或以下的随从，则在该随从上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：

cards.name: Charm
cards.text: Take control of a monster and treat it as one of your minions until the end of the turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 控制一只怪物并将其视为你的随从之一，直到回合结束。澄清：

cards.name: Embiggen
cards.text: Play on your minion. Discard any number of cards from your hand. Ongoing: After you discard a card from your hand, this minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。从你的手上丢弃任意数量的牌。持续：当你从手上弃掉一张牌后，该随从获得+1力量，直到回合结束。澄清：

cards.name: Mass Summoning
cards.text: Play a monster on any number of bases. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在任意数量的基地上扮演怪物。澄清：

cards.name: Portal to Beyond
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Discard a card to either play a monster here OR move a monster or one of your minions to or from this base. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：丢弃一张牌，要么在这里打出一个怪物，要么将一个怪物或你的一个随从移入或移出这个基地。澄清：

cards.name: Some Enchanted Evening
cards.text: Discard any number of cards. Play an extra minion of power 3 or less for each card you discard. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的卡片。你每丢弃一张牌，就额外打出一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。澄清：

cards.name: Speed Reading
cards.text: Discard a card. Draw three cards. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃一张卡。抽三张牌。澄清：

cards.name: Recover Arcane Wisdom
cards.text: Discard any number of cards, then draw until you have at least five cards in hand. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的牌，然后抽牌，直到手上至少有五张牌。澄清：

cards.name: Zzzzzap!
cards.text: Choose a base. Destroy a minion of power 3 or less there, then you may discard a card to place a +1 power counter on each of your minions there. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。消灭那里的一个力量为3或更少的随从，然后你可以丢弃一张牌，在你那里的每个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。澄清：

factions.name: Magical Girls
mechanics: Caring About The Number Of Your Minions At A Base

cards.name: Lunar Captain
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Choose a minion in your discard pile with power less than or equal to the number of your minions here, and place it into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：从你的弃牌堆中选择一个力量小于或等于你此处随从数量的随从，并将其置于你的手上。

cards.name: Sakura Warrior
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Reduce a minion’s power here by the number of your minions here until the start of your next turn.
clarifications: The amount of reduction is calculated once, and does not change even if the number of minions there changes.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将此处随从的力量减少为你此处随从的数量，直到你的下一回合开始。
clarificationsZh: 减少量只计算一次，即使那里的小兵数量发生变化也不会改变。

cards.name: Technomagical Lass
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Destroy a minion you don’t control here with power less than or equal to the number of your minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：消灭一个不受你控制的随从，其力量小于或等于你这里随从的数量。

cards.name: Bewitching Gal
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Reduce the breakpoint of this base by the number of your minions here until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The amount of reduction is calculated once, and does not change even if the number of minions there changes.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：根据你的随从数量减少该基地的断点，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 减少量只计算一次，即使那里的小兵数量发生变化也不会改变。

cards.name: Fancy Suit Lad
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Your other minions here are not affected by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：你的其他随从不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Power Maid
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Choose a minion with power less than or equal to the number of your minions here, and move it to or from here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量3 - 天赋：选择一个力量小于或等于你这里的随从数量的随从，并将其移入或移出此处。

cards.name: Black Magicat
cards.text: Power 1 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for Lunar Captain and place it into your hand.
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索月球队长并将其放入你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。

cards.name: White Magicat
cards.text: Power 1 - Search your deck and/or discard pile for Power Maid and place it into your hand.
clarifications: It is now part of the rules that cards that tell you to search your deck also require that you reveal the card searched for, and shuffle your deck afterwards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索力量女仆并将其放入你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 现在规则的一部分是，告诉你搜索牌组的卡牌也要求你展示搜索到的卡牌，然后洗牌。

cards.name: Rainbow Girl
cards.text: Power 2 - Your other minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你的其他随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Celestial Teleport
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (changed to a "play on minion" action with a talent)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。天赋：将此随从移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Coordination
cards.text: Play either an extra minion or Walking Castle.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的小兵或行走城堡。

cards.name: Coronet Attack
cards.text: Destroy a minion you don’t control with power less than or equal to the number of your minions at the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个不受你控制的随从，其力量小于或等于同一基地中你的随从数量。

cards.name: Kiss the Sky Spell
cards.text: Place a minion from your discard pile into your hand. You may play an extra action this turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Kiss the Sky Spell 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将你的弃牌堆中的一个随从放入你的手上。本回合你可以执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Lunar Healing Love Spell
cards.text: Choose a minion in each player’s discard pile and place it into its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Lunar Healing Love Spell 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 从每个玩家的弃牌堆中选择一个随从并将其放入其拥有者的手上。

cards.name: Magical Staff
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion gains +1 power. When this minion goes to the discard pile, place it on top of your deck instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。持续：该随从获得 +1 力量。当这个随从进入弃牌堆时，将其放在你的牌库顶部。

cards.name: Purge the Demon
cards.text: Choose a card. Destroy an action on it, OR remove all counters on it.
clarifications: You may choose any card, including a base or a titan.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一张卡。销毁其上的一个动作，或删除其上的所有指示物。
clarificationsZh: 你可以选择任何卡牌，包括基础牌或泰坦牌。

cards.name: Silver Shard
cards.text: All players shuffle all minions in their discard piles into their decks.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 所有玩家将弃牌堆中的所有随从洗入自己的牌库。

cards.name: Walking Castle
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion play, you may play this card on a base where you have at least two minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other players’ abilities. Talent: Move this titan and up to three of your minions here to another base.
clarifications: You may play these instead of a regular minion play whether or not you have any minions in hand. No restrictions on minion play apply to titan play.
cards.textZh: 特殊：你可以在至少有两个随从的基地上打这张牌，而不是常规的随从打法。进行中：你的小兵不能被其他玩家的能力摧毁。天赋：将这个泰坦和你最多三个随从移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 无论你手中是否有随从，你都可以玩这些而不是常规的随从玩法。泰坦游戏对小兵游戏没有任何限制。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 关心基地里的随从数量

cards.name: Baron Zemo
cards.text: power 5 - Ongoing: After this base scores, gain 1 VP and place this character on the bottom of its owner's deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在此基地计分后，获得 1 VP 并将此角色置于其所有者牌库的底部。

cards.name: Ulysses Klaw
cards.text: power 4 - Draw a card for every 4 VP you have.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: power 4 - 每拥有 4 个 VP 就抽一张牌。

cards.name: Black Mamba
cards.text: power 3 - Ongoing: This character has +1 power for every 4 VP you have.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：每拥有 4 个 VP，该角色就有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Absorbing Man
cards.text: power 2 - Talent: Destroy this character and another Absorbing Man to gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：消灭该角色和另一个吸收人以获得 1 VP。

cards.name: A Portent of Doom
cards.text: Base modifier. Play on a base with no player’s characters. Special: When this base scores, if you have 1 or more power here gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。在没有玩家角色的基地上玩。特殊：当此基地计分时，如果你在这里拥有 1 或更多力量，则获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Acceptable Losses
cards.text: Destroy one of your characters of power 4 or more to gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 消灭一名力量为 4 或以上的角色即可获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Ball and Chain
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +2 power and cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：该角色拥有+2力量，并且不会被其他玩家的卡牌摧毁。

cards.name: Convergence
cards.text: Move one of your characters to another base. After it is moved, if you have four or more characters at that base, gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 将你的一个角色移动到另一个基地。移动后，如果该基地有四个或更多角色，则获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Gain the Upper Hand
cards.text: Destroy a character of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Indestructible Form
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：你的角色不能被其他玩家的卡牌摧毁。

cards.name: Sonic Shockwave
cards.text: Destroy another player’s character with less power than your total power at its base. After it is destroyed, if that character had 5 or more power, gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 用比你的基地总力量更少的力量摧毁另一个玩家的角色。被摧毁后，如果该角色的力量为 5 或以上，则获得 1 VP。

cards.name: World Domination
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: One of your characters here gains +2 power until the end of the turn. Ongoing: After this base scores, move this action to another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Masters of Evil faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：你的一个角色在回合结束前获得+2力量。进行中：在此基地计分后，将此动作移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Red Trooper
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Your total titan limit is increased by 1. Talent: Play Megabot on another base OR move Megabot. Clarifications: *If Red Trooper's ability stops applying while you have two titans in play, you must choose one of them to remove from play. You are permitted to have both of your titans on the same base if you want (they do not clash each other out of play).
clarifications: If Red Trooper's ability stops applying while you have two titans in play, you must choose one of them to remove from play. You are permitted to have both of your titans on the same base if you want (they do not clash each other out of play).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：你的泰坦总数上限增加 1。 天赋：在另一个基地上玩 Megabot 或移动 Megabot。澄清：*如果当你有两个泰坦在场时，红色士兵的能力停止应用，你必须选择其中一个将其从游戏中移除。如果你愿意的话，你可以让你的两个泰坦在同一个基地（他们不会在游戏外互相冲突）。
clarificationsZh: 如果当你有两个泰坦在场时，红色士兵的能力停止应用，你必须选择其中一个将其从游戏中移除。如果你愿意的话，你可以让你的两个泰坦在同一个基地（他们不会在游戏外互相冲突）。

cards.name: Blue Trooper
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before any base scores, you may either draw a card OR give this minion +2 power until the end of your turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在获得任何基地计分前，你可以抓一张牌，或者给予该随从 +2 力量，直到你的回合结束。澄清：*无

cards.name: Yellow Trooper
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, you may move one of your other minions to or from this base. Clarifications: *None ====== 1 x Black Trooper ====== Power 3 - Ongoing: After a Special ability is used, this minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None ====== 1 x Green Trooper ====== Power 3 - Special: Before a base scores, you may play this minion there as an extra minion. Clarifications: None ====== 1 x Pink Trooper ====== Power 3 - Special: After this base scores, you may return one of your minions here of printed power 3 or less to your hand. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以将其他一名随从移入或移出该基地。说明： *无 ====== 1 x 黑骑兵 ====== 力量 3 - 持续：使用特殊能力后，该随从获得 +1 力量直至回合结束。说明：无 ====== 1 x 绿色士兵 ====== 力量 3 - 特殊：在基地计分前，您可以将这个随从作为额外的随从。说明：无 ====== 1 x 粉红士兵 ====== 力量 3 - 特殊：在此基地计分后，你可以将这里印刷力量为 3 或更少的一个随从返回到你的手上。澄清：无

cards.name: Beta 6
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: Before any base scores, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：在获得任何基地计分前，你可以在你的一个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Blitzing Sword Attack
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 4 or less on a base where you have a titan. Special: Play before a base scores. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你拥有泰坦的基地上消灭一个力量为 4 或更少的随从。特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。澄清：无

cards.name: Form Megabot!
cards.text: Play Megabot OR move any number of your minions to Megabot's base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩 Megabot 或将任意数量的小兵移动到 Megabot 的基地。澄清：无

cards.name: It's Blitzin' Time!
cards.text: One of your minions gains +4 power until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+4力量直到回合结束。澄清：无

cards.name: Lightning Crystal
cards.text: Destroy an action or a titan. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁一个行动或一个泰坦。澄清：无

cards.name: Lightning Rescue!
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores where you have a minion and do not have the most power, play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你有一个随从但没有最大力量的基地计分前，进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Omega Protocol
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the start of each other player's turn, reduce the breakpoint of this base by 10 until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：在其他玩家的回合开始时，将该基地的断点减少 10，直到回合结束。澄清：无

cards.name: Plan for More!
cards.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. You may draw one or play one as an extra minion, then return the rest to the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. Clarifications: A minion played in this manner counts as being played off the top of the deck.
clarifications: A minion played in this manner counts as being played off the top of the deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的三张牌。你可以抽取一个或将一个作为额外的随从，然后将其余的按任意顺序放回牌组的顶部和/或底部。澄清：以这种方式打出的随从算作是在牌组顶部打出的。
clarificationsZh: 以这种方式打出的随从算作是在牌组顶部打出的。

cards.name: Power Pose
cards.text: Play on a base. Special: Before this base scores, if you do not have the most power here, draw two cards. Special: After this base scores, if you were the winner, you may play an extra minion of power 3 or less on the replacement base. Clarifications: Both Special abilities can activate if you are losing the base before it scores, and then end up winning it.
clarifications: Both Special abilities can activate if you are losing the base before it scores, and then end up winning it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。特别：在此基地计分前，如果您在此没有最强力量，则抓两张牌。特别：在此基地计分后，如果你是获胜者，你可以在替换基地上额外使用一个力量为3或更少的随从。说明：如果您在基地计分前失去基地，然后最终赢得基地，则两种特殊能力都可以激活。
clarificationsZh: 如果您在得分之前失去基地，然后最终赢得基地，则可以激活这两种特殊能力。

cards.name: Megabot
cards.text: Special: After you play a minion, if you have a minion on at least three bases, you may play this titan at its base. Ongoing: Your minions here have +1 power. Special: Before another base scores, you may move this titan to there. Clarifications: *None
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你打出一个随从后，如果你在至少三个基地上有一个随从，你可以在它的基地打出这个泰坦。进行中：你的随从拥有+1力量。特殊：在另一个基地计分前，你可以将这个泰坦移动到那里。澄清：*无
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Black Trooper
cards.text: Ongoing: After a Special ability is used, this minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 持续：使用特殊能力后，该随从获得+1力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Green Trooper
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, you may play this minion there as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，你可以将这个随从作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Pink Trooper
cards.text: Special: After this base scores, you may return one of your minions here of printed power 3 or less to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在此基地计分后，你可以将你的一名印刷力量为 3 或以下的随从移回你的手上。

cards.name: Mermaid Queen
cards.text: Power 5 - Move another player’s minion to here or choose a minion here. If it has 3 or less power, take control of it until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 将其他玩家的随从移至此处或在此处选择一个随从。如果它的力量为 3 或更少，则控制它直到回合结束。

cards.name: Temptress
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: If one or more minions of other players have moved to here during this turn, this minion has +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果本回合中其他玩家的一个或多个随从移动到此处，则该随从拥有 +2 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Charmer
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: You may move this minion to another base. Then you may move another player’s minion of power 3 or less to this minion’s base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：你可以将该随从移动到另一个基地。然后你可以将另一个玩家的力量为 3 或以下的随从移动到该随从的基地。

cards.name: Siren
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Other players’ minions here add 1 less power to their controller’s total.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：其他玩家的随从在其控制器的总力量上减少 1 点力量。

cards.name: Becalmed Shores
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players’ minions here have -1 power. Talent: Transfer this action to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：这里其他玩家的随从拥有-1力量。天赋：将此动作转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Captive Audience
cards.text: Choose a base. One of your minions there gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each minion there you don’t own. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。每有一个不属于你的随从，你的一个随从就会获得+1力量，直到回合结束。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Charmed
cards.text: Choose a minion of power 3 or less. You may move it to another base where you have a minion. It doesn’t add its power to its controller’s total until the end of the turn. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。你可以把它移到你有随从的另一个基地。直到回合结束时，它才会将其力量添加到其控制器的总力量中。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Desert Island
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Minions here do not add their power to their controllers’ totals. Destroy this card at the start of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：这里的小兵不会将他们的力量添加到其控制者的总数中。在你的回合开始时破坏这张卡。

cards.name: Shipwreck Cove
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here each have +1 power. Special: After this base scores, you may transfer this card to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从都有+1力量。特别：在此基地计分后，您可以将这张卡转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Siren Song
cards.text: Choose a base. Move one of each other player’s minions there to one other base where you have a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将其他玩家的一名随从移至您拥有一名随从的另一个基地。

cards.name: Toll Bay
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw a card for each other player’s minion there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。为其他玩家的随从抽一张牌。

cards.name: Ultimate Song
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Each other player must play a minion there of power 3 or less as an extra minion or reveal a hand with no such minions. Cancel those minions’ abilities until the end of the turn. You may play an extra minion there and/or an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有随从的基地。其他玩家必须使用一个力量为 3 或更少的随从作为额外的随从，或者亮出没有这样的随从的手牌。取消这些随从的能力直到回合结束。你可以在那里扮演一个额外的随从和/或一个额外的动作。

factions.name: Minions of Cthulhu
mechanics: Power At The Cost Of Madness

cards.name: Star-Spawn of Cthulhu
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Place a Madness card from your hand into another player’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：将一张疯狂卡从你的手上放入另一个玩家的手上。

cards.name: Cthulhu's Chosen
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: Before a base scores, you may draw a Madness card to give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This ability triggers no matter which base is being scored. It triggers each time a base scores. Draw a separate Madness card for each Cthulhu’s Chosen you want to receive the +2 power. You can draw no more than one Madness card per Cthulhu’s Chosen per trigger.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 特殊：在基地计分前，你可以抓一张疯狂卡，让该随从获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 无论哪个基地计分，都会触发此能力。每次基地计分时都会触发。为每个您想要获得 +2 力量的克苏鲁选民抽一张单独的疯狂卡。每次触发时，每个克苏鲁选民最多可以抽一张疯狂卡。

cards.name: Servitor of Cthulhu
cards.text: Power 2 - Destroy this minion and place an action card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
clarifications: If your attempt to destroy this card fails because it is protected from destruction, you still place the action card. Destroying a Servitor on R’lyeh counts either for the Servitor’s ability (during the Play Cards phase, to place an action card) or for R’lyeh’s ability (at the start of the turn, to earn 1VP), but not both.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 消灭这个随从，并将你的弃牌堆中的一张行动卡放在你的牌库顶部。
clarificationsZh: 如果你尝试摧毁这张卡失败，因为它受到保护免遭破坏，你仍然放置行动卡。摧毁拉莱耶上的仆从，要么计入仆役的能力（在打牌阶段，放置一张行动卡），要么计入拉莱耶的能力（在回合开始时，获得 1VP），但不能同时计入两者。

cards.name: Altar to Cthulhu
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play a minion here, you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：每回合一次，当你在这里扮演一个随从后，你可以进行一次额外的行动。

cards.name: Complete the Ritual
cards.text: Play on a base where you have at least one minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place all cards here on the bottom of their owners’ decks and swap this base with the top card of the base deck.
clarifications: Cards that cannot be placed in a player's deck (e.g., Monsters, Treasures) are instead discarded to their respective discard piles. Titans on the base are removed from play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在至少有一名随从的基地进行游戏。进行中：在你的回合开始时，将所有卡牌放在其所有者牌组的底部，并将该基地牌与基础牌组顶部的牌交换。
clarificationsZh: 无法放入玩家牌库的卡牌（例如怪物、宝藏）将被丢弃到各自的弃牌堆中。基地上的泰坦被从游戏中移除。

cards.name: Corruption
cards.text: Draw a Madness card. Destroy a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽一张疯狂卡。消灭一个小兵。

cards.name: Cthulhu Fhtagn
cards.text: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you have revealed two actions. Place them into your hand and put the rest of the cards on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的牌组顶部展示卡牌，直到你展示了两个动作。将它们放入你的手上，并将其余的牌放在你的牌库底部。

cards.name: Furthering the Cause
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the end of every turn, if another player’s minion here was destroyed, gain 1 VP.
clarifications: You get 1 VP if at least one minion was destroyed during the turn, not 1 VP per minion destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：每回合结束时，如果这里有其他玩家的随从被消灭，则获得 1 点 VP。
clarificationsZh: 如果在回合中至少有一个小兵被摧毁，你将获得 1 VP，而不是每个被摧毁的小兵获得 1 VP。

cards.name: It Begins Again
cards.text: Shuffle any number of actions from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的行动从你的弃牌堆中洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Madness Unleashed
cards.text: Discard any number of Madness cards. For each one discarded, you may draw a card and play an extra action this turn.
clarifications: You must do all discarding before drawing anything. You may not continue discarding Madness cards after starting to draw cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的疯狂卡。每丢弃一张牌，你就可以抓一张牌，并在本回合进行一次额外行动。
clarificationsZh: 在绘制任何东西之前，你必须先丢弃所有东西。开始抓牌后，您不得继续丢弃疯狂牌。

cards.name: Recruit by Force
cards.text: Place any number of minions of power 3 or less from your discard pile on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中任意数量的力量为 3 或更少的随从放置到你的牌组顶部。

cards.name: The Seal is Broken
cards.text: Draw a Madness card. Gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Seal is Broken 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 抽一张疯狂卡。获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Whispers in Darkness
cards.text: Draw a Madness card. You may play two extra actions this turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽一张疯狂卡。本回合你可以执行两个额外动作。

cards.name: Cthulhu
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular action play, draw two Madness cards to play this titan on a base with one of your minions. Ongoing: After you play or draw a Madness card place a +1 power counter on this titan. Talent: Draw a Madness card, OR place a Madness card from your hand into another player's hand.
clarifications: You do not place power counters on Cthulhu when you first play it.
cards.textZh: 特殊：与常规的动作游戏不同，抽两张疯狂卡牌，在基地上与你的一名随从一起玩这个泰坦。进行中：在你打出或抽出一张疯狂卡牌后，在这个泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：抽一张疯狂卡，或者将一张疯狂卡从你的手牌放入另一个玩家的手牌。
clarificationsZh: 当你第一次玩克苏鲁时，你不会在克苏鲁上放置能量指示物。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Professor
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Discard a Madness card. If you do, you may play an extra action and/or an extra minion. Clarifications: *Discarding a Madness card means placing it in your discard pile, not in the Madness deck.
clarifications: Discarding a Madness card means placing it in your discard pile, not in the Madness deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：丢弃一张疯狂卡。如果你这样做，你可以扮演一个额外的动作和/或一个额外的随从。说明：*丢弃疯狂卡牌意味着将其放入弃牌堆中，而不是放入疯狂牌组中。
clarificationsZh: 丢弃疯狂牌意味着将其放入弃牌堆中，而不是放入疯狂牌组中。

cards.name: Librarian
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Draw a Madness card OR play a Madness card from your hand as an extra action. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：抽取一张疯狂卡或从手中打出一张疯狂卡作为额外动作。澄清：*无

cards.name: Psychologist
cards.text: Power 3 - Return a Madness card from your hand or discard pile to the Madness deck OR draw a Madness card from your discard pile. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 将一张疯狂卡从你的手牌或弃牌堆移回疯狂牌组，或者从你的弃牌堆抽一张疯狂卡。澄清：无

cards.name: Researcher
cards.text: Power 2 - Effect Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 效果说明：无

cards.name: "Old Man Jenkins?"
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy a minion with the highest power there. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，消灭那里力量最高的一个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Field Trip
cards.text: Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck to draw that number plus one cards. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的手牌放在牌库底部，以抽取该数量的牌加一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Eldritch Gate
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Draw a Madness card. You may play an extra minion here. Clarifications: If you use its talent, you must draw a Madness card, whether or not you play an extra minion.
clarifications: If you use its talent, you must draw a Madness card, whether or not you play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：抽一张疯狂卡。你可以在这里扮演一个额外的随从。说明：如果你使用它的天赋，无论你是否使用额外的随从，你都必须抓一张疯狂卡。
clarificationsZh: 如果你使用它的天赋，无论你是否使用额外的随从，你都必须抽一张疯狂卡。

cards.name: Jinkies!
cards.text: Return up to two Madness cards from your hand and/or discard pile to the Madness deck. Clarifications: The “or” is inclusive: the Madness cards don’t have to come from the same source.
clarifications: The “or” is inclusive: the Madness cards don’t have to come from the same source.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两张疯狂卡从你的手牌和/或弃牌堆返回到疯狂牌组。澄清：“或”具有包容性：疯狂卡牌不必来自同一来源。
clarificationsZh: “或”具有包容性：疯狂卡牌不必来自同一来源。

cards.name: That's So Crazy...
cards.text: Draw a Madness card. Each of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn. You may play an extra action. Clarifications: The +1 power only affects minions currently in play, not those played later in the turn.
clarifications: The +1 power only affects minions currently in play, not those played later in the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽一张疯狂卡。你的每个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。你可以进行一个额外的动作。说明：+1 力量仅影响当前游戏中的随从，而不影响本回合稍后使用的随从。
clarificationsZh: +1 力量仅影响当前游戏中的随从，而不影响回合中稍后使用的随从。

cards.name: ...It Just Might Work
cards.text: Discard up to two Madness cards to give your minions +1 power until the end of the turn for each. Clarifications: The +1 power only affects minions currently in play, not those played later in the turn. Discarding a Madness card means placing it in your discard pile, not in the Madness deck.
clarifications: The +1 power only affects minions currently in play, not those played later in the turn.
Discarding a Madness card means placing it in your discard pile, not in the Madness deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃最多两张疯狂卡牌，让你的随从获得 +1 力量，直到每张疯狂卡牌的回合结束。说明：+1 力量仅影响当前游戏中的随从，而不影响本回合稍后使用的随从。丢弃疯狂牌意味着将其放入弃牌堆中，而不是放入疯狂牌组中。
clarificationsZh: +1 力量仅影响当前游戏中的随从，而不影响回合中稍后使用的随从。
丢弃疯狂牌意味着将其放入弃牌堆中，而不是放入疯狂牌组中。

cards.name: Things Best Not Known
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, draw up to three Madness cards. Give a minion there +2 power until the end of the turn for each Madness card drawn. Clarifications: The power boost lasts until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The power boost lasts until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Things Best Not Known 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，抽出最多三张疯狂卡。每抽出一张疯狂卡，就给那里的一个随从 +2 力量，直到回合结束。说明：能量提升持续到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 能量提升持续到回合结束。

cards.name: Those Meddling Kids
cards.text: Destroy any number of actions on a single base OR draw a Madness card and play an extra action. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁单个基地上的任意数量的行动或抽一张疯狂卡并进行额外的行动。澄清：无

cards.name: Mountie Major
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each minion here controlled by the other player with the most minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：此随从拥有最多随从的其他玩家所控制的每个随从拥有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Northern Mover
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Choose one of your other minions. Move it to another base, OR give it +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：选择你的其他随从之一。将其移至另一个基地，或赋予其 +1 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: War Canuck
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: If there is another player’s minion here, this minion gains +2 power until the start of your next turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：如果这里有其他玩家的随从，则该随从获得 +2 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Dudlee
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Move this minion to a base with another player’s minion to give this minion +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：将此随从移至与其他玩家的随从一起的基地，使该随从获得 +1 力量，直至回合结束。

cards.name: Always Get Our Man
cards.text: Move one of your minions to a base with another player’s minion with less power to destroy that minion at the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Always Get Our Man 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从移到与另一个玩家的随从一起的基地，而该随从的力量较小，无法在回合结束时消灭该随从。

cards.name: Battle Moose
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：你的随从不能被其他玩家的牌摧毁。

cards.name: Bring 'Em In
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: After this minion moves to another base, place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从移动到另一个基地后，在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Eh?
cards.text: Special: After you play your first action in a turn, you may play this card as an extra action. One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn, and you may place this card back into your hand instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你进行一轮中的第一个行动后，你可以将这张牌作为额外行动来使用。你的一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束，并且你可以将这张卡放回你的手牌而不是弃牌堆。

cards.name: Haich-Q
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Each of your minions here has +1 power. Talent: Move one of your minions to or from this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的每个随从都有+1力量。天赋：将你的一名随从移入或移出该基地。

cards.name: Move Aboot
cards.text: Choose a base with another player’s minion. Move one of your minions from another base to there to give it +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个有其他玩家随从的基地。将你的一个随从从另一个基地移动到那里，使其获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Power Poutine
cards.text: Choose a base. Up to two of your minions there each gain +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。直到回合结束，你最多有两名随从获得 +2 力量。

cards.name: When Calls the Badge
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions on one base. Special: Play before a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: When Calls the Badge 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在一个基地上的每个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。

cards.name: Mulan
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: If you have placed a +1 power counter on this character this turn, play an extra action, OR draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：如果你本回合在此角色上放置了 +1 力量指示物，则进行一次额外动作，或者抓一张牌。

cards.name: Chien Po
cards.text: power 3 - Until the start of your next turn, your characters on this card's base are not affected by other players’ cards. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this character, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 直到你的下一个回合开始，这张卡基地上的你的角色不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。持续：每回合一次，在你在该角色上放置+1力量指示物后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Ling
