cards.text: power 3 - You may play an extra character of power 2 or less here. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this character, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 您可以在这里扮演力量 2 或以下的额外角色。持续：每回合一次，在你在该角色上放置+1力量指示物后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Yao
cards.text: power 3 - You may destroy a character of power 2 or less here. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this character, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以在这里消灭力量为 2 或以下的角色。持续：每回合一次，在你在该角色上放置+1力量指示物后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Cri-Kee
cards.text: power 2 - If you have another character here, you may play an extra character of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果您这里有另一个角色，您可以扮演力量 3 或更少的额外角色。

cards.name: Li Shang
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on another character here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在此处的另一个角色上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Mushu
cards.text: power 2 - You may place a +1 power counter on another character here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在此处的另一个角色上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Avalanche
cards.text: Choose a base. Discard a card to shuffle all characters there of power 3 or less into their owners’ decks.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。丢弃一张牌，将所有力量为 3 或以下的角色洗入其所有者的牌组中。

cards.name: Be a Man
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on up to two characters here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：在此处最多为两个角色放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Call Up New Recruits
cards.text: Play an extra character of power 4 or less, OR draw two cards.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 额外扮演一个力量为 4 或更少的角色，或者抽两张牌。

cards.name: Dragon Cannon
cards.text: Destroy a character of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Family Sword
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +3 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：该角色拥有+3力量。

cards.name: Group Training
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on each of your characters.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在你的每个角色上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Prepare to Fight
cards.text: Place two +1 power counters on a character. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 在角色上放置两个 +1 能量指示物。画一张卡片。

cards.name: Shan Yu
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy a character there with power less than or equal to one of your characters there.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，消灭那里的一个角色，其力量小于或等于你在那里的一个角色。

factions.name: Musketeers

cards.name: Athos
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After you play an action that directly affects one or more of your other minions here, those minions each gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当你执行一个直接影响这里的一个或多个其他随从的动作后，这些随从各自获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Porthos
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players’ actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：该随从不受其他玩家行为的影响。

cards.name: Aramis
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once on your turn, after you play an action that directly affects this minion, you may play an action that directly affects this minion as an extra action.
clarifications: This card can only trigger during the Play Cards phase of your turn. It cannot interact with Last Stand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在你的回合中，在你执行一个直接影响该随从的动作后，你可以执行一个直接影响该随从的动作作为额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 这张卡只能在你回合的打牌阶段触发。它无法与背水一战互动。

cards.name: D'Artagnan
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After you play an action that directly affects this minion, draw a card.
clarifications: Because of the Card Resolution Order (see The Phases of a Turn), after an action is played that affects D’Artagnan (step 1), D’Artagnan has you draw a card (step 3) before the action that affected it is discarded (step 5). Therefore among other things, there can be no infinite loop between D’Artagnan and Favor of Dionysus.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当你进行一个直接影响该随从的动作后，抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 由于卡牌解决顺序（请参阅回合的阶段），在执行影响达达尼昂的动作（步骤 1）后，达达尼昂会让你在影响它的动作被丢弃（步骤 5）之前抓一张牌（步骤 3）。因此，除其他外，达达尼昂和狄俄尼索斯的宠爱之间不可能存在无限循环。

cards.name: Young Musketeer
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After the first time each turn you play an action that directly affects this minion, it gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：每回合你第一次执行直接影响该随从的动作后，它获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: All for One
cards.text: Play on a minion. You may play an extra action. Ongoing: After you play another action that directly affects this minion, it gains +1 power until the end of the turn, and you destroy this card at the end of the turn.
clarifications: The minion gains +1 power for every such action played before the end of the turn, not just one +1 total.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。你可以进行一个额外的动作。持续：在你进行另一个直接影响该随从的行动后，它的力量获得+1直到回合结束，并且你在回合结束时消灭这张卡。
clarificationsZh: 回合结束前每执行一次此类动作，小兵都会获得 +1 力量，而不仅仅是总计 +1 次。

cards.name: Biding Time
cards.text: Choose a minion to gain +2 power until the end of the turn. You may play an extra action that directly affects this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从获得+2力量直到回合结束。你可以执行一个直接影响该随从的额外动作。

cards.name: En Garde
cards.text: Choose a minion to gain +1 power until the end of the turn. Draw a card. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。画一张卡片。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Last Stand
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, give one of your minions there +2 power until the end of the turn. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，给予你的一个随从+2力量，直到回合结束。画一张卡片。

cards.name: Make Way
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从转移到另一个基地。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: On a Roll
cards.text: Play up to two actions that directly affect the same minion as extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 最多执行两个直接影响同一个随从的动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: One For All
cards.text: Choose a base. Each of your minions there gains +1 power until the end of the turn. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。直到回合结束，你的每个随从都会获得 +1 力量。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: To Battle!
cards.text: Play an extra minion. You may play an action that directly affects it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的随从。你可以将直接影响它的动作作为额外动作。

cards.name: Token of Affection
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that directly affects a minion and place it into your hand. You may play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索直接影响随从的动作并将其放入你的手上。您可以将其作为额外动作来玩。

mechanicsZh: 将额外的操作链接在一起

cards.name: Odysseus
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After you play an action, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你执行一个动作后，在你的一个随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物

cards.name: Heracles
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After any player plays an action, this minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：任何玩家执行一个动作后，该随从获得 +1 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Jason
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play an action, you may choose a base and give your minions there +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (after any action during turn instead of only the first action)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，在你执行一个动作后，你可以选择一个基地并给予你的随从+1力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Spartan
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play an action, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (after any action during turn instead of only the first action)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：每回合一次，在你执行一个动作后，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Argonaut
cards.text: Power 2 - Trigger all abilities that would trigger from you playing an action. Special: Any time you can play an action, you can play this card instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 触发您执行某个动作时会触发的所有能力。特别：任何时候你可以执行一个动作，你都可以使用这张牌来代替。

cards.name: Favor of Aphrodite
cards.text: Play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的随从。

cards.name: Favor of Apollo
cards.text: Draw a card and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽一张牌并执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Favor of Ares
cards.text: One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Favor of Athena
cards.text: Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. You may place one of the revealed actions into your hand, and return the rest to the top of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的 5 张牌。你可以将其中一项已显示的行动置入你的手牌，然后将其余行动以任意顺序移回你的牌库顶。

cards.name: Favor of Dionysus
cards.text: One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Play an extra action. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。进行一个额外的动作。你可以将这张卡放在你的牌库顶部而不是弃牌堆上。

cards.name: Favor of Hades
cards.text: Place an action card from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一张行动卡放入你的手上。

cards.name: Favor of Hera
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on up to two of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的最多两个随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Favor of Hermes
cards.text: Play two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 进行两个额外动作。

cards.name: Favor of Poseidon
cards.text: Shuffle up to three cards from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的最多三张牌洗入牌库。

cards.name: Favor of Zeus
cards.text: Reduce the breakpoint of a base by 5 until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将基地的断点减少 5 点，直至回合结束。

factions.name: Mythic Horses
mechanics: The Power Of Friendship (or more specifically, Having Other Minions On The Same Base)

cards.name: Starlyte
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each of your other minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：此随从为你的其他每个随从提供 +1 力量。

cards.name: Rainbow
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If you have another minion here, draw a card.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer requires a minion to be played here this turn, instead only that there is another minion here at all)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果你这里还有另一个随从，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Seastar
cards.text: Power 3 - If you play this minion on a base where you have another minion, you can play an extra minion this turn. Only use one Seastar’s ability each turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 如果你在有另一个随从的基地上使用这个随从，那么本回合你可以额外使用一个随从。每回合仅使用一个海星的能力。

cards.name: Pinkie
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: While another of your minions is here, this minion has +1 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当你的另一个随从在这里时，该随从拥有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Adventure Power
cards.text: Choose a base. Move any number of your minions to it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将任意数量的随从移动到那里。

cards.name: Encouragement Power
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each of your other minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：该随从对你这里的其他每个随从都有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Freedom Power
cards.text: Destroy an action played on a minion or base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁对小兵或基地进行的动作。

cards.name: Friendship Power
cards.text: Move one of your minions to a base where you have a minion. You may place this action into your hand instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从移动到你有随从的基地。你可以将此动作放入你的手牌而不是弃牌堆中。

cards.name: Sharing Power
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the end of your turn, if you have 2 or more minions here, draw a card.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (end of your turn instead of start)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：在你的回合结束时，如果你有 2 个或更多随从，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: Super Future Space Armor Power
cards.text: Each of your minions that is on a base with another of your minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Super Future Space Armor Power 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 与你的另一个随从在一个基地上的每个随从都获得+2力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Teaching Power
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, reveal one card from your deck for each of your minions there. Play one minion you reveal as an extra minion there. Return the rest of the cards to the top of the deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，从你的牌组中为你的每个随从展示一张牌。在那里扮演一个你展示为额外随从的随从。以任意顺序将剩余的牌放回牌堆顶部。

cards.name: Togetherness Power
cards.text: Play an extra minion at a base where you have a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你有随从的基地扮演一个额外的随从。

mechanicsZh: 友谊的力量（或者更具体地说，有其他小黄人在同一基地）

cards.name: Ninja Master
cards.text: Power 5 - You may destroy a minion on this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 你可以消灭这个基地上的一个小兵。

cards.name: Tiger Assassin
cards.text: Power 4 - You may destroy a minion of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以消灭一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Shinobi
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: Before a base scores, you may play this minion there. You can only use one Shinobi’s ability per base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 特殊：在基地计分前，你可以在那里使用这个随从。每个基地只能使用一名忍者的能力。

cards.name: Ninja Acolyte
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: If you have not played a minion on this turn, you may return this minion to your hand and play an extra minion here immediately.
clarifications: "If you have not yet played a minion" only refers to your Play Cards phase; minions played at the start of your turn do not disqualify this ability.
You must both return the minion and play the extra minion; you cannot choose to do just one.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：如果你在本回合中还没有使用一个随从，你可以将该随从移回你的手上并立即在此额外使用一个随从。
clarificationsZh: “如果你还没有打出小兵”仅指你的打牌阶段；在你的回合开始时使用的小兵不会取消此能力的资格。
你必须归还小兵并扮演额外的小兵；你不能选择只做一项。

cards.name: Assassin
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: Destroy this minion at the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：在回合结束时消灭该随从。

cards.name: Disguise
cards.text: Choose one or two of your minions on one base. Play an equal number of extra minions there, and return the chosen minions to your hand.
clarifications: You must both return the minion(s) and play the extra minion(s); you cannot choose to do just one.
You must play the extra minion immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在一个基地上选择一两个随从。在那里打出同等数量的额外随从，并将选定的随从返回你的手牌。
clarificationsZh: 您必须归还小兵并扮演额外的小兵；你不能选择只做一项。
你必须立即使用额外的随从。

cards.name: Hidden Ninja
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, play a minion there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，在那里扮演一个随从。

cards.name: Infiltrate
cards.text: Play on a base. You may destroy another action on this base. Talent: Destroy this action to cancel this base's ability until the start of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。你可以破坏这个基地的另一个行动。天赋：摧毁该动作以取消该基地的能力，直至你的回合开始。

cards.name: Poison
cards.text: Play on a minion. Destroy any number of actions on it. Ongoing: This minion has -4 power. (Minions have minimum power of 0.)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。摧毁其上的任意数量的动作。进行中：该随从的力量为-4。 （小兵的最小力量为 0。）

cards.name: Seeing Stars
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的随从。

cards.name: Smoke Bomb
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion is not affected by other players’ actions.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer is destroyed at end of turn)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。持续：该随从不受其他玩家行为的影响。

cards.name: Way of Deception
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Invisible Ninja
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if this titan was not in play at the start of your turn, you may discard a card to play this titan at a base where you have a minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you destroy another player's card or return one of your minions to your hand, you may look at the top two cards of your deck, draw one, and shuffle the other into your deck. Special: At the start of your turn, you may destroy this titan to play an extra minion of power 3 or less.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果这个泰坦在你的回合开始时不在场上，你可以弃掉一张牌，在你有随从的基地打出这个泰坦。持续：每回合一次，当你消灭另一位玩家的牌或将你的一个随从移回你的手牌后，你可以查看你牌库顶的两张牌，抽一张，然后将另一张洗入你的牌库。特殊：在你的回合开始时，你可以消灭这个泰坦，以额外扮演一个力量为3或更少的随从。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Sword Lord
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Each of your other minions has +1 power. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：你的其他每个随从都有 +1 力量。澄清：

cards.name: Topper Chopper
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: Before this base scores, if the total power here is at least 3 higher than the breakpoint and this minion was in play at the start of the turn, gain 1 VP. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，如果这里的总力量至少比断点高 3，并且该随从在回合开始时在场，则获得 1 VP。澄清：

cards.name: Hammer Slammer
cards.text: Power 3 - Destroy a minion here with less power than this minion. Talent: If you have destroyed a card here this turn, reduce the breakpoint of this base by 2 until the end of the turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 消灭这里的一个力量比该随从弱的随从。天赋：如果本回合你破坏了此处的一张卡牌，则使该基地的断点减少2点，直到回合结束。澄清：

cards.name: Dork Orc
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Instead of a regular play, you may place a +1 power counter on each of your Dork Orcs and they cannot be affected by other players' cards until the start of your turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：与常规游戏不同，你可以在每个 Dork Orc 上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，并且在你的回合开始之前他们不会受到其他玩家牌的影响。澄清：

cards.name: And Stay Down!
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players with less power here than you have their maximum hand size reduced by 2 and cannot use Special abilities while this base is scoring. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行中：其他能力比你弱的玩家的最大手牌大小会减少 2，并且在该基地计分时无法使用特殊能力。澄清：

cards.name: Angry Pillagers
cards.text: Give a minion +2 or -2 power until the start of your turn. Play an extra minion at its base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 给予一个随从 +2 或 -2 力量直到你的回合开始。在其基地扮演一个额外的小兵。

cards.name: Crush
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Minions here you don't control have -1 power. If this card was in play at the start of the turn, your minions here have +1 power. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：这里不受你控制的小兵拥有-1力量。如果回合开始时这张牌在场，你的随从拥有+1力量。澄清：

cards.name: Death Breath
cards.text: For each base where you have a minion, either destroy a minion there of power 3 or less or reduce that base's breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对于每个拥有随从的基地，要么消灭那里的一个力量为 3 或更少的随从，要么将该基地的断点减少 4，直到回合结束。澄清：

cards.name: Dogpile
cards.text: Move up to two of your minions to a base where you have a minion. Special: Play before a base scores; only move one minion instead. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两个随从移动到您有一个随从的基地。特别：在基地计分前进行比赛；只移动一名随从。澄清：

cards.name: Gimme!
cards.text: Play on a minion. You may transfer an action on it to one of your minions and take control of that action. Ongoing: This minion's abilities are replaced with "Talent: Do nothing." Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。你可以将其上的一个动作转移给你的一个随从并控制该动作。正在进行：该随从的能力被“天赋：什么都不做”取代。澄清：

cards.name: Stalling
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. The breakpoint of its base is increased by its power until the start of your turn. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的一名随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。其基地的断点会因其力量而增加，直到你的回合开始。澄清：

cards.name: Too Tough
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion cannot be moved or destroyed. At the start of your turn, you may destroy this card to play an extra standard action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：该随从无法移动或消灭。在你的回合开始时，你可以破坏这张卡以进行额外的标准动作。澄清：

factions.name: Pearl and the Images
mechanics: Helping Other Players To Gain Rewards
Responding To Power Increases Of Opposing Minions

cards.name: Pearl
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Draw a minion of power 2 or less off the top of your deck OR give a minion here +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：从你的牌库顶部抽取一个力量为 2 或更少的随从，或者给予这里的一个随从 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Crystal
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on another player’s minion to place a +1 power counter on one of your minions at the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在另一个玩家的随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，以在同一基地的一个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Ruby
cards.text: Power 2 - You may give all players’ minions here +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以给予所有玩家的随从 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Topaz
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion OR if you have a minion there, you may move this minion to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：每回合一次，在另一个玩家的随从力量增加后，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物，或者如果你那里有一个随从，你可以将该随从移动到那里。

cards.name: All's Right with the World
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Give all players’ minions here +1 power until the end of the turn OR for each player, give one of their minions here +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: All's Right with the World 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：给予所有玩家的随从+1力量直到回合结束，或者对于每个玩家，给予他们的一个随从+2力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Dressing Room
cards.text: Each player may draw a card. Draw a card for each player who does so, including yourself.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 每个玩家可以抽一张牌。为每个这样做的玩家抽一张牌，包括你自己。

cards.name: Jam All Night Long
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Choose a player to play an extra minion of power 2 or less here or reveal a hand with no such minions. Then, if you chose another player and they played a minion, you may draw a card or place a +1 power counter on a minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Jam All Night Long 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：选择一名玩家在此额外打出一个力量为 2 或更少的随从，或者展示一张没有此类随从的手牌。然后，如果你选择了另一位玩家并且他们扮演了一个随从，你可以抓一张牌或在此处的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Love Unites Us
cards.text: All players shuffle all minions of power 2 or less in their discard pile into their deck
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 所有玩家将弃牌堆中所有力量为 2 或以下的随从洗入牌库

cards.name: Now You Know: Bike Safety
cards.text: Choose one of your minions on a base. Move that minion and another player's minion there to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores; move the chosen minions to the scoring base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Now You Know: Bike Safety 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 现在您知道了：自行车安全
cards.textZh: 在基地上选择一个你的随从。将那个随从和另一个玩家的随从移到另一个基地。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏；将选定的小兵移至计分基地。

cards.name: She's Got the Power
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion here increases, you may give this minion +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: She's Got the Power 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：每回合一次，当其他玩家的随从力量增加后，你可以给予该随从+3力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Truly Outstanding
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on any number of other players’ minions. For each one placed, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在任意数量的其他玩家的随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。每放置一个，你就可以在你的一名随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: We're Up, You're Down
cards.text: Choose a base. Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions there only add their printed power to their controllers’ total. Special: You may play this before a base scores where you have the most minions. You must choose that base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: We're Up, You're Down 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。在你的下一个回合开始之前，其他玩家的随从只会将他们打印的力量添加到控制器的总数中。特别：你可以在你拥有最多小兵的基地计分前玩这个。你必须选择那个基地。

mechanicsZh: 帮助其他玩家获得奖励
应对对手小兵力量的增加

factions.name: Penguins
mechanics: Playing off the top of the deck

cards.name: Command Penguin
cards.text: Power 4 - Play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion. Clarifications: *The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
clarifications: The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 从你的套牌顶部打出一个随从作为额外的随从。说明：*从你的牌组顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。
clarificationsZh: 从你的牌组顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。

cards.name: Dancing Penguin
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: After you play another minion, play this minion on that minion's base and place that minion on the bottom of your deck. Clarifications: *You still get the on-play ability of the first minion. If the first minion moves during its resolution (such as with Ice Slide) you play Dancing Penguin on the base where it currently is before bottom-decking it.
clarifications: You still get the on-play ability of the first minion. If the first minion moves during its resolution (such as with Ice Slide) you play Dancing Penguin on the base where it currently is before bottom-decking it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在你使用另一个随从后，在该随从的基地上使用该随从，并将该随从放在你的牌库底部。说明：*你仍然获得第一个随从的在场能力。如果第一个小兵在其分辨率期间移动（例如使用冰滑行），您可以在其当前所在的基地上玩跳舞企鹅，然后再将其打底层。
clarificationsZh: 你仍然可以获得第一个随从的实时能力。如果第一个小兵在其分辨率期间移动（例如使用冰滑行），您可以在其当前所在的基地上玩跳舞企鹅，然后再将其打底层。

cards.name: Disguise Penguin
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Place this minion on the bottom of your deck to play an extra minion off the top of your deck. The Disguise Penguin ability can only be used once per turn. Clarifications: The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
clarifications: The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将此随从放在你的牌组底部，以在你的牌组顶部额外打出一个随从。企鹅伪装能力每回合只能使用一次。澄清：从你的套牌顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。
clarificationsZh: 从你的牌组顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。

cards.name: Snazzy Penguin
cards.text: Power 3 - Draw a card. If this was not your regular minion played from your hand, draw another card. Clarifications: "Not your regular minion played from your hand" permits it being your regular minion played from somewhere else, such as with Emperor Penguin.
clarifications: "Not your regular minion played from your hand" permits it being your regular minion played from somewhere else, such as with Emperor Penguin.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 抓一张牌。如果这不是你手上打出的常规随从，则再抓一张牌。澄清：“不是你手上打出的常规随从”允许它是你从其他地方打出的常规随从，例如帝企鹅。
clarificationsZh: “不是您从手中打出的常规随从”允许它是您从其他地方打出的常规随从，例如帝企鹅。

cards.name: Surfing Penguin
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move a minion from here to another base. Clarifications: Surfing Penguin can move itself.
clarifications: Surfing Penguin can move itself.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以将一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地。说明：冲浪企鹅可以自行移动。
clarificationsZh: 冲浪企鹅可以自己移动。

cards.name: Regurgitating Penguin
cards.text: Power 2 - Reveal the top three cards of your deck. You may draw a revealed action, then if this was not your regular minion played from your hand, you may play that action. Return the rest in any order. Clarifications: "Not your regular minion played from your hand" permits it being your regular minion played from somewhere else, such as with Emperor Penguin.
clarifications: "Not your regular minion played from your hand" permits it being your regular minion played from somewhere else, such as with Emperor Penguin.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 显示你牌组顶部的三张牌。你可以画一个显示动作，然后如果这不是你手上打出的常规随从，你就可以打出那个动作。以任意顺序返回其余部分。澄清：“不是你手上打出的常规随从”允许它是你从其他地方打出的常规随从，例如帝企鹅。
clarificationsZh: “不是您从手中打出的常规随从”允许它是您从其他地方打出的常规随从，例如帝企鹅。

cards.name: Baby Penguin
cards.text: Power 2 - You may play Emperor Penguin here OR if this minion was played from anywhere other than your hand, play an extra minion here of power 3 or less. Clarifications: "Anywhere other than your hand" includes off the top of the deck, uncovering, from stasis, from discard, from storage, etc.
clarifications: "Anywhere other than your hand" includes off the top of the deck, uncovering, from stasis, from discard, from storage, etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在这里扮演帝企鹅，或者如果这个随从是从你手牌以外的任何地方扮演的，则在这里扮演一个力量为 3 或更少的额外随从。澄清：“除了你的手牌之外的任何地方”包括牌组顶部以外的地方、揭开的地方、来自停滞的地方、来自弃牌的地方、来自储存的地方等。
clarificationsZh: “除了你的手牌之外的任何地方”包括牌组顶部以外的地方、揭开的地方、来自停滞的地方、来自弃牌的地方、来自储存的地方等。

cards.name: A Wish for Wings That Work
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, it gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Special: When this card is revealed off the top of your deck, you may play it as an extra action. Clarifications: This card's Special can be used when it's revealed off the top of your deck in any way, including revealing cards when playing a minion off the top of your deck or revealing the top X cards of your deck.
clarifications: This card's Special can be used when it's revealed off the top of your deck in any way, including revealing cards when playing a minion off the top of your deck or revealing the top X cards of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: A Wish for Wings That Work 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 渴望拥有能发挥作用的翅膀
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：当你在这里扮演一个随从后，它会获得+1力量直到回合结束。特殊：当这张卡从你的牌库顶部展示时，你可以将其作为一个额外动作使用。说明：这张牌的特殊卡可以在以任何方式从你的牌组顶部展示时使用，包括在从你的牌组顶部打出小兵时展示牌或展示你的牌组顶部的 X 张牌。
clarificationsZh: 这张卡的特殊功能可以在以任何方式从你的牌组顶部展示时使用，包括在从你的牌组顶部打出小兵时展示牌或展示你的牌组顶部的 X 张牌。

cards.name: I Can't Tell Them Apart
cards.text: Shuffle any number of your minions on a base into your deck. Play an equal number of minions there off the top of your deck as extra minions. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: I Can't Tell Them Apart 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将基地上任意数量的随从洗入你的牌库。在你的套牌顶部打出等量的随从作为额外的随从。澄清：*无

cards.name: Ice Slide
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, you may move or transfer one of your cards on this base other than this action to another base. Clarifications: This ability can move the minion that was just played.
clarifications: This ability can move the minion that was just played.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你在这里扮演一个随从后，你可以将除此行动之外的该基地上的一张牌移动或转移到另一个基地。说明：该能力可以移动刚刚使用的随从。
clarificationsZh: 这个能力可以移动刚刚打出的随从。

cards.name: Leaping Aboard
cards.text: Special: After a new base comes into play, play a minion off the top of your deck there. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在一个新的基地开始发挥作用后，从你的牌组顶部打出一个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Pebble Gift
cards.text: Play on a base. Special: After this base scores, draw a card for each of your minions here. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。特别：在此基地计分后，为您的每个随从抽一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Secret Mission
cards.text: Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck to draw that number plus one cards, then you may shuffle your deck. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的手牌放置到牌堆底，抽出该数量的牌和一张牌，然后你可以洗牌堆。澄清：无

cards.name: The Hatching
cards.text: Play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion. Clarifications: The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
clarifications: The minion played off the top of your deck can be on any base, chosen after you see what minion it is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的套牌顶部打出一个随从作为额外的随从。澄清：从你的套牌顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。
clarificationsZh: 从你的牌组顶部打出的随从可以位于任何基地，在你看到它是什么随从后选择。

cards.name: Under The Ice
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here, you may place a minion with the same or less power from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck. Clarifications: If the minion you play gains power during its resolution (such as with A Wish For Wings That Work) you may consider its final power for this card's limit.
clarifications: If the minion you play gains power during its resolution (such as with A Wish For Wings That Work) you may consider its final power for this card's limit.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你在这里打出一个随从后，你可以将弃牌堆中的一个具有相同或更少力量的随从放置在你的牌组底部。说明：如果你扮演的随从在其结算过程中获得了力量（例如希望拥有有效的翅膀），你可以考虑将其最终力量视为这张卡的限制。
clarificationsZh: 如果你扮演的随从在其结算过程中获得了力量（例如希望拥有有效的翅膀），你可以考虑将其最终力量视为这张卡的限制。

cards.name: Emperor Penguin
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn, you may play this titan at a base where you have three or more cards. Ongoing: Once on your turn, you may play a minion here off the top of your deck instead of from your hand. Talent: Reveal a minion of power 3 or less from your hand or discard pile and shuffle it into your deck to place a +1 power counter on this card. Clarifications: *Emperor Penguin can replace any generic (unqualified) or qualified minion play from your hand (Example: Play an extra minion; play a minion of power 2 or less; play a Groupie). If replacing a qualified minion play, it can only play a minion of that type (e.g., Groupie) off the top of the deck. It cannot replace a specific minion play (Example: Snuggly Bear, Do-Over). It can be used once per turn during your Play Cards phase. *"Three or more cards" can include minions, actions on bases and minions, buried cards, stored cards, etc.
clarifications: Emperor Penguin can replace any generic (unqualified) or qualified minion play from your hand (Example: Play an extra minion; play a minion of power 2 or less; play a Groupie). If replacing a qualified minion play, it can only play a minion of that type (e.g., Groupie) off the top of the deck. It cannot replace a specific minion play (Example: Snuggly Bear, Do-Over). It can be used once per turn during your Play Cards phase.
"Three or more cards" can include minions, actions on bases and minions, buried cards, stored cards, etc.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，你可以在拥有三张或更多牌的基地使用这个泰坦。正在进行：一旦轮到你，你可以从你的牌组顶部而不是从你的手牌中扮演一个随从。天赋：从你的手牌或弃牌堆中展示一个力量为 3 或更少的随从，并将其洗入你的牌库，在这张卡上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。说明：*帝企鹅可以替换您手中的任何通用（不合格）或合格的随从（例如：扮演一个额外的随从；扮演一个力量为 2 或更少的随从；扮演一个 Groupie）。如果替换合格的随从，则只能在牌组顶部扮演该类型的随从（例如 Groupie）。它不能取代特定的小兵玩法（例如：Snuggly Bear、Do-Over）。在你的游戏卡阶段，它每回合可以使用一次。 *“三张或更多牌”可以包括小兵、基地和小兵的行动、埋藏牌、储存牌等。
clarificationsZh: 帝企鹅可以替换您手中的任何通用（不合格）或合格的随从（例如：扮演一个额外的随从；扮演一个力量为 2 或更少的随从；扮演一个 Groupie）。如果替换合格的随从，则只能在牌组顶部扮演该类型的随从（例如 Groupie）。它不能取代特定的小兵玩法（例如：Snuggly Bear、Do-Over）。在你的游戏卡阶段，它每回合可以使用一次。
“三张或更多牌”可以包括小兵、基地和小兵的行动、埋藏牌、储存牌等。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Pirates
mechanics: Making Small Minions Walk The Plank

cards.name: Pirate King
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: Before a base scores, you may move this minion there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 特殊：在基地计分前，你可以将该随从移动到那里。

cards.name: Buccaneer
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: once per turn, if this minion would be destroyed, you may move it to another base instead.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (Special to Ongoing; may move instead of mandatory)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，如果该随从将被摧毁，你可以将其移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Cut Lass
cards.text: Power 3 - You may destroy a minion here of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以消灭这里力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: First Mate
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After this base is scored, you may move this minion to another base instead of the discard pile.
clarifications: This ability triggers each time the base First Mate is on scores; this can happen more than once per turn. The First Mate cannot move to the base that replaces the scored base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：在该基地计分后，您可以将该随从移至另一个基地而不是弃牌堆。
clarificationsZh: 每当基本大副得分时，此能力就会触发；每回合这种情况可能会发生多次。大副不能移动到取代计分基地的基地。

cards.name: Broadside
cards.text: Destroy all of one player's minions of power 2 or less on a base where you have a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在您拥有随从的基地上消灭一名玩家的所有力量为 2 或以下的随从。

cards.name: Cannon
cards.text: Destroy up to two minions of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭最多 2 个力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Dinghy
cards.text: Move up to two of your minions to other bases.
clarifications: You can move the minions to different bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将最多两名随从移至其他基地。
clarificationsZh: 您可以将小兵移动到不同的基地。

cards.name: Full Sail
cards.text: Move any number of your minions to other bases. Special: Before a base scores, you may play this card.
clarifications: You can move the minions to different bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的小兵转移到其他基地。特别：在基地计分前，你可以打出这张牌。
clarificationsZh: 您可以将小兵移动到不同的基地。

cards.name: Powderkeg
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions and all minions with equal or less power on the same base.
clarifications: If you choose a minion that can't be destroyed, the other minions are still destroyed (unless also immune).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一个小兵以及同一基地上所有同等或更少力量的小兵。
clarificationsZh: 如果你选择一个无法被摧毁的随从，其他随从仍然会被摧毁（除非也免疫）。

cards.name: Sea Dogs
cards.text: Name a faction. Move all other players’ minions of that faction from one base to another.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 命名一个派系。将该派系的所有其他玩家的随从从一个基地移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Shanghai
cards.text: Move another player’s minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将另一个玩家的随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Swashbuckling
cards.text: Each of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Its effects only apply to minions currently in play, not to minions played later in the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 它的效果仅适用于当前在场的随从，不适用于本回合稍后使用的随从。

cards.name: The Kraken
cards.text: Special: After a base scores where you had a minion while this card is not in play, you may say “Release the Kraken!” to play this titan on the base that replaces it. Talent: Move this titan to another base. Other players’ minions there get -1 power until the start of your next turn. Special: After this base scores, move one of your minions from here to another base.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (until start of your next turn instead of end of turn)
clarifications: Yes, you must say "Release the Kraken!" - if you do not, you must instead communicate the concept of Releasing the Kraken with another method (e.g. writing the phrase). The Kraken won't know if it is released unless you tell it!
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你有一个随从而这张牌不在场时，在基地计分后，你可以说“释放海妖！”在取代它的基地上玩这个泰坦。天赋：将这个泰坦移动到另一个基地。其他玩家的随从获得 -1 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。特殊：在此基地计分后，将你的一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 是的，你必须说“释放海妖！” - 如果你不这样做，你必须用另一种方法来传达释放海妖的概念（例如写下这个短语）。除非你告诉它，否则海妖不会知道它是否被释放！
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Maui
cards.text: Power 5 - Play up to two bases from the top of the base deck. Talent: Move one of your minions to a base where you have no minions.
clarifications: This card can increase the number of bases in the game.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 从基地牌的顶部开始最多打两个基地。天赋：将你的一名随从移动到你没有随从的基地。
clarificationsZh: 这张卡可以增加游戏中的基地数量。

cards.name: Wayfinder
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to a base where you have no minions to place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将此随从移动到一个你没有随从的基地，在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Tiki
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If this minion has an action on it, it has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果该随从对其进行动作，则其力量 +2。

cards.name: Mo'ai
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Other players cannot move their minions to this base or move this minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：其他玩家无法将他们的随从移至此基地或将此随从移至另一个基地。

cards.name: Growth of the Tribes
cards.text: Choose a base where you have no minions. Play an extra minion there immediately or move one of your minions to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Growth of the Tribes 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个没有小兵的基地。立即在那里多打一个随从，或者将你的一个随从移到那里。

cards.name: Knowledge of the Tribes
cards.text: Draw a card for each base where you have a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Knowledge of the Tribes 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 为每个有随从的基地抽一张牌。

cards.name: Unity of the Tribes
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Gain +2 power there for each base where you have at least one minion until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Unity of the Tribes 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有随从的基地。直到回合结束为止，每有一个至少有一个随从的基地，获得 +2 力量。

cards.name: Ocean Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions at a base with no other player’s minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base to place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在没有其他玩家的随从的情况下，在基地中使用你的一名随从进行游戏。天赋：将此随从移至另一个基地，在其上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Shark Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Place a +1 power counter on it. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。在其上放置一个+1能量指示物。持续：在你的回合开始时，如果这是你唯一的随从，则在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Sun Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. Special: After a base scores you may play this card on one of your minions there with no actions on it to move it to another base instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。特殊：在基地计分后，你可以对你的一个随从使用这张卡，无需对其进行任何操作，将其移动到另一个基地而不是弃牌堆。

cards.name: Tattoo Artist
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that can be played on a minion and place it into your hand or play it as an extra action.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索可以对小兵执行的动作，并将其放入你的手上或作为额外动作执行。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Volcanic Uprising
cards.text: Play the top card of the base deck and you may move one of your minions to it, OR destroy a base with no player’s minions on it and replace it with two bases.
clarifications: This card can increase the number of bases in the game.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出基础牌组的顶牌，你可以将一个随从移到上面，或者摧毁一个没有玩家随从的基地，然后用两个基地替换它。
clarificationsZh: 这张卡可以增加游戏中的基地数量。

factions.name: Princesses
mechanics: Eliza - generally a lack of extra card plays; there is only one: Some Day My Prince Will Come
Griselda - bonus power: Heirloom, Fairy Godmother
Marie DeGraw - draw cards: Direct to DVD Sequel, Fairy Godmother, Skillet
Sleeping Beauty - shuffle select cards into the deck: Direct to DVD Sequel, Woodland Helpers
Snow White - move minions: True Love's Kiss, Tale as Old as Time, Some Day My Prince Will Come

cards.name: Apricot
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Destroy another player’s minion of power 2 or less here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在这里消灭另一个玩家的力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Eliza
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Other players cannot play more than one extra card per turn.
clarifications: Any minions or actions played out of turn, or outside the Play Cards phase of your turn, count as extra cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 持续：其他玩家每回合不能打出一张以上的额外牌。
clarificationsZh: 任何不按顺序打出的小兵或行动，或者在你回合的打牌阶段之外，都算作额外的牌。

cards.name: Griselda
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Draw an Heirloom from your discard OR play an Heirloom as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：从你的弃牌中抽出一件传家宝，或者以额外动作打出一件传家宝。

cards.name: Marie DeGraw
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a minion, draw it. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：展示你牌组顶牌。如果是小兵，就画它。否则，将其放在牌组的底部。

cards.name: Sleeping Beauty
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: If this minion would go to the discard pile, shuffle it into your deck instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：如果该随从要进入弃牌堆，请将其洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Snow White
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Move a minion from another base to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 天赋：将一个随从从另一个基地移动到这里。

cards.name: Direct to DVD Sequel
cards.text: Shuffle a minion from your discard pile into your deck and draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Direct to DVD Sequel 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个随从洗入你的牌库并抓一张牌。

cards.name: Fairy Godmother
cards.text: Draw two cards, OR one minion gets +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓两张牌，或者一个随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Happily Ever After
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you are the winner here when this base scores, gain 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：如果您在该基地计分时成为获胜者，则获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Heirloom
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This card gives this minion +1 power for each Heirloom on it. This card cannot be destroyed.
clarifications: One of these on a minion gives it +1 power. Two of them on a minion give it +2 each, for +4 power total. All three on the same minion give it +3 each, for +9 power total.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：这张卡为该随从提供 +1 力量，每有一个传家宝。这张卡不会被破坏。
clarificationsZh: 一个小兵身上的其中一个给予它+1力量。其中两个在一个随从上，每人给予+2，总共+4力量。同一个随从的所有三个都给予+3，总计+9力量。

cards.name: Skillet
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 2 or less and draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 2 或以下的随从并抓一张牌。

cards.name: Some Day My Prince Will Come
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, move a minion from there to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Some Day My Prince Will Come 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，将一个随从从那里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Tale as Old as Time
cards.text: Choose a base. Move all of your minions to it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Tale as Old as Time 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将你所有的随从移到那里。

cards.name: True Love's Kiss
cards.text: Move a minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Woodland Helpers
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a standard action, you may place it on the bottom of your deck instead of in your discard pile.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer applies to non-standard actions)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：在你进行一个标准动作后，你可以将其放在你的牌库底部，而不是放在你的弃牌堆中。

mechanicsZh: 杏子 - 摧毁 power-2 小兵：煎锅
Eliza——通常缺乏额外的牌局；只有一个：有一天我的王子会来
Griselda - 额外力量：传家宝、仙女教母
Marie DeGraw - 抽卡：直接 DVD 续集、仙女教母、Skillet
睡美人 - 将选择的卡片洗入牌堆中：直接 DVD 续集、林地助手
白雪公主 - 移动小黄人：真爱之吻、古老的故事、有一天我的王子会来

factions.name: Robots

cards.name: Nukebot
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After this minion is destroyed, destroy each other player’s minions on this base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：消灭该随从后，消灭该基地上其他玩家的随从。

cards.name: Warbot
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：该随从无法被消灭。

cards.name: Hoverbot
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a minion, you may play it as an extra minion. Otherwise, return it to the top of your deck.
clarifications: You must play or return the minion immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 展示你牌组顶牌。如果它是一个随从，你可以将它作为一个额外的随从来玩。否则，将其放回你的牌库顶。
clarificationsZh: 您必须立即使用或归还该随从。

cards.name: Zapbot
cards.text: Power 2 - You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以额外扮演一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Microbot Alpha
cards.text: Power 1 - Ongoing: Gains +1 power for each of your other Microbots. All of your minions are considered Microbots.
clarifications: All of your non-Microbot minions are also considered Microbots, while still being considered their original selves. This only applies to minions in play, not those in the hand or discard pile. But since this ability is ongoing, the amount of power gain changes as other Microbots come and go.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 持续：为您的每个其他微型机器人获得 +1 力量。你所有的爪牙都被认为是微型机器人。
clarificationsZh: 所有非微型机器人小黄人也被视为微型机器人，同时仍被视为其原始自我。这仅适用于游戏中的随从，不适用于手牌或弃牌堆中的随从。但由于这种能力是持续存在的，因此功率增益的大小会随着其他微型机器人的出现和消失而变化。

cards.name: Microbot Archive
cards.text: Power 1 - After one of your Microbots (including this one) is destroyed, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 1 - 当你的一个微型机器人（包括这个）被摧毁后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Microbot Fixer
cards.text: Power 1 - If this is the first minion you played this turn, you may play an extra minion. Ongoing: Each of your Microbots gains +1 power.
clarifications: If both Fixers are in play, each Microbot had +2 power, including both Fixers.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 1 - 如果这是你本回合使用的第一个随从，你可以使用额外的随从。正在进行：你的每个微型机器人获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果两个修复者都在场，则每个微型机器人都有 +2 力量，包括两个修复者。

cards.name: Microbot Guard
cards.text: Power 1 - Destroy a minion on this base with power less than the number of minions you have here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 摧毁该基地上的一个力量小于你这里拥有的小兵数量的小兵。

cards.name: Microbot Reclaimer
cards.text: Power 1 - If this is the first minion you played this turn, you may play an extra minion. Shuffle any number of Microbots from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 1 - 如果这是你本回合使用的第一个随从，你可以使用额外的随从。将任意数量的微型机器人从你的弃牌堆中洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Tech Center
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw one card for each of your minions there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。为你的每个随从抽一张牌。

mechanicsZh: 实用程序 Minions 而不是操作

cards.name: The Monarch
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a Groupie, reveal it and place it into your hand. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索 Groupie，展示它并将其放入你的手上。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。

cards.name: Classic Rocker
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If this base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, draw a card. Use only one Classic Rocker ability per turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果该基地的断点为 21 或更高，则抓一张牌。每回合仅使用一种经典摇杆技能。

cards.name: Rick Roll
cards.text: Power 3 - Move up to three of your minions from bases with lower breakpoints to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 将最多三个随从从断点较低的基地移至此处。

cards.name: Groupie
cards.text: Power 2 - Play another Groupie here as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 在这里扮演另一个 Groupie 作为额外的随从。

cards.name: Guest Star
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a Groupie and reveal it. Place it in your hand or play it as an extra minion. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索 Groupie 并展示它。将其放在手上或作为额外的随从使用。如果你搜索了你的牌组，则将其洗牌。

cards.name: Hot Venue
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here have +1 power. If this base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, draw a card at the end of any turn that you play a minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从拥有+1力量。如果该基地的断点为 21 或更高，则在您在此扮演随从的任何回合结束时抓一张牌。

cards.name: Power Ballad
cards.text: Choose a base. Your minions there gain +1 power until the end of the turn. Special: If the base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, you may play this card before the base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。你的随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。特别：如果基地的断点为 21 或更高，您可以在基地计分前打出这张卡。

cards.name: Reunion Tour
cards.text: Shuffle any number of your minions from your discard pile into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的随从从弃牌堆洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Rock of Luuv
cards.text: Search your deck for up to three minions with power 2 or less and the same name. Reveal them, place them into your hand and shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索最多 3 个力量为 2 或更低且名称相同的随从。展示它们，将它们放入你的手上，然后洗牌。

cards.name: Total Sellout
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores where you have a minion. Draw two cards. Draw another card if the breakpoint was 21 or higher.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你有随从的情况下，在基地计分后进行游戏。抽两张牌。如果断点为 21 或更高，则再抽一张牌。

cards.name: Tour Bus
cards.text: Choose a base. Move up to three of your minions from bases with lower breakpoint to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将最多三个随从从断点较低的基地移动到那里。

cards.name: Turn Up to 11
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If this base’s starting breakpoint is less than 21, it is increased to 21.
clarifications: Monsters etc. still affect the breakpoint after the change to the starting breakpoint. If there is a conflict between multiple abilities that set the starting breakpoint (e.g. Overgrowth, Marking Territory, Turn Up To 11), the current player chooses which one prevails. Monsters, and abilities that adjust the breakpoint (e.g. Rampage, Wyvern, Favor of Zeus), adjust it from that new starting value.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果该碱基的起始断点小于 21，则增加到 21。
clarificationsZh: 更改为起始断点后，怪物等仍然会影响断点。如果设置起始断点的多个能力之间存在冲突（例如过度生长、标记领地、转向 11），则当前玩家选择哪一个占上风。调整断点的怪物和技能（例如狂暴、双足飞龙、宙斯之宠）从新的起始值开始调整。

factions.name: Rulers of the Cosmos

cards.name: Gal-Woman
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Play an extra play-on-minion action from any player’s discard pile. At the end of the turn, or when it leaves play, place it on the bottom of its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：从任何玩家的弃牌堆中进行额外的对小兵行动。在回合结束时，或当它离开游戏时，将其置于其拥有者牌库的底部。

cards.name: Guy-Man
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Copy the talent of another one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 天赋：复制你的另一名随从的天赋。

cards.name: Andko
cards.text: Power 3 - Effect
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 效果

cards.name: Man-With-Arms
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: If this minion has an action on it, it gains +2 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: Once per turn, when this minion would use a talent given by an action, it may instead use another of its talents an extra time.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：如果该随从有行动，它会获得 +2 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。持续：每回合一次，当该随从使用某项行动赋予的天赋时，它可能会额外使用另一项天赋。

cards.name: Frogga
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a play-on-minion action off the top of your deck. Ongoing: When this minion leaves play, you may shuffle an action on it into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 从你的牌组顶部抽取一个对小兵进行游戏的动作。正在进行：当该随从离开战场时，你可以将其上的一个动作洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Young Noble
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: If a Sword card is on this minion, swap this minion for a minion of power 5 or more from your hand, deck, or discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：如果该随从上有一张剑牌，则将该随从替换为你手上、牌组或弃牌堆中力量为 5 或以上的随从。

cards.name: Armor of Battle
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Increase the breakpoint of this base by 2 for each of your minions here with an action on it until the start of your next turn.”
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。正在进行：该随从具有以下能力：“天赋：对你的每个随从在此采取行动，使该基地的断点增加 2，直到你的下一回合开始。”

cards.name: Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons!
cards.text: Transfer any number of actions on your minions to your other minions. Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions you transferred an action to.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons! 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将您的随从上的任意数量的操作转移到您的其他随从上。在您将动作转移到的每个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Fearless Friend
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Move this minion.”
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：该随从拥有能力：“天赋：移动该随从。”

cards.name: Magic Weapon
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion gains +1 power until the start of your next turn for each player with a minion here OR if there is only one action on this minion, draw a card.”
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。持续：该随从拥有以下能力：“天赋：每有一名随从在此的玩家，该随从都会获得 +1 力量，直到下回合开始，或者如果该随从只有一个动作，则抓一张牌。”

cards.name: MYAAAH!
cards.text: Return a play-on-minion action from one of your minions or from your discard pile to its owner’s hand. Play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从或你的弃牌堆中的对随从行动移回其拥有者的手上。将其作为额外动作来玩。

cards.name: Mystic Transference
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of each other player’s turn, choose one of your actions in play that gives a talent. This minion may copy that talent immediately. Talent: Transfer one of your actions between this minion and another of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：在其他玩家的回合开始时，选择您在游戏中提供天赋的行动之一。该随从可以立即复制该天赋。天赋：在这个随从和你的另一个随从之间转移你的一项行动。

cards.name: Now You Know: Toxic Waste
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. Special: You may play this before a base scores to transfer an action from one of your minions to another instead; then you may use a talent on the minion the action was transferred to.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Now You Know: Toxic Waste 璺?Smash Up
cards.nameZh: 现在您知道了：有毒废物
cards.textZh: 从你的套牌中抽取一个对小兵进行游戏的动作。特殊：你可以在基地计分前玩这个，将一个动作从你的一个随从转移到另一个；那么你可以对动作转移到的随从使用天赋。

cards.name: Powerful Sword
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability “Talent: This minion is not affected by other players’ cards until the start of your next turn.” Talent: Transfer another action from this minion to another of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。持续：该随从具有“天赋：在你的下回合开始之前，该随从不受其他玩家的牌影响”的能力。天赋：将该随从的另一个动作转移到你的另一个随从身上。

cards.name: Sword That's Powerful
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this minion.” If this minion’s printed power is 5 or more, it has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：该随从拥有能力：“天赋：在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。”如果该随从的印制力量为 5 或以上，则其力量 +2。

mechanicsZh: 对小黄人进行游戏动作
在 Minions 之间移动动作

cards.name: Baba Yaga
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Place another minion here on the bottom of its owner’s deck to have them play a minion off the top of their deck here as an extra minion, then shuffle their deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：将另一个随从放置在其拥有者牌库的底部，让他们从牌库顶部打出一个随从作为额外的随从，然后洗牌。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Finist the Falcon
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before a base scores, you may move this minion to there, or return this minion from there to your hand and play it on another base as an extra minion.
clarifications: If a card is played again, its ability can be used again unless it says otherwise.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：在基地计分前，您可以将该随从移至那里，或将该随从从那里返回到您的手上，并将其作为额外的随从在另一个基地上使用。
clarificationsZh: 如果再次打出一张牌，则可以再次使用其能力，除非另有说明。

cards.name: The Birch Woman
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, you may search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for The Birch, and add it to your hand or play it as an extra minion.
clarifications: Going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当该随从从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，你可以在你的手牌、套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜索桦木，并将其添加到你的手牌中或将其作为额外的随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆包括得分后被弃牌和被摧毁
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: The Gray Wolf
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Place this minion on top of its owner’s deck to play an extra minion here and place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将此随从放在其拥有者的牌组顶部，在此扮演一个额外的随从，并在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Foolish Magician
cards.text: Power 3 - Draw three cards, then place three cards from your hand on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 抽三张牌，然后将三张手牌以任意顺序放在牌组的顶部和/或底部

cards.name: The Birch
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, you may destroy this minion to search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for The Birch Woman, and add it to your hand or play it here as an extra minion.
clarifications: Destroying this minion because of any other ability does not trigger this ability.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，你可以消灭这个随从，在你的手牌、套牌和/或弃牌堆中搜寻桦树女，并将其添加到你的手牌中或在这里作为额外随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 由于任何其他能力而消灭该随从不会触发该能力。
指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Tsar Eagle
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a card OR place a minion from another player’s discard pile on top of their deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 抓一张牌或将另一位玩家的弃牌堆中的一个随从放在他们的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Toad
cards.text: Power 0 - You may give control of this minion to another player to shuffle another one of their minions here into its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 你可以将这个随从的控制权交给另一位玩家，以将他们的另一个随从洗入其所有者的牌库中。

cards.name: Bewitched
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. When this minion leaves play, transfer this action to another minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。当该随从离开战场时，将此动作转移给另一个随从。

cards.name: Fetch I Know Not What
cards.text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal two actions. You may place any number of those actions into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Fetch I Know Not What 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组中的牌，直到你展示两个动作。您可以将任意数量的这些行动放入您的手中。将其余的洗入你的套牌中。

cards.name: Go I Know Not Whither
cards.text: Choose a base. Shuffle a random minion there controlled by each other player into its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Go I Know Not Whither 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将由其他玩家控制的随机随从洗入其所有者的牌库中。

cards.name: Go See My Sister
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move one of your minions to here, you may draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Go See My Sister 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：当你使用或移动你的一个随从到这里后，你可以抓一张牌。

cards.name: Mass Transformation
cards.text: Each player places their hand on the bottom of their deck and draws an equal number of cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 每个玩家将手放在牌库底部并抓相同数量的牌。

cards.name: The Frog Princess
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Place this minion on the bottom of its owner’s deck to play a minion off the top of your deck here as an extra minion and transfer this action to it, then shuffle your deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
If you use the ability of Baba Yaga or Transformation on the minion this card is on, this card is discarded without triggering.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。天赋：将此随从放置在其拥有者牌库的底部，以将你牌库顶部的一个随从作为额外的随从，并将此动作转移给它，然后洗牌你的牌库。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。
如果你对这张卡所在的随从使用巴巴雅嘎或变身能力，这张卡将被舍弃而不触发。

cards.name: The Water of Life
cards.text: Place a minion from your discard pile on top of your deck. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Water of Life 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个随从放到你的牌组顶部。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Transformation
cards.text: Place a minion on the bottom of its owner’s deck to have them play a minion off the top of their deck there as an extra minion, then shuffle their deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从放在其拥有者牌库的底部，让他们从牌库顶部打出一个随从作为额外的随从，然后洗牌。
clarificationsZh: 指定如何选择额外卡牌的卡牌要求您立即打出它。

cards.name: Nick Fury
cards.text: power 5 - You may play an extra character here.
cards.textZh: power 5 - 你可以在这里扮演一个额外的角色。

cards.name: Maria Hill
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: After you play another character here, this character gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当你在这里扮演另一个角色后，该角色获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Agent Coulson
cards.text: power 3 - You may play a character of power 2 or less here as an extra character.
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 您可以在这里扮演力量 2 或以下的角色作为额外角色。

cards.name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: If another of your characters is here, this character has +1 power.
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：如果你的另一个角色在这里，则该角色拥有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Entry Point
cards.text: Play an extra character.
cards.textZh: 扮演一个额外的角色。

cards.name: Mission Debriefing
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw a card for each of your characters there.
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。为每个角色抽一张卡。

cards.name: Proving Ground
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Play a character of power 3 or less here as an extra character.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：在这里扮演一个力量为3或更少的角色作为额外角色。

cards.name: Reassignment
cards.text: Choose a base. Move up to two of your characters from other bases to there.
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将最多两个角色从其他基地移动到那里。

cards.name: Rescue Mission
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, shuffle all of your characters there into their owners’ decks and draw a card.
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分后，将所有角色洗入其所有者的牌库中并抽一张牌。

cards.name: Superior Firepower
cards.text: Destroy a base modifier or a character of power 3 or less.
cards.textZh: 消灭一个基础修正值或一个力量为 3 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Troop Drop
cards.text: Play a character of power 3 or less as an extra character.
cards.textZh: 扮演一个力量为 3 或以下的角色作为额外角色。

cards.name: Work Together
cards.text: Each of your characters currently in play gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 当前在场的每个角色都会获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

factions.name: Samurai
mechanics: Gaining Benefits From Going To Discard From Play

cards.name: Shogun
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another of your minions goes to the discard pile from play, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你的另一个随从从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Bushi
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play while it has 5 or more power, gain 1 VP.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当该随从从游戏中进入弃牌堆且力量为 5 或以上时，获得 1 VP。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Ronin
cards.text: Power 3 - If this is your only minion on this base, you may place two +1 power counters on it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (two counters instead of one, and now optional(
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 如果这是你在这个基地上唯一的随从，你可以在上面放置两个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Samurai-Chan
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当该随从从场上进入弃牌堆后，抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Code of Bushido
cards.text: Place three total +1 power counters on your minions.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (your choice of how to distribute counters, rather than needing to be on three separate minions)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的随从身上放置三个总计+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Final Haiku
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, your minions each gain +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。持续：当该随从从场上进入弃牌堆后，你的随从每人获得+2力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Heart of the Battle
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. One of your minions there duels another player’s minion there. Destroy the losing minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Heart of the Battle 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。你的一个随从在那里与另一个玩家的随从决斗。消灭失败的随从。

cards.name: Honor the Ancestors
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. For each other player in the game, you may shuffle a minion from your discard pile back into your deck.
clarifications: In a 2-player game you shuffle one minion into your deck, in a 3-player game two, and in a 4-player game three minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的一名随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。对于游戏中的每个其他玩家，您可以将弃牌堆中的一个随从洗回您的套牌中。
clarificationsZh: 在 2 人游戏中，您可以将 1 个随从洗入牌组，在 3 人游戏中，可以洗入 2 个随从，在 4 人游戏中，可以将 3 个随从洗入牌组。

cards.name: Honor the Fallen
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After one of your minions here goes to the discard pile, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你的一个随从进入弃牌堆后，抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Honorable Combat
cards.text: Choose a base where another player has more power than you. One of your minions there duels one of that player’s minions there. The controller of the winning minion gains 1 VP.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个其他玩家比你拥有更多力量的基地。你的一名随从在那里与该玩家的一名随从决斗。获胜随从的控制者获得 1 VP。

cards.name: Way of the Warrior
cards.text: Until the end of the turn, one of your minions gains +3 power, and if it goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Way of the Warrior 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 直到回合结束，你的一个随从获得+3力量，如果它从游戏中进入弃牌堆，则抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Yokai Attack!
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions to play an extra minion and an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一个小兵即可发挥额外的小兵和额外的行动。

mechanicsZh: 从游戏中弃牌中获得好处

factions.name: Shapeshifters

cards.name: Doppelgänger
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, search your deck for a minion and play it as an extra minion.
clarifications: Since minions on a scored base are discarded before the base is replaced, this card’s replacement cannot be played onto the new base. If Transmogrify destroys Doppelgänger, both abilities trigger. If conditions prohibit playing the chosen minion, discard it instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：当该随从从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，在你的牌组中搜索一个随从并将其作为额外的随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 由于在替换基地之前，已计分基地上的小兵会被丢弃，因此替换后的这张卡牌不能打到新基地上。如果幻化摧毁了分身，两个技能都会触发。如果情况不允许使用所选随从，请将其丢弃。

cards.name: G.E.L.F.
cards.text: Power 0 - Talent: Search your deck for a non-G.E.L.F. minion of power 4 or less. Shuffle this minion into your deck and play that minion here as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 天赋：在你的牌组中搜索非 G.E.L.F.力量为 4 或以下的随从。将这个随从洗入你的牌库，然后将其作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Mimic
cards.text: Power 0 - Ongoing: This minion’s power is equal to the highest power printed on a minion card in play.
clarifications: Mimic’s starting power equals the highest printed power in play, but it can then be modified by abilities or +1 power counters. If the highest printed power in play changes, so does the starting power of Mimic. While in your hand or deck Mimic’s power is 0; it can be played by G.E.L.F., “...Really?” and Transmogrify.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 持续：该随从的力量等于场上随从卡上打印的最高力量。
clarificationsZh: 宝箱怪的起始力量等于游戏中印刷的最高力量，但可以通过能力或+1力量指示物进行修改。如果比赛中打印的最高功率发生变化，Mimic 的起始功率也会发生变化。当宝箱怪在你的手牌或牌组中时，其力量为 0；可以由 G.E.L.F. 演奏，“……真的吗？”和变形。

cards.name: Copycat
cards.text: Power 2 - Choose another player’s minion in play. This card has the same ability as that minion until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This can copy any type of ability (on-play, Ongoing, Special, Talent), though not every ability will trigger before the end of the turn. Being immune to effects (e.g., Elder Thing) does not prevent copying. The copied ability expires if the Copycat leaves play before the end of the turn. Copying a minion’s ability does not copy its name (e.g., copying War Raptor lets it increase power for other War Raptors but not for itself). Ignore prerequisites for playing (e.g., Shoggoth) since the Copycat is already in play. If the copied ability imposes conditions that last beyond the end of the turn (e.g., Mind Lady, Bruiser), then treat the effect the same way that you would if the original card were to leave play before its effects ended.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 选择另一个玩家的随从。直到回合结束为止，这张卡具有与该随从相同的能力。
clarificationsZh: 这可以复制任何类型的能力（进行中、持续、特殊、天赋），但并非所有能力都会在回合结束前触发。免疫效果（例如，老东西）并不能阻止复制。如果模仿者在回合结束前离场，则复制的能力就会失效。复制随从的能力并不会复制其名称（例如，复制战猛龙可以增加其他战猛龙的力量，但不能增加其自身的力量）。忽略玩游戏的先决条件（例如 Shoggoth），因为模仿者已经在玩了。如果复制的异能施加了持续到回合结束后的条件（例如，Mind Lady、Bruiser），则按照原始卡牌在其效果结束前离开游戏的方式处理该效果。

cards.name: "...Really?"
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Play an extra minion from your discard pile with the same or lower power.
clarifications: You can destroy a minion and immediately play it from the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一名随从。从你的弃牌堆中额外打出一个具有相同或更低力量的随从。
clarificationsZh: 你可以消灭一个随从并立即从弃牌堆中使用它。

cards.name: Bacta the Future
cards.text: Destroy a minion. That minion’s owner may immediately play an extra minion.
clarifications: If the minion you choose to destroy is protected, you still resolve the rest of the ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个小兵。该随从的主人可以立即扮演一个额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 如果你选择消灭的随从受到保护，你仍然可以结算该异能的其余部分。

cards.name: Cellular Bonding
cards.text: Play on a minion. Choose an action on a minion. Ongoing: This card has the abilities of the chosen action.
clarifications: The copied ability continues as long as Cellular Bonding is in play, even if the action being copied leaves play. If you play Cellular Bonding while there is no play-on-minion action in play, discard it with no effect. You may play this card on another player’s minion and copy an ability that says “Play on your minion” or “Play on one of your minions”; ignore that part unless it is a prerequisite (e.g., Change Into a Gun), in which case the prerequisite is not met.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。选择对随从采取的行动。持续：这张卡具有所选行动的能力。
clarificationsZh: 只要细胞结合仍在进行中，复制的能力就会持续存在，即使被复制的动作离开游戏也是如此。如果你在场上没有对小兵进行对战动作时使用细胞联结，则将其丢弃，不会产生任何效果。你可以对其他玩家的随从使用这张牌，并复制一个写着“对你的随从使用”或“对你的一个随从使用”的异能；忽略该部分，除非它是先决条件（例如，变成一把枪），在这种情况下，不满足先决条件。

cards.name: Genetic Shift
cards.text: Each of your minions gets +1 power until the end of the turn OR one of your minions gets +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The first part of this ability only affects minions currently in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束，或者你的一个随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 该能力的第一部分仅影响当前在场的小兵。

cards.name: Mitosis
cards.text: Choose your minion in play. Play a copy of that card from your hand as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在游戏中选择你的随从。从你的手中打出该卡的副本作为额外的随从。

cards.name: Shell Game
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从无法被消灭。

cards.name: Splice as Nice
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。

cards.name: Transmogrify
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Search your deck for a minion with the same or lower power and play it as an extra minion. Shuffle your deck.
clarifications: If the minion you choose to destroy is protected, you still resolve the rest of the ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一名随从。在你的牌组中搜索具有相同或更低力量的随从，并将其作为额外随从使用。洗牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果你选择消灭的随从受到保护，你仍然可以结算该异能的其余部分。

mechanicsZh: 从你的牌组中扮演小兵

cards.name: Megalodon
cards.text: Power 5 - You may destroy a minion of power 4 or less here. Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion here of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以在这里消灭一个力量为 4 或更少的随从。特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以消灭此处力量为 3 或以下的随从。

cards.name: Great White
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base and destroy a minion there of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将此随从移动到另一个基地并消灭那里力量为 2 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Hammerhead
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After a minion here is destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: If several minions at its base are destroyed at once, it gets a power counter for each one.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：此处的随从被消灭后，在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 如果其基地的多个小兵同时被摧毁，则每个小兵都会获得一个能量指示物。

cards.name: Mako
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After you destroy a minion on any base, you may play this minion there as an extra minion.
clarifications: If you draw Mako because of Torn Apart, you may also play it immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：当你摧毁任何基地的一个随从后，你可以在那里扮演这个随从作为额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 如果你因为《Torn Apart》而抽到了 Mako，你也可以立即玩它。

cards.name: Air Jaws
