cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base, then destroy a minion there of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从移动到另一个基地，然后消灭那里的一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Blood in the Water
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is destroyed here, you may play a minion here of power 3 or less as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Blood in the Water 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：在这里消灭一个随从后，你可以在这里扮演一个力量为3或更少的随从作为额外的随从。

cards.name: Chum
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: After a minion is destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: The minion destroyed can be at any base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：消灭一个随从后，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 被摧毁的小兵可以在任何基地。

cards.name: Dangerous Waters
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Choose a minion here. It gets -2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在这里选择一个随从。它获得-2力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Feeding Frenzy
cards.text: Choose a base. Destroy any number of minions there of power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。消灭那里任意数量的力量为 2 或更少的小兵。

cards.name: Freakin' Laser Beam
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy a minion with equal or lower power at your minion’s base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。在你的随从基地消灭一个具有同等或更低力量的随从。

cards.name: Torn Apart
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 3 or less and draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的随从并抓一张牌。

cards.name: Week of Sharks
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, draw an extra card at the end of your turn. Only use one Week of Sharks ability each turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果你这里有随从，则在你的回合结束时额外抓一张牌。每回合仅使用一周鲨鱼技能。

cards.name: Helicoprion
cards.text: Special: While this titan is not in play, at the start of your turn or after any minion is destroyed, place a counter on this titan. Then if there are four or more counters on it, you may remove the counters and play it. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you destroy any player's minion, you may either move this titan to the minion's base and add its power to your total there until the end of the turn, or place a +1 power counter on this titan. Talent: Shuffle a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile into your deck, OR search your deck and/or discard pile for a Mako and place it into your hand.
cards.textZh: 特殊：当这个泰坦不在场上时，在你的回合开始时或任何随从被消灭后，在这个泰坦上放置一个指示物。然后，如果上面有四个或更多指示物，您可以移除指示物并玩它。持续：每回合一次，在你消灭任何玩家的随从后，你可以将该泰坦移动到该随从的基地并将其力量添加到你的总力量中，直到回合结束，或者在该泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：将一个力量为 3 或更少的随从从你的弃牌堆中洗入你的牌库，或者在你的牌库和/或弃牌堆中搜索灰鲭鲨并将其放入你的手上。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Little Bo Peep
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Other players can not move minions to or from here. Talent: Move one of your minions to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 持续：其他玩家无法将小兵移入或移出此处。天赋：将你的一名随从移到这里。

cards.name: Ram
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base, then you may return a minion of power 2 or less at that base to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将该随从移动到另一个基地，然后你可以将该基地的一个力量为 2 或以下的随从移回其拥有者手上。

cards.name: Black Sheep
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After another minion is played here, move this minion to another base.
clarifications: Black Sheep’s ability has it moved by its controller, so Little Bo Peep does not block the ability unless they have different controllers. It is also not blocked by cards like Incorporeal
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 持续：在此处打出另一个随从后，将该随从移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 黑羊的技能是由其控制器移动的，因此小波比不会阻止该技能，除非他们有不同的控制器。它也不会被无形体之类的卡牌阻挡

cards.name: Flock
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, move this minion to there as well.
clarifications: This cannot follow minions that move after a base scores.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 持续：在另一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地后，将该随从也移动到那里。
clarificationsZh: 它不能跟随在基地计分后移动的小兵。

cards.name: Counting Sheep
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, your minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (once per turn added) - errata'd in the Bigger Geekier Box
clarifications: The other player’s minion does not have to be at Counting Sheep’s base to trigger it. This card does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：每回合一次，在其他玩家的随从力量增加后，你的随从获得+1力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 其他玩家的随从不必在数羊的基地才能触发它。这张牌不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Ewe Shall Pass
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base. Draw a card. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从转移到另一个基地。画一张卡片。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Hello, Dolly!
cards.text: Special: Play after another player plays an action. Copy the ability of that action.
clarifications: This acts as if the ability of the action being copied were printed on it. If it copies an action that is played on a minion or a base, it is also played on a minion or base, and not necessarily the same one. Hello, Dolly! can copy actions that have conditions for being played (e.g. Make Contact, Cosplay) without having to fulfill those conditions; it has its own conditions for being played, so the other card’s conditions are moot.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在另一位玩家执行一个动作后进行。复制该动作的能力。
clarificationsZh: 这就像被复制的动作的能力被印在上面一样。如果它复制了在小兵或基地上进行的动作，那么它也会在小兵或基地上进行，但不一定是同一个。你好，多莉！可以复制有播放条件的动作（例如接触、角色扮演），而无需满足这些条件；它有自己的使用条件，因此其他卡的条件没有意义。

cards.name: In Sheep's Clothing
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, you may move this minion to there as well and destroy this action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。正在进行：当另一个随从从这里移动到另一个基地后，你也可以将这个随从移动到那里并摧毁这个行动。

cards.name: On the Lamb
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion, and another player. Move that minion and all of that player’s minions there to a single other base.
clarifications: You may choose a player with no minions there and move “all” those minions, even if someone else does have minions there. All the minions go to the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有一个随从和另一个玩家的基地。将该随从和该玩家的所有随从移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 你可以选择一个没有小兵的玩家并移动“所有”这些小兵，即使其他人那里确实有小兵。所有的小兵都去同一个基地。

cards.name: Shearing
cards.text: Play on a minion. Draw a card. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. At the start of your turn, return this action to your hand.
clarifications: If Shearing leaves play before the start of your next turn, you do not return it to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。画一张卡片。进行中：该随从的力量为-2。在你的回合开始时，将此动作移回你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 如果剪切在你的下一回合开始之前离开游戏，你不会将其返回你的手上。

cards.name: To Follow, or Not?
cards.text: Choose another player. Choose a random action in their discard pile. Play it as an extra action or return it. Draw a card.
clarifications: If you play another player’s card, you control it and its ability is carried out from your point of view; when it leaves play it goes back to the owner’s hand, deck, or discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: To Follow, or Not? 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择另一位玩家。在他们的弃牌堆中选择一个随机动作。将其作为额外动作播放或将其退回。画一张卡片。
clarificationsZh: 如果你打出其他玩家的牌，你可以控制它，并且它的能力是从你的角度来看的；当它离开游戏时，它会回到拥有者的手牌、牌库或弃牌堆。

cards.name: Wood for Sheep
cards.text: Choose another player. Reveal a random card from their hand. You may place a card from your hand into their hand to play the revealed card. Otherwise return it and play an extra action.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (gain an extra action if you do not play the card)
clarifications: If you play another player’s card, you control it and its ability is carried out from your point of view; when it leaves play it goes back to the owner’s hand, deck, or discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择另一位玩家。从他们手中随机展示一张牌。您可以将您手中的一张牌放入他们的手中以打出亮出的牌。否则返回并执行额外操作。
clarificationsZh: 如果你打出其他玩家的牌，你可以控制它，并且它的能力是从你的角度来看的；当它离开游戏时，它会回到拥有者的手牌、牌库或弃牌堆。

cards.name: Doctor Octopus
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, you may reduce this base’s breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 4 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，你可以将该基地的断点减少4，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Mysterio
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Play a base modifier here as an extra action OR draw a card.
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在这里发挥基本修正作为额外动作或抓一张牌。

cards.name: Green Goblin
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Reduce this base’s breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: power 3 - 天赋：将该基地的断点减少 3 点，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Vulture
cards.text: power 3 - You may place a base modifier from your discard pile on top of your deck.
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 您可以将弃牌堆中的基础修饰符放在牌组顶部。

cards.name: Electro
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is reduced by 2.
cards.textZh: power 2 - 持续：该基地的断点减少 2。

cards.name: Sandman
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This character has +2 power if the breakpoint here is 19 or less.
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：如果此处的断点为 19 或更少，则该角色的力量为 +2。

cards.name: Ambush
cards.text: Reduce a base’s breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 将基地的断点减少 4 点，直至回合结束。

cards.name: Cover the Exits
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here have +1 power. After this base scores, if its breakpoint was 19 or less, shuffle up to two of your characters here into their owners’ deck.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：你的角色拥有+1力量。在此基地计分后，如果其断点为 19 或更少，则将最多两个角色洗入其所有者的套牌中。

cards.name: Incite Panic
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Other players’ characters here have -1 power. If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, other players cannot use Special abilities while this base is scoring.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：这里的其他玩家角色的力量为-1。如果此处的断点为 19 或更少，则在该基地计分时其他玩家无法使用特殊能力。

cards.name: Move the Goods
cards.text: Move a base modifier from one base to another. Special: You may play this after a base scores.
cards.textZh: 将基础修改器从一个基础移动到另一个基础。特别：您可以在基地计分后玩此游戏。

cards.name: My Master Plan
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, draw a card.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：如果这里的断点是19或更少，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Pressure from All Sides
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Reduce this base’s breakpoint by 1 for each character on it until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：每有一个角色，该基地的断点就会减少1点，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Reroute the Power
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, give one of your characters here +3 power until the start of your next turn.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：如果这里的断点是19或更少，则给你的一个角色+3力量，直到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Witness Our Superiority
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: This base’s abilities are cancelled.
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：该基地的能力被取消。

cards.name: Lord of Bones
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another minion is uncovered, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Talent: Bury a card from your hand here or uncover one of your buried cards here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在发现另一个随从后，你可以在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：将你手上的一张牌埋在这里，或者在这里揭开你埋藏的一张牌。

cards.name: Gravetender
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after one of your other cards is buried or uncovered, draw a card
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，在你的一张其他牌被掩埋或揭开后，抓一张牌

cards.name: Revenant
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: On your turn, you may bury this card from your discard pile. Use only one Revenant ability per turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 特殊：在你的回合中，你可以将这张牌从你的弃牌堆中埋起来。每回合仅使用一个亡灵技能。

cards.name: Returned One
cards.text: Power 2 - You may bury this minion here. Special: After this card is uncovered, you may uncover another one of your buried cards here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以把这个随从埋在这里。特别：这张牌被揭开后，你可以揭开另一张你埋藏在这里的牌。

cards.name: Burst Forth
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, uncover one of your buried cards there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前，揭开其中一张埋藏的牌。

cards.name: Dig 'em Up
cards.text: Choose a base. Uncover up to three of your buried cards there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。在那里揭开最多三张埋藏的牌。

cards.name: Grave Goods
cards.text: Bury a card from your hand, and you may discard a card to bury another one; OR uncover one of your buried cards, and if it is a minion, place two +1 power counters on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 埋葬你手上的一张牌，你可以弃掉一张牌来埋葬另一张牌；或者揭开你埋藏的一张牌，如果它是随从，则在其上放置两个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Gravestones
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is uncovered here, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Special: After this base scores, bury this card on another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：在这里发现一个随从后，你可以在它上面放置一个+1力量指示物。特殊：在此基地计分后，将这张卡埋在另一个基地上。

cards.name: Graveyard
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Uncover one of your buried cards here. If it is a minion, you may place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在这里揭开你埋藏的一张牌。如果它是一个随从，你可以在它上面放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Hearse Fleet
cards.text: Move any number of your buried cards from one base to another. Special: You may play this card before a base scores to move up to two of your buried cards to or from that base instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的埋藏卡牌从一个基地移动到另一个基地。特殊：你可以在基地计分前打出这张牌，以将最多两张埋藏的牌移入或移出该基地。

cards.name: Place 'em Down
cards.text: Bury up to three minions from your discard pile with total power of 6 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中埋葬最多 3 个总力量不超过 6 的小兵。

cards.name: Spooky, Scary
cards.text: Bury a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile. Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中埋葬一个力量为 3 或更少的随从。画一张卡片。

factions.name: Slashers

cards.name: Jonas
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Machete from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after this minion moves, you may destroy a minion of power 3 or less there to give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以从牌库或弃牌堆中抽出弯刀。持续：每回合一次，在该随从移动后，你可以消灭那里的一个力量为3或更少的随从，使该随从获得+2力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Frederick
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Clawed Glove from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions here have -1 power. You may destroy a minion of power 1 or less here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以从你的牌库或弃牌堆中抽出利爪手套。天赋：直到你的下一个回合开始之前，这里其他玩家的随从拥有-1力量。你可以在这里消灭一个力量为 1 或更少的随从。

cards.name: Mickey
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Austin Kirk Mask from your deck or discard pile. Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion of printed power 3 or less here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以从你的牌库或弃牌堆中抽取奥斯汀·柯克·面具。特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以在这里消灭一个印制力量为3或更少的随从。

cards.name: Tackhead
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Puzzle Box from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Transfer one of your actions to another minion OR destroy a minion with Puzzle Box on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以从你的牌库或弃牌堆中抽取拼图盒。天赋：将你的一个行动转移到另一个小兵身上，或者摧毁一个带有拼图盒的小兵。

cards.name: Cederface
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Chainsaw from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this minion, you may destroy a minion here of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 你可以从牌库或弃牌堆中抽出电锯。持续：每回合一次，在你在该随从上放置+1力量指示物后，你可以消灭这里力量为3或以下的随从。

cards.name: Brutal Attack
cards.text: Destroy a minion with printed power 3 or less at a base with one of your minions, then you may give a Slasher there +3 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 用你的一个随从在基地消灭一个印有 3 或以下力量的随从，然后你可以给那里的一名 Slasher +3 力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Ch-Ch-Ch Ha-Ha-Ha
cards.text: Move one of your minions. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile OR play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 移动你的一名随从。你可以将这张卡放在你的牌库顶部而不是弃牌堆上，或者执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: He Was A Good Boy!
cards.text: Place a minion from the discard pile into your hand and play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: He Was A Good Boy! 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个随从放入你的手牌并执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Hide in the Laundry
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Play an extra action. Ongoing: After a Slasher is played or moved to here, you may destroy this minion unless its controller discards a card and moves this minion to a base without a Slasher.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Hide in the Laundry 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 玩另一个玩家的随从。进行一个额外的动作。进行中：在使用 Slasher 或将其移至此处后，你可以消灭该随从，除非其操控者弃掉一张牌并将该随从移至没有 Slasher 的基地。

cards.name: Improvised Weapon
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. You may play it as an extra action; destroy it at the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的套牌中抽取一个对小兵进行游戏的动作。您可以将其作为额外动作来玩；在回合结束时消灭它。

cards.name: Oh Noooooo!
cards.text: One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: After you destroy another player’s minion, you may play this card as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。特殊：当你消灭另一个玩家的随从后，你可以以额外动作打出这张牌。

cards.name: Origin Story
cards.text: Draw a minion off the top of your deck, or if you do not have a Slasher in play, draw a Slasher off the top of your deck. Play an extra action.
clarifications: You only get the first version of the effect if you have a Slasher in play - if you do not have a Slasher in play, you must draw a Slasher specifically off the top of your deck (not a minion of any faction).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的牌组顶部抽出一个随从，或者如果你场上没有切割者，则从你的牌组顶部抽出一个切割者。进行一个额外的动作。
clarificationsZh: 如果你在场上有斩击者，你只会获得该效果的第一个版本 - 如果你在场上没有斩击者，你必须从你的牌组顶部专门抽出一个斩击者（不是任何派系的随从）。

cards.name: The End?
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your discard pile. You may play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中抽取一个对小兵进行游戏的动作。您可以将其作为额外动作来玩。

cards.name: Austin Kirk Mask
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, give this minion the amount of power of one of those minions until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。持续：当这里的一个或多个随从被消灭后，给予该随从其中一个随从的力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Chainsaw
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place a +1 power counter on this minion. After a minion is destroyed, you may move this minion to or from its base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。持续：在你的回合开始时，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。当一个随从被摧毁后，你可以将该随从移入或移出其基地。

cards.name: Clawed Glove
cards.text: Play on your minion. Talent: Give a minion here -1 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。天赋：给予这里的一个随从 -1 力量，直到你的下一回合开始。进行中：当这里的一个或多个随从被消灭后，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Machete
cards.text: Play on your minion. Talent: Move this minion to a base with another player’s minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, your minions here each gain +1 power until the end of the turn. At the end of the turn, if this minion destroyed a minion this turn, return this card to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。天赋：将此随从移动到与其他玩家的随从一起的基地。持续：当这里的一个或多个随从被消灭后，你这里的每个随从获得+1力量，直到回合结束。回合结束时，如果该随从本回合消灭了一个随从，则这张卡返回你的手牌。

cards.name: Puzzle Box
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: If you do not control this minion, its abilities are cancelled. After one or more minions are destroyed, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的随从。进行中：如果你不控制这个随从，它的能力就会被取消。当一个或多个随从被消灭后，抓一张牌。

mechanicsZh: 五个独特的 Power-5 小兵
搜索独特的小黄人游戏动作

cards.name: King Rex
cards.text: Power 7 - (no ability)
clarifications: The ability is deliberately blank. (What, do you think King Rex isn't strong enough already?)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 7 - （无能力）
clarificationsZh: 能力故意留白。 （怎么，你觉得雷克斯王还不够强大吗？）

cards.name: Granny
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Look at the top card of your deck. Place it on the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：查看你牌库顶牌。将其放在牌组的顶部或底部。

cards.name: G.E.L.F.
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Search your deck for a non-G.E.L.F. minion of power 4 or less. Shuffle this minion into your deck and play that minion here as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：在你的牌组中搜索非 G.E.L.F.力量为 4 或以下的随从。将这个随从洗入你的牌库，然后将其作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Imperial Dragon
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After another player plays or moves a minion here, draw a card.
clarifications: This triggers when a minion moves to here, not from here. Moving this minion activates it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：当另一位玩家在这里打出或移动一个随从后，抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 当小兵移动到此处（而不是从此处移动）时会触发此操作。移动这个随从就会激活它。

cards.name: Lab Assistant
cards.text: Power 3 - Place a +1 power counter on another one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 在你的另一名随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Puck
cards.text: Power 3 - Play an extra action OR draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 进行额外动作或抽一张牌。

cards.name: Ensign
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: When an opponent plays a card that directly affects one of your other minions here, you may have it affect this minion instead.
clarifications: It can take on ongoing or special effects, but not from cards already in play. It can take on multiple effects if it makes sense (e.g. multiple -1 power, but not multiple destroys unless it’s immune). It can have an action played on a different minion played on itself instead. It can substitute for a different minion being taken control of. It cannot take an effect already taken by a different Ensign from a third minion. It can take an effect even if it does not fit the original target’s prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当对手打出一张直接影响你的其他随从的牌时，你可以让它影响这个随从。
clarificationsZh: 它可以产生持续的或特殊的效果，但不能来自已经在场的牌。如果有意义的话，它可以产生多种效果（例如，多次-1力量，但不能多次破坏，除非它免疫）。它可以对不同的随从执行一个动作，而不是对自己执行一个动作。它可以替代被控制的不同随从。它不能取得第三个随从的其他少尉已经取得的效果。即使不符合原始目标的先决条件（例如“力量 3 或更高”），它也可以产生效果。

cards.name: Fan
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn, you may discard this card from your hand to draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：在你的回合中，你可以将这张卡从手上弃掉以抽一张牌。

cards.name: Servitor of Cthulhu
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Destroy this minion and place an action card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
clarifications: If your attempt to destroy this card fails because it is protected from destruction, you still place the action card. Destroying a Servitor on R’lyeh counts either for the Servitor’s ability (during the Play Cards phase, to place an action card) or for R’lyeh’s ability (at the start of the turn, to earn 1VP), but not both.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：消灭这个随从，并将弃牌堆中的一张行动卡放到你的牌库顶部。
clarificationsZh: 如果你尝试摧毁这张卡失败，因为它受到保护免遭破坏，你仍然放置行动卡。摧毁拉莱耶上的仆从，要么计入仆役的能力（在打牌阶段，放置一张行动卡），要么计入拉莱耶的能力（在回合开始时，获得 1VP），但不能同时计入两者。

cards.name: Sprout
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Destroy this card at the start of your turn. You may search your deck for a minion of power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Reversion (reverted to original version from Bigger Geekier Box errata)
clarifications: A Sprout may not destroy itself the same turn it is played.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在你的回合开始时消灭这张卡。你可以在你的牌组中搜索力量为 3 或以下的随从，将其作为额外的随从在这里使用，然后洗牌你的牌组。
clarificationsZh: 新芽可能不会在玩的同一回合中毁灭自己。

cards.name: Begin the Summoning
cards.text: TBA
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 待定

cards.name: Favor of Dionysus
cards.text: One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Play an extra action. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。进行一个额外的动作。你可以将这张卡放在你的牌库顶部而不是弃牌堆上。

cards.name: Friendship Power
cards.text: Move one of your minions to a base where you have a minion. You may place this action into your hand instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一个随从移动到你有随从的基地。你可以将此动作放入你的手牌而不是弃牌堆中。

cards.name: Full Moon
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Each of your minions here has +1 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的每个随从都有+1力量。

cards.name: Ghostly Arrival
cards.text: You may play an extra minion and/or an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你可以扮演一个额外的随从和/或一个额外的动作。

cards.name: It's Astounding
cards.text: Play an action from your discard pile as an extra action.
clarifications: Play the extra action immediately, before discarding It’s Astounding.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中执行一个动作作为额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 在丢弃 It's Astounding 之前立即进行额外动作。

cards.name: Non-Infinite Loop
cards.text: Play an extra standard action, then you may place it back into your hand instead of where it would normally go.
clarifications: The extra action must be played at once. If you choose an action whose conditions for play are not met (e.g., Cosplay, Force of Wil), it has no effect and you just return it to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 执行一个额外的标准动作，然后您可以将其放回您的手上，而不是通常放置的位置。
clarificationsZh: 额外动作必须立即进行。如果你选择的动作不满足使用条件（例如角色扮演、威尔之力），则它没有任何效果，你只需将其返回到你的手上。

cards.name: Prepare for Battle
cards.text: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Draw two of them and return the other to the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的三张牌。抽出其中两张，并将另一张放回牌组的顶部或底部。

cards.name: Seeing Stars
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 3 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的随从。

cards.name: Square Deal
cards.text: Draw cards until at least one player has fewer cards in their hand than you.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓牌，直到至少一名玩家手中的牌比你少。

cards.name: Spider-Man
cards.text: power 5 - Ongoing: After you play a card that has a Special ability, this character gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：当你打出一张具有特殊能力的牌后，该角色的力量获得 +1 直到回合结束。

cards.name: Ghost-Spider
cards.text: power 4 - Look at the top three cards of your deck, draw one, and return the rest to the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 查看牌组顶三张牌，抽一张，然后将其余牌按任意顺序放回牌组顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: Miles Morales
cards.text: power 3 - Special: Before a base scores, if you have a character there, you may play this character there, and give it -1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: power 3 - 特殊：在基地计分前，如果你在那里有一个角色，你可以在那里扮演这个角色，并给予它-1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Spider-Man 2099
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This character cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：该角色不能被其他玩家的牌摧毁。

cards.name: ...Comes Great Responsibility
cards.text: Play an extra character. Special: You may play this before a base scores where you have a character. Play the extra character there. It gains -1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 扮演一个额外的角色。特别：您可以在拥有角色的基地计分前玩此游戏。在那里扮演额外的角色。它获得-1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Spider-Sense
cards.text: Draw two cards. Special: You may play this after a base where you have a character scores.
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。特别：您可以在有角色的基地计分后玩此游戏。

cards.name: Spider-Verse Bond
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +1 power for each of your other characters here.
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：此角色对这里的其他每个角色都有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Spider Reflexes
cards.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck, draw one, and return the rest to the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. You may play an extra action.
cards.textZh: 查看牌组顶三张牌，抽一张，然后将其余牌按任意顺序放回牌组顶部和/或底部。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: The View From Above
cards.text: Say either “character” or “action”. Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a card of that type, and draw it. Shuffle the rest into your deck.
cards.textZh: 说“角色”或“行动”。从你的牌库顶展示牌，直到你展示一张该类型的牌，然后抽出它。将其余的洗入你的套牌中。

cards.name: Webbed Up
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has -2 power and its abilities are cancelled.
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：该角色的力量为-2，其能力被取消。

cards.name: With Great Power...
cards.text: Give a character +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: You may play this before a base scores. Give a character there +2 power until the end of the turn instead of +3.
cards.textZh: 给予角色+3力量直到回合结束。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。给那里的角色+2力量直到回合结束而不是+3。

cards.name: Your Friendly Neighborhood Hero
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, place one of your characters there on top of its owner’s deck.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分后，将你的一个角色放置在其所有者的牌组顶部。

factions.name: Star Roamers
mechanics: Returning Your Minions To Your Hand

cards.name: Ship's Captain
cards.text: Power 5 - Search your deck for a minion, reveal it, add it to your hand and shuffle your deck. If it has power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 在你的牌库中搜索一个随从，展示它，将其添加到你的手上，然后洗牌。如果它的力量为 3 或更少，则在这里将其作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Medical Officer
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: When one or more of your other minions would be returned to your hand, you may draw a card instead of returning one of them.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当你的一个或多个其他随从返回你的手牌时，你可以抓一张牌而不是返回其中一个。

cards.name: Science Officer
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Return one of your minions of power 4 or less to its owner’s hand. Play an extra minion with a different name.
clarifications: You can return a minion you control but don’t own, and still do the rest of the ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将你的一名力量为 4 或以下的随从移回其拥有者手上。扮演一个具有不同名字的额外随从。
clarificationsZh: 你可以归还一个你控制但不拥有的随从，并且仍然执行其余的能力。

cards.name: Ship's Engineer
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If another one of your minions would be returned to your hand, you may move it to another base instead.
clarifications: These don’t trigger if you return a minion you don’t own, since it doesn’t go to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果你的另一个随从将被返回到你的手上，你可以将其移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 如果你归还一个不属于你的随从，这些就不会触发，因为它不会到达你的手上。

cards.name: Ensign
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: When an opponent plays a card that directly affects one of your other minions here, you may have it affect this minion instead.
clarifications: It can take on ongoing or special effects, but not from cards already in play. It can take on multiple effects if it makes sense (e.g. multiple -1 power, but not multiple destroys unless it’s immune). It can have an action played on a different minion played on itself instead. It can substitute for a different minion being taken control of. It cannot take an effect already taken by a different Ensign from a third minion. It can take an effect even if it does not fit the original target’s prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当对手打出一张直接影响你的其他随从的牌时，你可以让它影响这个随从。
clarificationsZh: 它可以产生持续的或特殊的效果，但不能来自已经在场的牌。如果有意义的话，它可以产生多种效果（例如，多次-1力量，但不能多次破坏，除非它免疫）。它可以对不同的随从执行一个动作，而不是对自己执行一个动作。它可以替代被控制的不同随从。它不能取得第三个随从的其他少尉已经取得的效果。即使不符合原始目标的先决条件（例如“力量 3 或更高”），它也可以产生效果。

cards.name: Hyperspeed 10
cards.text: Choose a base. Move all minions from there to a single other base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将所有小兵从那里转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Mass Teleport
cards.text: Each player returns one of their minions to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 每个玩家将他们的一个随从返回其所有者的手上。

cards.name: Port Me Up
cards.text: Return one of your minions to its owner’s hand. Special: You may play this after a base scores; the minion must be on the scoring base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一名随从移回其主人手上。特别：打完基地计分后即可玩；小兵必须在计分基地上。

cards.name: Protector Fields
cards.text: Play on a base where you have a minion. Ongoing: Your minions here are not affected by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你有随从的基地上玩。进行中：你的随从不会受到其他玩家卡牌的影响。

cards.name: Teleport Error
cards.text: Choose a minion. Move it to another random base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。将其移动到另一个随机基地。

cards.name: Teleport Overflow
cards.text: Return one of your minions to its owner’s hand. Reveal any number of minions with the same name from your hand, and play them as extra minions.
clarifications: You can return a minion you control but don’t own, and still do the rest of the ability.
The minions don’t have to have the same name as the returned minion, but have the same name as each other. A single minion counts as a group with the same name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一名随从移回其主人手上。从你的手牌中展示任意数量的同名随从，并将它们作为额外的随从使用。
clarificationsZh: 你可以归还一个你控制但不拥有的随从，并且仍然执行其余的能力。
Minion 不必与返回的 Minion 具有相同的名称，但彼此具有相同的名称。单个 Minion 算作具有相同名称的一组。

cards.name: Weird New Worlds
cards.text: Play a new base. You may play an extra minion on it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer a "play on base" action and the extra base is now permanent)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打新基地。你可以在上面扮演一个额外的随从。

cards.name: Whiplash Maneuver
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If any of your minions on other bases would be returned to your hand, you may move them here instead.
clarifications: These don’t trigger if you return a minion you don’t own, since it doesn’t go to your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果你在其他基地的任何随从将被返回到你的手上，你可以将它们移到这里。
clarificationsZh: 如果你归还一个不属于你的随从，这些就不会触发，因为它不会到达你的手上。

mechanicsZh: 将你的随从移回你的手上

factions.name: Steampunks
mechanics: Minions and Actions Support Each Other

cards.name: Steam Queen
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Your actions are not affected by other players’ cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：你的行动不受其他玩家牌的影响。

cards.name: Mechanic
cards.text: Power4 - Choose an action in your discard pile that can be played on a base and play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power4 - 在你的弃牌堆中选择一个可以在基地上进行的动作，并将其作为额外动作进行。

cards.name: Steam Man
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Has +1 power if this base has one of your actions played on it.
clarifications: This triggers if you have more than one action on its base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果该基地上有你的一项行动，则拥有 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 如果您对其基地有多个操作，则会触发此操作。

cards.name: Captain Ahab
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Move this minion to a base that has one of your actions played on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：将此随从移至已执行过你的一项行动的基地。

cards.name: Aggromotive
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, you have +5 power here.
clarifications: The +5 power is not added to any minion, but just adds to your total there, during every player’s turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果你在这里有一个随从，你在这里就有+5力量。
clarificationsZh: +5 力量不会添加到任何随从身上，而只会在每个玩家的回合中添加到你的总数中。

cards.name: Change of Venue
cards.text: Place one of your actions that is on a base or minion into your hand. Play it again as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你对基地或随从的行动之一置入你的手上。作为额外动作再次播放。

cards.name: Difference Engine
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, draw an extra card at the end of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果你这里有随从，则在你的回合结束时额外抓一张牌。

cards.name: Escape Hatch
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: When your minions here are destroyed, return them to your hand instead.
clarifications: Minions placed into your hand do not count as being destroyed (c.f. Field of Honor).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你的随从被消灭时，将它们返回你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 放入你手上的小兵不算被消灭（参见《荣誉战场》）。

cards.name: Ornate Dome
cards.text: Play on a base. Destroy all other players’ actions on this base. Ongoing: Other players cannot play actions on this base.
clarifications: This does not affect actions on minions, nor prevent such actions from being played. This does not block actions that target a base but are not played on it (e.g., Rampage, Disenchant).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。摧毁该基地上所有其他玩家的行动。进行中：其他玩家无法在此基地上进行行动。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响对小兵的动作，也不会阻止执行此类动作。这不会阻止以基地为目标但未在其上进行的动作（例如，狂暴、分解）。

cards.name: Rotary Slug Thrower
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here each have +2 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从都有+2力量。

cards.name: Scrap Diving
cards.text: Place an action from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一个动作放入你的手上。

cards.name: Zeppelin
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Move one of your minions from another base to here, or from here to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将你的一个随从从另一个基地移到这里，或者从这里移到另一个基地。

mechanicsZh: 小黄人和行动互相支持

cards.name: Yokozuna
cards.text: Power 6 - Ongoing: Your minions cannot be moved by other players’ cards. Talent: Draw a card, OR move another player’s minion from here to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 持续：你的随从不能被其他玩家的牌移动。天赋：抓一张牌，或者将另一个玩家的随从从这里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Top Tier
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After you discard one or more cards from your hand, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: If an ability has you discard several cards (e.g.Bulking Stew), you only place one +1 power counter.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：当你从手上弃掉一张或多张牌后，在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 如果某项能力让你弃掉多张牌（例如大块炖肉），你只能放置一个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Third Tier
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move another player’s minion with power 3 or less from here to another base to draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以将其他玩家的力量为 3 或以下的随从从这里移动到另一个基地来抓一张牌。

cards.name: Rookie Sumo
cards.text: Power 2 - You may discard a card to place two +1 power counters on one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以弃掉一张牌，在你的一个随从身上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Body Slam
cards.text: Choose another player and a base where you have a minion. Move all of their minions there to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择另一个玩家和一个你有随从的基地。将他们所有的爪牙转移到另一个基地。

cards.name: Bulking Stew
cards.text: Discard any number of cards. For each card discarded, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量的卡片。每丢弃一张牌，在你的一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Chikara-Mizu
cards.text: Give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn, or discard a card to give it +4 power instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 给予你的一个随从 +2 力量直至回合结束，或者弃掉一张牌以给予其 +4 力量。

cards.name: Fighting Spirit Prize
cards.text: Draw two cards and place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
clarifications: You place either two +1 power counters on a single minion, or one power counter each on two minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓两张牌并在你的随从身上放置两个总计+1力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 你可以在一个小兵上放置两个+1能量指示物，或者在两个小兵上各放置一个能量指示物。

cards.name: Grasp the Belt
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Move a minion from there to another base.
clarifications: You may choose to move a minion you control, even if it’s your only minion on the base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有随从的基地。将一个随从从那里移动到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 你可以选择移动你控制的一个随从，即使它是你在基地上唯一的随从。

cards.name: Head Butt
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Destroy another player’s action that has been played there or on a minion there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个你有随从的基地。摧毁其他玩家已经在该处或在该处的小兵上执行的动作。

cards.name: Performance Prize
cards.text: Draw three cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽三张牌。

cards.name: Technique Prize
cards.text: Place three +1 power counters on one of your minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的一名随从身上放置三个+1力量指示物。

factions.name: Super Heroes
mechanics: Powering Up Into Power 5 Alter Egos
Minions With Very Low Power Or Very High Power

cards.name: Awesome Guy
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other players' cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：你的随从不能被其他玩家的牌摧毁。

cards.name: Captain Amazing
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Give each of your minions here +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this talent is used.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：给予你的每个随从 +1 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响使用该天赋后所打出的随从。

cards.name: Mind Lady
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Choose another player’s minion. That minion’s abilities are cancelled until the start of your next turn.
clarifications: The cancelation lasts even if Mind Lady is no longer in play.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 天赋：选择另一个玩家的随从。该随从的能力将被取消，直到你的下一回合开始。
clarificationsZh: 即使 Mind Lady 不再参加比赛，取消也会持续。

cards.name: The Burst
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After a minion is played on a base, you may move this minion to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 持续：在基地上打出一个随从后，您可以将该随从移动到那里。

cards.name: Mild Mannered Citizen
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn you may destroy this minion to search your deck for a minion of power 5 or more, play it here as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在你的回合开始时，你可以消灭这个随从，在你的牌组中搜索力量为 5 或以上的随从，将其作为额外的随从在这里使用，然后洗牌你的牌组。

cards.name: Expanded Power
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +1 power and can’t be destroyed by other players.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+1力量并且不能被其他玩家消灭。

cards.name: Golden Age
cards.text: Place up to three minions from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中最多 3 个随从放到牌组底部。

cards.name: Justice Friends
cards.text: Each of your minions of power 5 or more gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个力量为 5 或以上的随从获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: My Only Weakness!
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion’s abilities are cancelled.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从的能力被取消。

cards.name: Not Really Dead
cards.text: Place up to two minions of power 2 or less from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将至多 2 个力量为 2 或更少的随从从你的弃牌堆置入你的手牌。

cards.name: Radioactive Exposure
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions to search your deck for a minion with more power, play it there as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭你的一个随从，在你的牌组中搜索一个力量更强的随从，将其作为额外的随从，然后洗牌。

cards.name: Secret Base
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here of power 3 or less cannot be destroyed by other players.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的力量为 3 或以下的随从无法被其他玩家消灭。

cards.name: Sidekick
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion of power 5 or more. Play a minion there of power 2 or less as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个你拥有力量为 5 或以上的随从的基地。在那里扮演一个力量为 2 或更少的随从作为额外的随从。

cards.name: The Everything Glove
cards.text: Special: After one of your minions is destroyed, you may play this titan at its base. Ongoing: Your minions of power 3 or less here are not affected by other players' abilities. Talent: Play an extra minion here of power 2 or less OR draw a card
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你的一个随从被消灭后，你可以在它的基地扮演这个泰坦。持续：你的力量为 3 或以下的随从不会受到其他玩家能力的影响。天赋：在这里额外打出一个力量为2或更少的随从，或者抓一张牌
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

mechanicsZh: 增强力量 5 改变自我
具有非常低功率或非常高功率的小兵

cards.name: Secret Agent
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another player plays an action, they must discard a card. Clarifications: *If the other player’s action destroys Secret Agent, they still have to discard a card.
clarifications: If the other player’s action destroys Secret Agent, they still have to discard a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：另一位玩家执行一个动作后，他们必须弃掉一张牌。说明：*如果其他玩家的行动摧毁了特工，他们仍然必须弃掉一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果其他玩家的行动摧毁了特工，他们仍然必须弃掉一张牌。

cards.name: Mole
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, you may play an extra action. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，您可以进行额外动作。澄清：*无

cards.name: Operative
cards.text: Power 3 - Look at two cards from either the top or the bottom of your deck. You may bury one on any base, then return the rest in any order. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 查看牌组顶部或底部的两张牌。您可以将其中一个埋在任意底座上，然后按任意顺序归还其余的。澄清：无

cards.name: Informant
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top three cards of any deck. If you looked at your own deck, place them on the top and/or bottom in any order. Otherwise, return them in the same order. Clarifications: If you look at a different deck than your own, the cards must be returned in the same order.
clarifications: If you look at a different deck than your own, the cards must be returned in the same order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 查看任意牌组顶部的三张牌。如果您查看自己的套牌，请将它们按任意顺序放在顶部和/或底部。否则，按相同顺序返回它们。说明：如果您看到的牌组与您自己的牌组不同，则必须按相同的顺序返回牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果您看到的牌组与您自己的牌组不同，则必须按相同的顺序返回牌。

cards.name: Discards are Forever
cards.text: Each other player discards a minion off the top of their deck. You may place a minion with power less than or equal to one of the minions discarded from your discard pile on top of your deck. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家从牌库顶弃掉一个随从。你可以将一个力量小于或等于从你的弃牌堆中丢弃的随从之一的随从放置在你的牌组顶部。澄清：

cards.name: For My Eyes Only
cards.text: Look at the top five cards of your deck. Place them on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: For My Eyes Only 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 查看你牌组顶部的五张牌。以任意顺序将它们放在牌组的顶部和/或底部。澄清：无

cards.name: From Q With Love
cards.text: Draw two cards. You may discard a card to play an extra minion or action. Clarifications: The discarded card may be one of the cards you drew with this card's ability.
clarifications: The discarded card may be one of the cards you drew with this card's ability.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: From Q With Love 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。你可以弃掉一张牌来扮演额外的随从或行动。说明： 被丢弃的牌可能是你用这张牌的能力抽到的牌之一。
clarificationsZh: 弃掉的牌可能是你用这张牌的能力抽到的牌之一。

cards.name: Live and Let Chum
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy a minion of power 4 or less there. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Live and Let Chum 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，消灭那里的一个力量为 4 或以下的随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Mindraker
cards.text: Look at each other player's hand and any number of buried or stored cards. Draw a card and play an extra action. Clarifications: If you look at multiple buried or stored cards which are attached to the same card, their controller can afterwards rearrange those cards to obfuscate exactly which is which.
clarifications: If you look at multiple buried or stored cards which are attached to the same card, their controller can afterwards rearrange those cards to obfuscate exactly which is which.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 查看其他玩家的手牌以及任意数量的埋藏或存储的牌。抽一张牌并执行一个额外动作。澄清：如果你查看附在同一张卡上的多张隐藏或存储的卡，他们的控制者可以随后重新排列这些卡以准确地混淆哪张卡是哪一张。
clarificationsZh: 如果您查看附加到同一张卡的多张隐藏或存储的卡，它们的控制器可以随后重新排列这些卡以准确混淆哪张卡是哪一张。

cards.name: Permit to Kill
cards.text: Reveal the top two cards of each other player's deck and have them discard any minions revealed. Return the rest in any order. Choose one of those players. For each minion they discarded, place two +1 power counters among your minions. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示其他玩家牌组顶部的两张牌，并让他们丢弃任何展示的小兵。以任意顺序返回其余部分。选择其中一名玩家。对于他们丢弃的每个随从，在你的随从中放置两个+1力量指示物。澄清：

cards.name: The Base is Not Enough
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, take control of a minion of power 3 or less there until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Base is Not Enough 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，控制那里的一个力量为3或更少的随从直到回合结束。澄清：无

cards.name: The Spy Who Ditched Me
cards.text: Each other player must discard a minion or reveal their hand to show they have none. If at least one other player did not discard a minion with 3 or more power, place a +1 power counter on each of your minions. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Spy Who Ditched Me 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 其他玩家必须弃掉一个随从或亮出自己的手牌以表明他们没有随从。如果至少一名其他玩家没有丢弃具有 3 或以上力量的随从，则在你的每个随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Moon Zero Three
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular action play, you may play this titan to look at the hand of a player with a minion at its base. Talent: Look at the top card of any deck. Place it on the top or bottom of that deck. Ongoing: After another player discards one or more cards from their hand or deck, you may place a +1 power counter on this titan. Clarifications: *If you cannot successfully play Moon Zero Three (because you have another titan in play), you cannot look at a player's hand. If Moon Zero Three is immediately clashed out of play by another player's titan, you do get to look at a player's hand, because the clash is an "after" reaction to both titans being on the same base.
clarifications: If you cannot successfully play Moon Zero Three (because you have another titan in play), you cannot look at a player's hand. If Moon Zero Three is immediately clashed out of play by another player's titan, you do get to look at a player's hand, because the clash is an "after" reaction to both titans being on the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：与常规的动作游戏不同，你可以玩这个泰坦来观察底部有小兵的玩家的手牌。天赋：查看任意牌组顶牌。将其放在该甲板的顶部或底部。进行中：在另一位玩家从手牌或牌组中丢弃一张或多张牌后，你可以在该泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。说明： *如果您无法成功玩《月亮零三》（因为您有另一个泰坦在场），您将无法查看玩家的手牌。如果月亮零三号立即被另一个玩家的泰坦冲出游戏，那么您确实需要查看玩家的手牌，因为冲突是两个泰坦位于同一基地的“之后”反应。
clarificationsZh: 如果你无法成功玩《月亮零三》（因为你有另一个泰坦在场），你就无法查看玩家的手牌。如果月亮零三号立即被另一个玩家的泰坦冲出游戏，那么您确实需要查看玩家的手牌，因为冲突是两个泰坦位于同一基地的“之后”反应。

cards.name: Sir Squeezes
cards.text: Power 5 - Play up to three minions of power 3 or less, whose total power is 5 or less, as extra minions here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 扮演最多三个力量为 3 或更少的随从，其总力量为 5 或更少，作为此处的额外随从。

cards.name: Fun Bear
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After another player plays or moves a minion to here, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在另一名玩家使用或移动一个随从到此处后，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Lovey Bear
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: This minion’s starting power is increased to the highest starting power of an opponent’s minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：该随从的起始力量增加至对手随从的最高起始力量。

cards.name: Snuggly Bear
cards.text: Power 1 - Special: After you play your first minion in a turn, you may immediately play this minion there as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 1 - 特殊：当你在一个回合中使用第一个随从后，你可以立即将这个随从作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Bear Picnic
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If other players can play minions they own of printed power 2 or less here, they cannot play minions on other bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：如果其他玩家可以在这里扮演他们拥有的印制力量为 2 或更少的小兵，他们就不能在其他基地扮演小兵。

cards.name: Care Package
cards.text: Draw a card and play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓一张牌并额外打出一个随从。

cards.name: Cuddle
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion’s abilities are cancelled.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从的能力被取消。

cards.name: Group Hug
cards.text: Give one of your minions +1 power for each other minion at the same base until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 使你的一个随从为同一基地的其他随从 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Love Overload
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy the minion there with the most power. If tied, destroy all tied minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：在基地计分前，消灭那里力量最大的随从。如果被绑住，消灭所有被绑住的小兵。

cards.name: Square Deal
cards.text: Draw cards until at least one player has fewer cards in their hand than you.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓牌，直到至少一名玩家手中的牌比你少。

cards.name: Tea Party
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If there are two or more minions here and at least one is yours, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：如果这里有两个或更多随从，并且至少有一个是你的，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: Too Cute
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other player’s cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从不能被其他玩家的牌摧毁。

factions.name: Teens
mechanics: Minions That Benefit From Specific Others

cards.name: Brain
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Slacker here, you may play an extra action. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 如果这里有懒鬼，你可以采取额外行动。持续：每回合一次，在你使用另一个力量为 3 的随从后，你可以抓一张牌。

cards.name: Slacker
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Rebel here, move up to two of your minions to other bases. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 如果这里有叛军，将最多两个随从移至其他基地。持续：每回合一次，在你打出另一个力量为 3 的随从后，你可以将弃牌堆中的一张牌置于牌库底部。

cards.name: Rebel
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Jock here, you may play an extra non-Rebel minion of power 3 here. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may move one of your minions to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 如果这里有运动员，你可以在这里扮演一个额外的力量 3 的非叛军随从。持续：每回合一次，在你使用另一个力量为 3 的随从后，你可以将你的一个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Jock
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Prep here, place two +1 power counters on this minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 如果这里有预备者，则在该随从上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。持续：每回合一次，在你使用另一个力量为 3 的随从后，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Prep
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Brain here, you may search your deck for a minion of power 3 and draw it. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 如果这里有大脑，你可以在你的牌组中搜索力量 3 的随从并抽出它。持续：每回合一次，在你使用另一个力量为 3 的随从后，你可以给予你的一个随从 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Abe Frohman
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, this minion also has the same name as every other minion you own. Using this minion’s abilities does not count as using another minion's abilities.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。天赋：直到你的下一个回合开始之前，该随从也与你拥有的所有其他随从具有相同的名称。使用该随从的能力并不算作使用其他随从的能力。

cards.name: Babysitter
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be affected by other players’ abilities.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：你的随从不会受到其他玩家能力的影响。

cards.name: Booty Trap
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move a minion with printed power 3 to this base, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当你使用或移动一个印有力量 3 的随从到此基地后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Brunch Bunch
cards.text: Choose a base. For each name on a minion of yours there with printed power 3, you may choose a different effect: Move one of your minions to there. Draw a card. Play an extra minion of power 3 there. Give a minion there +2 power until the end of the turn. Place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。对于你的印有力量 3 的随从的每个名字，你可以选择不同的效果：将你的一个随从移到那里。画一张卡片。在那里多打一个力量 3 的随从。给予一名随从 +2 力量直至回合结束。将弃牌堆中的一张牌放在牌组底部。

cards.name: Explosion at School
cards.text: Shuffle any number of minions of power 3 with different names from your discard pile into your deck and draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的力量为 3 且名称不同的随从从你的弃牌堆中洗入你的牌库并抓一张牌。

cards.name: New Kid
cards.text: Search your deck for a minion of power 3 and play it as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索力量为 3 的随从，并将其作为额外的随从使用。

cards.name: Principal's Office
cards.text: Return one of your minions to your hand. You may play a minion of printed power 3 as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的一名随从移回你的手上。你可以扮演一个印有力量 3 的随从作为额外的随从。

cards.name: Strange Science
cards.text: Play a minion of power 3 from your discard pile as an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中使用一个力量为 3 的随从作为额外的随从。

mechanicsZh: 从特定其他人那里受益的小黄人

cards.name: Mufasa
cards.text: power 6 - Special: After this character goes to the discard pile from play, you may place up to four +1 power counters total on your characters.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 6 - 特殊：当该角色从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，你可以在你的角色上放置最多四个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Nala
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: If there is a Lion Cub in your discard pile, this character has +2 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果你的弃牌堆中有一只幼狮，则该角色的力量 +2。

cards.name: Simba
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: If Mufasa is in your discard pile, this character has +2 power. Special: After this character goes to the discard pile from play, you may shuffle it into your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，则该角色的力量 +2。特殊：当该角色从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，你可以将其洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Rafiki
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Place a character of power 2 or less from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将弃牌堆中一个力量为 2 或更少的角色置入你的手牌。

cards.name: Timon and Pumbaa
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck. If that card is Hakuna Matata, place it into your hand instead.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将弃牌堆中的一张牌置于牌库底部。如果那张卡是哈库纳玛塔塔，则将其加入你的手牌。

cards.name: Zazu
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Give another of your characters here +2 power until the end of the turn, OR if Mufasa is in your discard pile, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：给予你的另一个角色 +2 力量直到回合结束，或者如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: Lion Cub
cards.text: power 2 - Special: After this character goes to the discard pile from play, you may search your deck for a character of power 4 or less, reveal it, draw it, and shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：当该角色从游戏中进入弃牌堆后，你可以在你的牌组中搜索力量为 4 或以下的角色，展示它，抽出它，然后洗牌你的牌组。

cards.name: Circle of Life
cards.text: Character modifier. Play on your character. Special: After this character goes to the discard pile, you may play another character of power 3 or less from your hand or discard pile as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。扮演你的角色。特殊：在该角色进入弃牌堆后，你可以从你的手牌或弃牌堆中使用另一个力量为3或更少的角色作为额外角色。

cards.name: Hakuna Matata
cards.text: Draw two cards. If the Timon and Pumbaa card is in your discard pile, place it into your hand.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。如果丁满和彭彭卡在你的弃牌堆中，将其放入你的手上。

cards.name: He Lives In You
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here each have +1 power. If Mufasa is in your discard pile, they have +2 power instead.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：这里的每个角色都有 +1 力量。如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，则它们的力量为 +2。

cards.name: Hyenas’ Den
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: One of your characters here gains +2 power until the end of the turn. Special: After a base scores, if Mufasa is in your discard pile, you may move this card to another base.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：你的一个角色在回合结束前获得+2力量。特殊：在一个基地计分后，如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，你可以将这张卡移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Just Can’t Wait to be King
cards.text: Place two +1 power counters on one of your characters. If Mufasa is in your discard pile, place four +1 power counters on it instead.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 在你的一名角色上放置两个+1力量指示物。如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，则在其上放置四个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Scar
cards.text: Destroy another player’s character of power 5 or less, OR destroy one of your characters to draw cards equal to its power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 消灭另一位玩家的力量为 5 或以下的角色，或者消灭您的一个角色以抽出与其力量相等的牌。

cards.name: The Hyenas
cards.text: Destroy a character of power 3 or less. If Mufasa is in your discard pile, draw a card and you may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 3 或以下的角色。如果木法沙在你的弃牌堆中，抓一张牌，你就可以执行一个额外动作。

cards.name: Wildebeest Stampede
cards.text: Destroy one of your characters to search your deck for a character, shuffle your deck, and play it as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Lion King faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 摧毁你的一个角色，在你的牌组中搜索角色，洗牌，然后将其作为额外角色进行游戏。

cards.name: Jack Skellington
cards.text: power 5 - Place a character modifier from your discard pile into your hand. Ongoing: After you play a character modifier, you may place a +1 power counter on a character, OR you may draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: power 5 - 将你的弃牌堆中的一个角色修正值放入你的手上。进行中：在你使用角色修饰符后，你可以在角色上放置一个+1力量指示物，或者你可以抓一张牌。

cards.name: Dr. Finkelstein
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Move a character modifier from one character to another.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: power 4 - 天赋：将角色修饰符从一个角色移动到另一个角色。

cards.name: Sally
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Play a character modifier as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：以额外动作发挥角色修饰符。

cards.name: Lock, Shock & Barrel
cards.text: power 3 - Special: Before this base scores, you may play a character modifier on a character here as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，您可以对此处的角色使用角色修饰符作为额外动作。

cards.name: The Mayor of Halloween Town
cards.text: power 3 - Ongoing: If you control a character modifier here, your characters here have +1 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：如果你在这里控制角色修饰符，你的角色在这里拥有 +1 力量。

cards.name: Zero
cards.text: power 0 - Ongoing: This character has +3 power if you control any character modifiers here. Special: After this base scores, return this character to your hand instead of the discard pile and you may play it on another base as an extra character.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 力量 0 - 持续：如果你在此处控制任何角色修饰符，则该角色拥有 +3 力量。特殊：在此基地计分后，将该角色返回到您的手上而不是弃牌堆中，并且您可以将其作为额外角色在另一个基地上使用。

cards.name: Halloween Town Folks
cards.text: power 2 - Reveal the top three cards of your deck. If there are any character modifiers, draw one. Place the rest on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: power 2 - 显示你牌组顶部的三张牌。如果有任何角色修饰符，请绘制一个。将其余的按任意顺序放在牌组的顶部和/或底部。

cards.name: Christmas Will Be Ours!
cards.text: Look at another player’s hand. You may play an action there or in your hand as an extra action. If it is owned by another player, return it to their hand at the end of the turn no matter where it is (except the box).
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 看看另一个玩家的手牌。您可以在那里或手上执行一个动作作为额外动作。如果它为其他玩家所有，则在回合结束时将其返回到他们的手上，无论它在哪里（盒子除外）。

cards.name: Ghostly Presents
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: If you control this character, immediately destroy this card and play an extra character of power 3 or less. Otherwise, its controller cannot play characters of power 3 or less here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。持续：如果你控制该角色，立即破坏该卡并额外使用一个力量为 3 或更少的角色。否则，其控制器无法在此扮演力量为 3 或以下的角色。

cards.name: Jack-O’lantern-in-the-Box
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: If you control this character, draw an additional card before the end of your turn; otherwise, this character’s controller may not add additional cards to their hand during their turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。持续：如果你操控该角色，则在你的回合结束前再抓一张牌；否则，该角色的操控者在其回合中不得将额外的牌添加至手牌。

cards.name: Monster Garland
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: If you control this character, it has +3 power; otherwise, it has -2 power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：如果你控制这个角色，它的力量+3；否则，它的幂为-2。

cards.name: Oogie Boogie
cards.text: Character modifier. You may move this character to another base. Ongoing: This character has 0 power and its abilities are cancelled. Destroy this card if another character here has power 5 or more.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。您可以将该角色移动到另一个基地。进行中：该角色的力量为 0，其能力被取消。如果这里的其他角色的力量为 5 或以上，则破坏这张卡。

cards.name: Sandy Claws Costume
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +1 power for each character modifier you control. Special: After this base scores, return this character to its owner’s hand and place this card on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。进行中：对于你控制的每个角色修饰符，该角色的力量+1。特殊：在获得此基地计分后，将此角色移回其所有者的手上，并将此卡置于你的牌库底部。

cards.name: Winter Surprise
cards.text: Play a character modifier from your discard pile as an extra action. Shuffle this card into your deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中使用一个角色修饰符作为额外动作。将这张卡洗入你的牌库。

cards.name: Zombie Duck Toy
cards.text: Character modifier. Special: When this base scores, if you control this character, you gain 1 VP more; otherwise, its controller gains 1 VP less.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.imageAlt: The Nightmare Before Christmas faction card sheet
cards.textZh: 字符修改器。特殊：当此基地计分时，如果你控制该角色，你将多获得1点VP；否则，其控制者将减少 1 VP。

cards.name: Master Thief
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Draw a treasure card OR draw a random action from the discard pile of another player with a minion here. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：抽取一张宝藏卡或从另一名拥有随从的玩家的弃牌堆中随机抽取一个动作。澄清：

cards.name: Fence
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, you may discard two cards from your hand you do not own to either gain 1 VP OR play an extra card. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，您可以从手上丢弃两张不属于您的牌，以获得 1 VP 或打出一张额外的牌。澄清：

cards.name: Cat Burglar
cards.text: Power 3 - Discard up to two cards. For each you own, draw a card. For each other card, place two +1 power counters on this minion. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 丢弃最多两张牌。对于你拥有的每张牌，抽一张牌。对于每张牌，在该随从上放置两个+1力量指示物。澄清：

cards.name: Pickpocket
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a treasure card. Ongoing: Your maximum hand size is increased by 1. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 抽一张宝藏卡。进行中：您的最大手牌大小增加 1。说明：

cards.name: Backstab
cards.text: Discard any number of cards you do not own. Destroy a minion of power 3 or less plus the number of cards discarded this way. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量不属于您的卡。消灭一个力量为 3 或更少的随从加上以此方式丢弃的卡牌数量。澄清：

cards.name: Clever Distraction
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After another player plays a minion here, they may give you two cards from their hand to destroy this card. Special: After this base scores, if this card was in play at the start of the turn, take 1 VP from another player here. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当另一个玩家在这里打出一个随从后，他们可能会从他们的手上给你两张牌来摧毁这张牌。特殊：在此基地计分后，如果该牌在回合开始时正在使用，则从此处的另一位玩家那里获得 1 VP。澄清：

cards.name: Mugging
cards.text: Choose another player. They must have you either look at their hand and draw an action from it, or draw the bottom two cards of their deck. If you look at their hand and they have no actions, play an extra action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择另一位玩家。他们必须让你要么查看他们的手牌并从中抽出一个动作，要么抽出他们牌组底部的两张牌。如果你看他们的手牌，发现他们没有采取任何行动，请采取额外的行动。澄清：

cards.name: Potion Bandolier
cards.text: Discard any number of cards you do not own. For each one, choose a different option below: - Draw two cards. - Move one of your minions. - Give a minion +3 power until the end of the turn. - Place two stasis counters on a minion from your hand. - Play an extra action. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 丢弃任意数量不属于您的卡。对于每一张，请选择以下不同的选项： - 抽两张牌。 - 移动你的一名随从。 - 给予一个随从+3力量直到回合结束。 - 在你手上的一个随从身上放置两个停滞指示物。 - 进行一个额外的动作。澄清：

cards.name: Secret Stash
cards.text: Play on a base and store the top three cards of the treasure deck under this card. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, draw a card stored under this card. Talent: If this card has only one stored card, destroy this card to play it. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在基地上玩，并将宝藏牌组顶部的三张牌存放在这张牌下面。持续：在你的回合开始时，抽一张存储在这张卡下的卡。天赋：如果这张卡只有一张存储的卡，则破坏这张卡来使用它。澄清：

cards.name: Smuggling
cards.text: You may discard two cards you do not own. If you do, gain 1 VP and you may swap your deck and discard pile. Place this card in the box. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 您可以丢弃两张不属于您的牌。如果你这样做，获得 1 VP 并且你可以交换你的牌组和弃牌堆。将这张卡放入盒子中。澄清：

cards.name: Strip Bare
cards.text: Return an action in play to your hand (even if it is owned by another player or in stasis). Special: Play after another player's action goes to the discard pile to place that action into your hand instead. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将正在进行的动作返回到你的手上（即使该动作已被其他玩家拥有或处于停滞状态）。特殊：在其他玩家的动作进入弃牌堆后进行游戏，将该动作放入你的手牌中。澄清：

cards.name: Swipe
cards.text: Draw two total cards and/or treasure cards. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 总共抽取两张牌和/或宝藏牌。澄清：

cards.name: Doctor When
cards.text: Power 5 - You may return another of your minions in play to your hand. You may play it again as an extra minion.
clarifications: Play the extra minion immediately or not at all.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 你可以将场上的另一个随从返回你的手牌。你可以作为额外的随从再次玩它。
clarificationsZh: 立即使用额外的随从或根本不使用。

cards.name: Repeater Perfect
cards.text: Power 4 - Place an action from your discard pile on top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 将弃牌堆中的一个动作放在牌组顶部。

cards.name: Time Raider
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将弃牌堆中的一张牌置于牌库底部。

cards.name: Jumper
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: When this minion goes to the discard pile (from play), you may place it back into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当这个随从进入弃牌堆（从场上）时，你可以将其放回你的手上。

cards.name: 1.21 Gigawatts
cards.text: Shuffle all actions or all minions from your discard pile into your deck.
clarifications: The “or” is exclusive: choose either actions or minions, not both.
Gigawatts is pronounced with a J.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的所有行动或所有随从洗入牌库。
clarificationsZh: “或”是排他性的：选择动作或仆从，而不是两者都选择。
吉瓦用 J 发音。

cards.name: Do Over!
cards.text: Return your minion from a base to your hand. You may play it again as an extra minion.
clarifications: Play the extra minion immediately or not at all.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的随从从基地移回你的手上。你可以作为额外的随从再次玩它。
clarificationsZh: 立即使用额外的随从或根本不使用。

cards.name: Into the Time Slip
cards.text: Return a card in play to its owner’s hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Into the Time Slip 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 将场上的一张牌移回其拥有者的手上。

cards.name: It's Astounding
cards.text: Play an action from your discard pile as an extra action.
clarifications: Play the extra action immediately, before discarding It’s Astounding.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中执行一个动作作为额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 在丢弃 It's Astounding 之前立即进行额外动作。

cards.name: Stasis Field
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: This base cannot score. Destroy this action at the start of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：该基地无法计分。在你的回合开始时消灭这个行动。

cards.name: Time is Fleeting
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores if there is a base in the discard pile. Add a base of your choice from the discard pile instead of drawing a new base from the base deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Wording (added "Special") - errata'd in the Bigger Geekier Box
clarifications: You may not choose the same base that just scored.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：如果弃牌堆中有垒，则在基地计分后进行比赛。从弃牌堆中添加您选择的基地，而不是从基础牌组中抽取新的基地。
clarificationsZh: 您不能选择刚刚得分的相同基地。

cards.name: Time Walk
cards.text: You may play an extra minion and an extra action this turn. Draw 2 cards. Place this card on the bottom of your deck instead of your discard pile.
clarifications: You don’t have to play extra cards before drawing the 2 cards, unless you play Time Walk outside your Play Cards phase.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 本回合你可以扮演一个额外的随从和一个额外的动作。抽 2 张牌。将此卡放在你牌库的底部而不是你的弃牌堆上。
clarificationsZh: 在抽两张牌之前，你不必打出额外的牌，除非你在打牌阶段之外打出时间漫步。

cards.name: Wormhole
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores. Shuffle any number of your minions there into your deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (number of minions shuffled now optional )
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分后进行比赛。将任意数量的随从洗入你的套牌中。

cards.name: Time Box
cards.text: Special: At the start of your turn or when a card goes to your hand from play or the discard pile, place a counter on this titan if it is not in play. After you place the fifth or higher counter on it, you may remove all of the counters and play this titan. Talent: Play an extra minion here of power 2 or less, and/or play an extra action.
clarifications: The counters here are only for literal counting and are not treated as +1 power counters. Before this card is played no other ability may affect these counters.
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合开始时，或者当一张牌从游戏中或弃牌堆转到你的手上时，如果该泰坦不在游戏中，则在其上放置一个指示物。当你在其上放置第五个或更高的指示物后，你可以移除所有指示物并玩这个泰坦。天赋：在这里扮演一个额外的力量为2或更少的随从，和/或扮演一个额外的动作。
clarificationsZh: 这里的计数器仅用于字面计数，不被视为+1功率计数器。在打出这张牌之前，没有其他能力可以影响这些指示物。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Monster Tornado
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Move a minion of power 4 or less from here to another base, or from another base to here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：将力量为 4 或以下的随从从这里移动到另一个基地，或从另一个基地移动到这里。

cards.name: Cyclone
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将该随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Twister
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move a minion of power 3 or less from here to another base, or from another base to here.
clarifications: Twister can move itself.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 你可以将力量为 3 或更少的随从从这里移动到另一个基地，或从另一个基地移动到这里。
clarificationsZh: 龙卷风可以自行移动。

cards.name: Dust Devil
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: Before a base scores, you may move this minion to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：在基地计分前，你可以将该随从移动到那里。

cards.name: Carried Away
cards.text: Move a minion to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个随从移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Gone with the Wind
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores. You may move one of your minions from there to another base instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Gone with the Wind 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分后进行比赛。你可以将你的一个随从从那里移到另一个基地而不是弃牌堆。

cards.name: Not in Kansas
cards.text: Destroy a base and any actions played on it or on minions there. Replace it with the top card of the base deck. All minions from the original base remain.
clarifications: Actions on minions are also destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 摧毁一个基地以及在其上或那里的小兵上进行的任何行动。将其替换为基础牌组的顶牌。原来基地的所有小兵都留下了。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动也会被摧毁。

cards.name: Over the Rainbow
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. Move one of your minions from another base to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。将你的一名随从从另一个基地移动到那里。

cards.name: Picked Up
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. Move a minion from there to another base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在基地计分前进行比赛。将一个随从从那里移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Ripped Off
cards.text: Transfer an action played on a base to another base or on a minion to another minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将在一个基地上进行的动作转移到另一个基地或将一个小兵上进行的动作转移到另一个小兵上。

cards.name: Trade Winds
cards.text: Choose two minions of power 3 or less. Move each one to the other’s base.
clarifications: If there’s only one eligible minion in play, you cannot move it with this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择两名力量为 3 或以下的随从。将每个人移动到另一个人的基地。
clarificationsZh: 如果场上只有一个符合条件的随从，你就不能用这张卡移动它。

cards.name: Whirlwinds
cards.text: You may move any number of your minions to other bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你可以将任意数量的小兵转移到其他基地。

cards.name: Category 5
