cards.text: Special: After you move two or more minions in a turn, you may play this titan on a base where you have a minion. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to or from here, place a +1 power counter on one of them. Talent: Move this titan to another base OR place a +1 power counter on this titan.
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你在一个回合中移动两个或更多小兵后，你可以在你有小兵的基地上扮演这个泰坦。正在进行：当你的一个或多个随从移入或移出此处后，在其中一个上放置一个+1力量指示物。天赋：将这个泰坦移动到另一个基地或者在这个泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Leprechaun
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After the first time each turn another player plays a minion here that has less power here than this minion after resolving its ability, destroy it. Clarifications: If another player plays a bigger minion first and then plays a smaller minion, the first eligible minion to be destroyed is destroyed. If another player's minion moves to or from this base as part of its resolution (Example: Twister), it is not destroyed. If another player plays an eligible minion for destruction but it removes Leprechaun from the base during its resolution (Example: Dusty Henry), it is not destroyed.
clarifications: If another player plays a bigger minion first and then plays a smaller minion, the first eligible minion to be destroyed is destroyed. If another player's minion moves to or from this base as part of its resolution (Example: Twister), it is not destroyed. If another player plays an eligible minion for destruction but it removes Leprechaun from the base during its resolution (Example: Dusty Henry), it is not destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：每回合第一次后，另一位玩家在这里扮演一个比该随从能力更弱的随从，在解决其能力后，消灭它。说明：如果另一个玩家先使用较大的随从，然后使用较小的随从，则第一个符合条件的要被摧毁的随从将被摧毁。如果另一个玩家的随从作为其决议的一部分移入或移出该基地（例如：Twister），它不会被摧毁。如果另一个玩家扮演了一个符合破坏条件的随从，但它在解决过程中将妖精从基地中移除（例如：达斯蒂·亨利），则它不会被破坏。
clarificationsZh: 如果另一个玩家先扮演一个较大的随从，然后扮演一个较小的随从，则第一个符合条件的要被摧毁的随从将被摧毁。如果另一个玩家的随从作为其决议的一部分移入或移出该基地（例如：Twister），它不会被摧毁。如果另一个玩家扮演了一个符合破坏条件的随从，但它在解决过程中将妖精从基地中移除（例如：达斯蒂·亨利），则它不会被破坏。

cards.name: Brownie
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after another player plays a minion on another base, draw a card. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，当另一名玩家在另一个基地上使用随从后，抓一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Gnome
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion here with less power than the number of minions and titans you have here. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以用比你这里拥有的小兵和泰坦数量更少的力量消灭这里的一个小兵。澄清：无

cards.name: Gremlin
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card. If it was destroyed, each other player discards a random card. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当该随从从场上进入弃牌堆后，抓一张牌。如果它被摧毁，其他玩家随机丢弃一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Pixie
cards.text: Power 2 - Minion: If you have more cards in your hand than at least one other player, place a +1 power counter on any number of your minions here. Action: Destroy an action to place two +1 power counters among your minions. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 小兵：如果你手上的牌比至少一名其他玩家多，则在此处的任意数量的小兵上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。行动：摧毁一个行动，在你的随从中放置两个+1力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Block the Path
cards.text: Play on a base. For each other player, name a faction they own. Ongoing: Minions of the named factions cannot be played here. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。对于每个其他玩家，命名他们拥有的派系。进行中：指定派系的小兵不能在这里玩。澄清：无

cards.name: Enshrouding Mist
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Play an extra minion here. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在这里扮演一个额外的随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Flame Trap
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After another player plays a minion here, destroy this card to destroy that minion. At the start of your turn, you may reduce this base's breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当另一位玩家在此打出一个随从后，消灭这张卡以消灭该随从。在你的回合开始时，你可以将该基地的断点减少4，直到回合结束。澄清：无

cards.name: Hideout
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players cannot move minions to this base. Talent: Swap this action with a play-on-base action from your hand or deck, then you may destroy a minion of power 2 or less here. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：其他玩家无法将小兵移动到该基地。天赋：将此动作与你手上或牌组中的基地行动交换，然后你可以在这里消灭一个力量为2或更少的随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Mark of Sleep
cards.text: Choose one for each other player: until the start of your turn, either they cannot play actions OR they cannot move minions. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 为每个其他玩家选择一个：直到你的回合开始，他们要么无法执行动作，要么无法移动小兵。澄清：无

cards.name: Pay the Piper
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After another player plays a minion here, that player discards a card. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：当另一位玩家在此打出随从后，该玩家弃掉一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Take The Shinies
cards.text: Each other player discards two random cards. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 其他玩家随机丢弃两张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Big Funny Giant
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular minion play, you may play this titan. Ongoing: After another player plays a minion here, they must discard a card. At the end of each other player's turn, if they do not have a minion here, you may place a +1 power counter on this titan. Special: When this base scores, if you are the winner and at least one other player does not have a minion here, gain 1 VP. Clarifications: None
cards.textZh: 特殊：您可以扮演这个泰坦，而不是常规的小兵游戏。进行中：当另一位玩家在这里打出随从后，他们必须弃掉一张牌。在其他玩家的回合结束时，如果他们这里没有随从，你可以在这个泰坦上放置一个+1力量指示物。特殊：当此基地计分时，如果你是胜利者，并且至少有一名其他玩家没有小兵，则获得 1 VP。澄清：无
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki
cards.imageAlt: Big Funny Giant 路 Smash Up

factions.name: Truckers
mechanics: Moving Play-On-Base Actions To Move Your Minions

cards.name: "El Bandido"
cards.text: Power 5 - You may take control of an action on this base. Talent: Play an extra action on a base, OR transfer an action from one base to another.
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 你可以控制该基地的行动。天赋：在一个基地上进行额外的动作，或者将一个动作从一个基地转移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

cards.name: "Rubber Chicken"
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each of your actions on this base.
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：你在这个基地上的每一个行动都会使该随从获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

cards.name: "Skinny Minnie"
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: If there is an action on this base, move this minion to another base to transfer an action from here to there.
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 天赋：如果该基地有行动，则将该随从移至另一个基地，以将行动从这里转移到那里。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

cards.name: "Good Buddy"
cards.text: Power 2 - If you have an action on this base, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 如果你在此基地有行动，则抓一张牌。

cards.name: Armored Truck
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed or moved by other players' cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的随从不能被其他玩家的牌摧毁或移动。

cards.name: Cab-over Pete
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to transfer or move another card you control here to the same base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将此动作转移到另一个基地，将你在这里操控的另一张牌转移或移动到同一个基地。

cards.name: Convoy
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: You have +1 power here for each of your actions on this base (including this one).
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：你在此基地上的每一项行动（包括这一行动）都会获得 +1 力量。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

cards.name: Dekotora
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move up to three of your minions from here to there.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将此行动转移到另一个基地，将最多三个随从从这里移动到那里。

cards.name: Fixin' to Fix It
cards.text: Choose an action in your discard pile that can be played on a base, and play it as an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Fixin' to Fix It 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的弃牌堆中选择一个可以在基地上进行的动作，并将其作为额外动作进行。

cards.name: High-Speed Chase
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. That minion gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The power boost is unchanged even if High-Speed Chase is destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将此动作转移到另一个基地，将你的一个随从从这里移动到那里。该随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 即使高速追逐被破坏，威力提升也不会改变。

cards.name: Hotwire
cards.text: Play an action that can be played on a base off the top of your deck OR choose an action played on a base; Transfer it to another base, and/or take control of it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (can now alternatively play a "play on base" action off the top of your deck)
clarifications: Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 执行一个可以在牌组顶部的基地上执行的动作，或者选择一个在基地上执行的动作；将其转移到另一个基地，和/或控制它。
clarificationsZh: 对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

cards.name: Rally
cards.text: Give one of your minions +1 power until the end of the turn for each action on its base. Special: Play before a base scores and give one of your minions there +2 power for each action on it's base instead.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (counts all actions on the base, not just your own, and can be played normally as well as before scoring)
clarifications: The power boost is unchanged even if other actions appear there.
Actions on minions do not count as actions on bases.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 直到回合结束前，你的一个随从在其基地上的每一次行动都给予其+1力量。特殊：在基地计分前进行游戏，并为你的一个小兵在其基地上的每个动作赋予 +2 力量。
clarificationsZh: 即使出现其他动作，功率提升也不会改变。
对小兵的行动不算作对基地的行动。

mechanicsZh: 移动基地行动来移动你的小兵

cards.name: Captain Marvel
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Move this character to another base. All of your other characters currently there gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: power 5 - 天赋：将此角色移动到另一个基地。当前所在的所有其他角色直到回合结束为止都获得 +1 力量。

cards.name: Spectrum
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Move this character to another base.
cards.textZh: power 4 - 天赋：将此角色移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: America Chavez
cards.text: power 3 - Ongoing: After another character moves to or from this base, this character gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：当另一个角色移入或移出该基地后，该角色获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Blue Marvel
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: After this character moves to another base, it gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：该角色移动到另一个基地后，其力量获得 +1 直到回合结束。

cards.name: Aid from Allies
cards.text: Base modifier. Draw a card. Ongoing: After you move one or more characters to here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。画一张卡片。进行中：将一个或多个角色移至此处后，抓一张牌。

cards.name: Coordinated Attack
cards.text: Choose a base. Move up to three of your characters from other bases to there. They each gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将最多三个角色从其他基地移动到那里。他们各自获得+1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Cosmic Knowledge
cards.text: Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck, then draw one more card than you placed there.
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的手牌放在牌库底部，然后再抽一张比你放置的牌多的牌。

cards.name: First to Arrive
cards.text: Play an extra character on a base where you have no characters.
cards.textZh: 在没有角色的基地上扮演额外的角色。

cards.name: Heroic Landing
cards.text: Move any number of your characters to other bases.
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的角色移动到其他基地。

cards.name: Lift and Carry
cards.text: Move a character to another base.
cards.textZh: 将角色移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Power and Speed
cards.text: One of your characters gains +2 power until the end of the turn. You may move it to another base.
cards.textZh: 你的一个角色获得+2力量直到回合结束。您可以将其移动到另一个基地。

cards.name: Scramble
cards.text: Move one of your characters to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
cards.textZh: 将你的一个角色移动到另一个基地。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。

cards.name: The Count
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After a minion is destroyed, you may place a +1 power counter on a minion at its base. Talent: Give a minion -1 power until the start of your turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：消灭一个随从后，你可以在该随从的基地放置一个 +1 力量指示物。天赋：给予一个随从-1力量直到你的回合开始。澄清：*无

cards.name: Nightstalker
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If you have destroyed a minion this turn, draw a card and give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：如果你本回合消灭了一个随从，抓一张牌并赋予该随从 +2 力量直到回合结束。澄清：*无

cards.name: Heavy Drinker
cards.text: Power 2 - You may destroy a minion of power 2 or less here or one of your other minions on any base to place two +1 power counters on this minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以消灭此处力量为 2 或以下的一个随从，或任意基地上的一个其他随从，在该随从上放置两个 +1 力量指示物。澄清：无

cards.name: Fledgling Vampire
cards.text: Power 2 - If this minion was played from anywhere other than your hand, place a +1 power counter on it. Special: After you destroy another minion, you may bury this card from your hand or discard pile on any base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 如果这个随从是从你手牌以外的任何地方打出的，则在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。特殊：当你消灭另一个随从后，你可以将这张牌从你的手牌或弃牌堆埋入任意基地。澄清：无

cards.name: Wolf Pact
cards.text: Power 2 - Minion: You may give a minion -1 power until the start of your next turn to place a +1 power counter on another one of your minions here. Action: Shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck. Clarifications: “Another one of your minions here” means any minion besides Wolf Pact. This can be the minion you gave -1 power to.
clarifications: “Another one of your minions here” means any minion besides Wolf Pact. This can be the minion you gave -1 power to.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 小兵：你可以给予一个小兵 -1 力量，直到你的下一回合开始，然后在你的另一个小兵身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。行动：将一张牌从你的弃牌堆洗入你的牌库。说明：“这里还有一个你的随从”是指除狼公约之外的任何随从。这可以是你赋予-1力量的随从。
clarificationsZh: “这里还有一个你的随从”是指除了《狼公约》之外的任何随从。这可以是你赋予-1力量的随从。

cards.name: Big Gulp
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 4 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个力量为 4 或以下的随从。

cards.name: Buffet
cards.text: Draw two cards. Special: Play after you destroy a minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。特别：消灭一个随从后进行游戏。澄清：无

cards.name: Crack of Dusk
cards.text: Play a minion of power 2 or less from your discard pile as an extra minion. Place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中使用一个力量为 2 或更少的随从作为额外的随从。在其上放置一个+1能量指示物。

cards.name: Cull The Weak
cards.text: Search your deck for up to two minions and discard them. For each minion discarded, place a +1 power counter on a minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索最多两个随从并丢弃它们。每丢弃一个随从，就在一个随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Dinner Date
cards.text: Play on a minion. Place two +1 power counters on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. If this minion has 0 power, destroy it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。在你的一名随从身上放置两个+1力量指示物。进行中：该随从的力量为-2。如果该随从力量为 0，则消灭它。

cards.name: Mad Monster Party
cards.text: Choose a base and place a +1 power counter on each of your minions there. Special: Play after you destroy a minion. Choose its base. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地并在你的每个小兵身上放置一个+1力量指示物。特别：消灭一个随从后进行游戏。选择它的基础。澄清：无

cards.name: Stakeout
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If another player's power here has decreased this turn, other players cannot play minions of power 3 or more here until the start of your next turn. Clarifications: This talent can be used if another player's power here has been reduced this turn for any reason, including negative power, destruction, movement, etc.
clarifications: This talent can be used if another player's power here has been reduced this turn for any reason, including negative power, destruction, movement, etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：如果本回合中其他玩家的力量有所下降，则在你的下回合开始之前，其他玩家不能在这里使用力量为3或以上的随从。说明：如果本回合其他玩家的力量因任何原因（包括负面力量、破坏、移动等）而降低，则可以使用该天赋。
clarificationsZh: 如果本回合其他玩家的力量因任何原因（包括负力量、破坏、移动等）而降低，则可以使用该天赋。

cards.name: Ancient Lord
cards.text: Special: When you would place one or more +1 power counters on your minions, if this titan is not in play, you may place one of them on this titan instead. Then if this titan has at least three +1 power counters on it, you may remove all of them to play it. Ongoing: After you place a +1 power counter on one of your minions here that had no such counters on it, place another +1 power counter on it. Talent: Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions that already has one. Clarifications: *None
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你在你的随从上放置一个或多个+1力量指示物时，如果该泰坦不在场上，你可以将其中一个指示物放置在该泰坦上。然后，如果这个泰坦上至少有三个+1力量指示物，你可以将它们全部移除来玩它。进行中：当你在一个没有这样指示物的随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物后，在其上放置另一个+1力量指示物。天赋：在你已经拥有一个+1力量指示物的随从身上放置一个+1力量指示物。澄清：*无
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

factions.name: Vigilantes

cards.name: Brojak
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after another minion moves, you may move this minion to the same base and/or place a +1 power counter on this minion. Clarifications: *You don't need to have Brojak react to the first eligible trigger every turn.
clarifications: You don't need to have Brojak react to the first eligible trigger every turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：每回合一次，在另一个随从移动后，你可以将该随从移动到同一基地和/或在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。说明：*你不需要让布罗杰克每回合都对第一个符合条件的触发器做出反应。
clarificationsZh: 你不需要让 Brojak 每回合都对第一个符合条件的触发器做出反应。

cards.name: Death Wisher
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion that was played or moved to this base this turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，你可以消灭本回合中使用或移动到该基地的一个随从。澄清：*无

cards.name: Dusty Henry
cards.text: Power 4 - You may shuffle a minion of power 5 or less here into its owner's deck. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以将力量为 5 或以下的随从洗入其拥有者的牌库中。澄清：无

cards.name: Foxy Green
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: At the end of each other player's turn, if you have more power here than them, draw a card. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在其他玩家的回合结束时，如果您的力量比他们多，则抓一张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Jacky Bill
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After another player plays an action, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion. At the start of any player's turn, you may reduce this base's breakpoint by the number of +1 power counters on this minion until the end of the turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在另一位玩家执行一个动作后，你可以在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。在任何玩家的回合开始时，你可以将该基地的断点减少该随从上的+1力量指示物的数量，直到回合结束。澄清：*无

cards.name: Shift
cards.text: Power 4 - Place up to two minions from your discard pile on top of your deck. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 将弃牌堆中最多两个随从放到牌组顶部。澄清：*无

cards.name: Stoneford
cards.text: Power 4 - Search your deck for an action and draw it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 在你的牌组中搜索一个动作并绘制它。

cards.name: A Whole Lot Meaner
cards.text: Place up to three +1 power counters on one of your minions. Special: After a base scores where you didn't win, you may draw this card from your discard pile. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: A Whole Lot Meaner 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的一名随从身上放置最多三个+1力量指示物。特殊：在你没有获胜的基地计分后，你可以从你的弃牌堆中抽出这张牌。澄清：无

cards.name: Feeling Lucky?
cards.text: Play on another player's minion. Ongoing: After this minion's controller plays an action, look at the top card of your deck. Place it on the top or bottom of your deck. Special: Before this base scores, reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, destroy this minion. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对另一个玩家的随从进行游戏。进行中：该随从的操控者执行一个动作后，查看你牌库顶牌。将其放在牌组的顶部或底部。特别：在此基地计分前，展示你牌组顶牌。如果是一个行动，消灭这个随从。澄清：无

cards.name: Knocked into Next Week
cards.text: Choose a minion. Shuffle it into its owner’s deck. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Knocked into Next Week 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。将其洗入其拥有者的牌库中。澄清：无

cards.name: Let's Finish This
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you and another player have a minion here at the start of your turn, reduce the starting breakpoint of this base to 0 until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：如果你和另一名玩家在你的回合开始时这里有一个随从，则将该基地的起始断点减少到 0，直到回合结束。澄清：无

cards.name: Make My Day
cards.text: Destroy a minion of printed power 3 or less on a base where you have a minion. Special: Play before a base scores during your turn. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你有随从的基地上消灭一个印制力量为 3 或更少的随从。特别：在你的回合中，在基地计分前进行游戏。澄清：无

cards.name: Scared Straight
cards.text: Move another player’s minion from a base where you have a minion to another base. If this was your first action played this turn, you may play an extra action. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将其他玩家的随从从您拥有随从的基地移动到另一个基地。如果这是你本回合执行的第一个动作，你可以执行一个额外的动作。澄清：无

cards.name: Shrug it Off
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Until the start of your turn, other players' minions here have -1 power. Clarifications: None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：在你的回合开始之前，其他玩家的随从拥有-1力量。澄清：无

cards.name: Street Justice
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Move one of your minions to or from this base OR until the start of your turn, your minions here have +2 power during other players' turns. Clarifications:
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将你的一名随从移入或移出该基地，或者直到你的回合开始，你的随从在其他玩家的回合中拥有+2力量。澄清：

cards.name: The Revenge
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores where you didn't win. Move one of your minions there to another base. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特别：在您未获胜的基地计分后进行比赛。将你的一个随从移到另一个基地。澄清：*无

cards.name: Tough It Out
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has -3 power and can't be destroyed. At the start of any player's turn, you may destroy this action to give this minion +3 power until the end of your turn. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有-3力量并且无法被消灭。在任何玩家的回合开始时，你可以摧毁该行动，使该随从获得 +3 力量，直到你的回合结束。澄清：*无

cards.name: Who Loves Ya, Baby?
cards.text: Reveal a minion of power 4 off the top of your deck. Draw it or play it as an extra minion. Clarifications: *None
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Who Loves Ya, Baby? 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 从你的牌组顶部展示一个力量为 4 的随从。画它或将它当作额外的随从来玩。澄清：*无

mechanicsZh: 七个独特的 Power-4 小黄人

factions.name: Vikings
mechanics: Placing Cards On Top Of Your Deck For Power

cards.name: Valkyrie
cards.text: Power 5 - Place a minion from another player’s discard pile into your hand.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 将另一个玩家弃牌堆中的一个随从放入你的手牌。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。你不拥有的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，但它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Raider
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Place up to three cards from your hand on top of your deck. This minion gains +1 power for each one until the end of the turn.
clarifications: You may place a card in your hand you don’t own on top of your deck safely, since no one sees what the card is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：将至多三张手牌置于牌库顶。每有一个随从，该随从就会获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 你可以将一张不属于你的手牌安全地放在你的牌组顶部，因为没有人看到这张牌是什么。

cards.name: Shield Maiden
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal the top card of another player’s deck. If it is an action, or a minion of power 3 or less, place it into your hand. Otherwise, return it.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 展示其他玩家牌组顶牌。如果它是一个动作，或者是力量为 3 或以下的随从，则将其置于你的手上。否则，退回。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。你不拥有的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，但它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Huscarl
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Place a card from your hand on top of your deck to give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: You may place a card in your hand you don’t own on top of your deck safely, since no one sees what the card is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 天赋：将一张手牌放在你的牌库顶，使该随从获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 你可以将一张不属于你的手牌安全地放在你的牌组顶部，因为没有人看到这张牌是什么。

cards.name: Berserk
cards.text: Place a card from your hand on top of your deck to give one of your minions +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: You may place a card in your hand you don’t own on top of your deck safely, since no one sees what the card is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一张手牌放在你的牌库顶部，使你的一个随从获得 +3 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 你可以将一张不属于你的手牌安全地放在你的牌组顶部，因为没有人看到这张牌是什么。

cards.name: Cast the Runes
cards.text: Look at another player's hand. Look at the top two cards of their deck and return them in any order. Play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 看看另一个玩家的手牌。查看他们牌组最上面的两张牌，然后按任意顺序将它们返还。进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Combat Training
cards.text: Each of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。

cards.name: Pillage
cards.text: Take a random card from another player’s hand and place it in yours.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从其他玩家手中随机取出一张牌并将其放入您的手中。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。你不拥有的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，但它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Raiding Party
cards.text: Reveal the top three cards of another player’s deck. You may play a revealed action, or minion of power 4 or less, as an extra card. Return the rest in any order.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示另一位玩家牌组顶三张牌。你可以使用显露行动或力量为 4 或更少的随从作为额外卡牌。以任意顺序返回其余部分。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。你不拥有的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，但它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Ransack
cards.text: Place an action on a minion, an action on a base, or a buried card into your hand.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将一个针对随从的动作、一个针对基地的动作或一张埋藏的牌放入你的手上。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。你不拥有的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，但它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Tribute
cards.text: Draw three cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽三张牌。

cards.name: Viking Funeral
cards.text: Play on one of your minions of power 5 or more. Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile, gain 1 VP. If you own it, put it back in the box.
clarifications: If a card is put back in the box, it is out of play for the rest of the game.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 对你的一名力量为 5 或以上的随从进行游戏。持续：该随从进入弃牌堆后，获得 1 VP。如果您拥有它，请将其放回盒子中。
clarificationsZh: 如果将一张牌放回盒子中，则该牌在接下来的游戏中将不再进行。

mechanicsZh: 将牌放在你的牌组顶部以获得力量

cards.name: Big Hero
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Destroy a monster here OR play a monster here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在这里消灭一个怪物或者在这里扮演一个怪物。

cards.name: Star Player
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After a monster is destroyed, you may place a +1 power counter on a minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：怪物被消灭后，你可以在此处的随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Berserker
cards.text: Power 3 - Destroy a monster here with power less than or equal to this minion to either play an extra action OR place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 消灭此处力量小于或等于该随从的怪物，以执行额外动作或在该随从上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Taunter
cards.text: Power 2 - You may play a monster here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 你可以在这里扮演怪物。

cards.name: Campaign
cards.text: Each of your minions on a base that has a monster gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 拥有怪物的基地上的每个随从都会获得 +2 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Cleave
cards.text: Destroy a monster. You may play any treasures you get from destroying it as extra cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个怪物。您可以将摧毁它获得的任何宝藏作为额外的卡牌。

cards.name: Dumbbells
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +3 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+3力量。

cards.name: Dungeon Bait
cards.text: Play a monster OR destroy a minion of printed power 2 or less.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演一个怪物或消灭一个印有力量 2 或更少的小兵。

cards.name: Eternal Hero
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: When this minion goes to the discard pile, place it and this action into your hand instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。进行中：当该随从进入弃牌堆时，将其和该动作置于你手上。

cards.name: Ruckus
cards.text: Choose a base. Play two monsters there OR destroy all monsters there but do not collect any treasure cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。在那里玩两个怪物或消灭那里的所有怪物，但不要收集任何宝藏卡。

cards.name: Shield of Ubiquity
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power for each monster here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：这里的每个怪物都有+2力量。

cards.name: War Cry
cards.text: Destroy a monster to add its power to a minion at that base until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 消灭一个怪物，将其力量添加到该基地的一个随从身上，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Pack Alpha
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: Before this base scores, each of your minions here gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，你的每个随从都会获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Loup-Garou
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before this base scores, this minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 特殊：在此基地计分前，该随从获得 +2 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Teenage Wolf
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: This minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：该随从获得 +1 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Howler
cards.text: Power 2 - This minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 该随从获得 +2 力量直至回合结束。

cards.name: Chew Toy
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy a minion with lower power at your minion’s base.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。在你的小兵基地消灭一个力量较低的小兵。

cards.name: Frenzy
cards.text: Each of your minions with power 4 or more gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的每个力量为 4 或以上的随从获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Full Moon
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Each of your minions here has +1 power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：你的每个随从都有+1力量。

cards.name: Leader of the Pack
cards.text: Play on a minion. Talent: If this minion has the highest power here, you may play an extra action.
clarifications: If you play this on another player’s minion and it has the highest power, you still get the benefit. You also get the benefit if the minion is tied for highest power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Leader of the Pack 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。天赋：如果这个随从在这里拥有最高的力量，你可以执行一个额外的动作。
clarificationsZh: 如果你对另一个玩家的随从使用这个并且它具有最高的力量，你仍然可以获得好处。如果随从拥有最高权力，你也会获得好处。

cards.name: Let the Dog Out
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy any number of minions at your minion’s base whose total power is less than or equal to your minion’s power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Let the Dog Out 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。消灭你的随从基地内任意数量的总力量小于或等于你的随从力量的随从。

cards.name: Marking Territory
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if you have more total power here than each other player, reduce this base’s breakpoint to 0 until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional ("until the end of the turn" added)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。持续：在你的回合开始时，如果你在这里的总力量比其他玩家多，则将该基地的断点减少到0，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Moontouched
cards.text: Play on a minion. Talent: If this minion has the highest power here, draw a card.
clarifications: If you play this on another player’s minion and it has the highest power, you still get the benefit. You also get the benefit if the minion is tied for highest power.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。天赋：如果该随从在这里拥有最高的力量，则抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 如果你对另一个玩家的随从使用这个并且它具有最高的力量，你仍然可以获得好处。如果随从拥有最高权力，你也会获得好处。

cards.name: Unstoppable
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从无法被消灭。

cards.name: Great Wolf Spirit
cards.text: Special: On your turn, if you have the most power on two or more bases, you may play this titan on one of them. Ongoing: Your cards here may use their Talents a second time on your turn. At the start of your turn, you may move this titan to a base where you have more power than any other player. Talent: One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (only gives two talent uses to cards at its base, and can now move to different bases)
cards.textZh: 特殊：在你的回合中，如果你在两个或更多基地上拥有最强的力量，你可以在其中一个基地上使用这个泰坦。正在进行：你的牌可以在你的回合中第二次使用他们的天赋。在你的回合开始时，你可以将这个泰坦移动到你比任何其他玩家都拥有更多力量的基地。天赋：你的一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。
cards.imageSource: AEG Official Rulebook Wiki

cards.name: Archmage
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Play an extra action.
clarifications: This extra action may still be played even if Archmage is destroyed on the turn it is played.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：执行一个额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 即使大法师在玩的回合被摧毁，这个额外的动作仍然可以玩。

cards.name: Chronomage
cards.text: Power 3 - You may play an extra action this turn.
clarifications: This extra action may still be played even if Chronomage is destroyed the turn it is played.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 本回合你可以执行一个额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 即使计时法师在进行回合时被摧毁，这个额外动作仍然可以进行。

cards.name: Enchantress
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 抓一张牌。

cards.name: Neophyte
cards.text: Power 2 - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, you may place it in your hand or play it as an extra action. Otherwise, return it to the top of your deck.
clarifications: You must play, place or return the action immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 展示你牌组顶牌。如果是一个动作，您可以将其放在手上或将其作为额外动作来玩。否则，将其放回你的牌库顶。
clarificationsZh: 您必须立即进行、放置或返回动作。

cards.name: Mass Enchantment
cards.text: Reveal the top card of each other player’s deck. Play one revealed action as an extra action. Return unused cards to the top of their decks.
clarifications: You must play the chosen card immediately. You control the card and how it is resolved.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示其他玩家牌组顶牌。将一个显示动作作为额外动作进行。将未使用的卡放回牌组顶部。
clarificationsZh: 您必须立即打出所选的牌。您可以控制该卡及其解决方式。

cards.name: Mystic Studies
cards.text: Draw two cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抽两张牌。

cards.name: Portal
cards.text: Reveal the top five cards of your deck. Place any number of minions revealed into your hand. Return the other cards to the top of your deck in any order.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 展示你牌组顶部的五张牌。将任意数量的展示的随从置于你的手上。以任意顺序将其他卡牌放回牌库顶。

cards.name: Sacrifice
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Draw cards equal to its power. Destroy that minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择你的一名随从。抽取与其力量相等的卡牌。消灭那个小兵。

cards.name: Scry
cards.text: Search your deck for an action and reveal it to all players. Place it into your hand and shuffle your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的套牌中搜索一个动作并将其展示给所有玩家。将它放入你的手上并洗牌。

cards.name: Summon
cards.text: Play an extra minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 扮演额外的随从。

cards.name: Time Loop
cards.text: Play two extra actions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 进行两个额外动作。

cards.name: Winds of Change
cards.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck and draw five cards. You may play an extra action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将你的手牌洗入你的牌库并抓五张牌。你可以进行一个额外的动作。

cards.name: Arcane Protector
cards.text: Special: After you play your fifth or higher card in a turn, you may play this titan. Ongoing: You have +1 power here for every two cards in your hand. Talent: Draw a card.
clarifications: You may play this right after your fifth (or later) card in the turn, no matter what phase of the turn it is.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 特殊：当你在一个回合中打出第五张或更多牌后，你可以打出这个泰坦。持续：你手上每有两张牌，你的力量就会+1。天赋：抽一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 您可以在本回合中的第五张（或之后的）牌之后立即打出此牌，无论该回合处于哪个阶段。

cards.name: Sheriff
cards.text: Power 5 - Before this base scores, this minion may duel another player's minion here. Destroy the losing minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 5 - 在此基地计分前，这个随从可以在这里与另一个玩家的随从决斗。消灭失败的随从。

cards.name: Aramis
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once on your turn, after you play an action that directly affects this minion, you may play an action that directly affects this minion as an extra action.
cards.errata: Yes, Wording ("during your turn" changed to "on your turn")
clarifications: This card can only trigger during the Play Cards phase of your turn. It cannot interact with Last Stand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 持续：在你的回合中，在你执行一个直接影响该随从的动作后，你可以执行一个直接影响该随从的动作作为额外动作。
clarificationsZh: 这张卡只能在你回合的打牌阶段触发。它无法与背水一战互动。

cards.name: Stoneford
cards.text: Power 4 - Search your deck for an action and draw it.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 4 - 在你的牌组中搜索一个动作并绘制它。

cards.name: Akye The Turtle
cards.text: Power 3 - You may place a card from your hand into another player’s hand to draw two cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 您可以将一张牌从您的手牌放入另一位玩家的手牌中以抽两张牌。

cards.name: Diva
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Once each turn, when a standard action directly affects one or more of your other minions here, you may choose this minion to be affected the same way.
clarifications: Diva cannot copy effects of actions played on minions or bases, nor of actions previously played. It cannot copy an effect already copied from a third minion by another Diva etc. It can copy once per action causing the effect, not once per minion being affected. “The same way” means e.g. moving it to the same base, or giving control of it to the same player. It can copy an effect even if it does not fit the original prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”). You must choose whether to copy an effect when the action is played, not when the effect happens. If an effect has multiple parts, choose only one part to copy. The copied effect is considered to come from the original standard action causing the effect, not from the Diva etc. allowing additional affected targets.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 持续：每回合一次，当一个标准动作直接影响这里的一个或多个其他随从时，你可以选择该随从以同样的方式受到影响。
clarificationsZh: 女神不能复制在小兵或基地上进行的动作的效果，也不能复制之前进行的动作的效果。它无法复制已经由另一个 Diva 等从第三个随从复制的效果。它可以在导致该效果的每个动作复制一次，而不是每个受到影响的随从复制一次。 “同样的方式”意味着例如将其移动到同一基地，或将其控制权交给同一玩家。即使效果不符合原始先决条件（例如“功率 3 或更高”），它也可以复制效果。您必须选择是否在执行动作时复制效果，而不是在效果发生时复制效果。如果效果有多个部分，请仅选择一个部分进行复制。复制的效果被认为来自导致该效果的原始标准动作，而不是来自 Diva 等，从而允许其他受影响的目标。

cards.name: Shield Maiden
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal the top card of another player’s deck. If it is an action, or a minion of power 3 or less, place it into your hand. Otherwise, return it.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden, etc.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 展示其他玩家牌组顶牌。如果它是一个动作，或者是力量为 3 或以下的随从，则将其置于你的手上。否则，退回。
clarificationsZh: 你手上不属于你的牌仍然被视为你的牌：你可以正常打出它们，并且你可以控制它们，直到它们退出游戏，此时它们会回到它们的所有者手中。不属于你的卡牌只是在你的手牌或牌组中展示出来，它们会留在那里，但如果它们被发现去了其他地方，它们就会回到它们的所有者身边，除非像盾女等卡牌明确允许。

cards.name: Calicoin
cards.text: Power 2 - You may place a +1 power counter on another minion here.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以在此处的另一个随从身上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Mummy
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After this base scores, you may bury this minion on another base.
clarifications: This ability can only trigger if the Mummy is uncovered before the base finishes scoring. If you use its ability, bury it directly on a different base before the old base is discarded, without going to the discard pile or your hand first.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 特殊：在此基地计分后，您可以将该随从埋在另一个基地上。
clarificationsZh: 只有在基地完成得分之前木乃伊被发现时才能触发此能力。如果你使用它的能力，在旧基地被丢弃之前将其直接埋在不同的基地上，而无需先进入弃牌堆或你的手牌。

cards.name: Rainbow Girl
cards.text: Power 2 - Your other minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你的其他随从获得+1力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 这不会影响这张牌之后打出的随从。

cards.name: Samurai-Chan
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：当该随从从场上进入弃牌堆后，抓一张牌。
clarificationsZh: 从游戏中进入弃牌堆的随从包括在得分后被弃置以及被摧毁。

cards.name: Bewitched
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. When this minion leaves play, transfer this action to another minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。当该随从离开战场时，将此动作转移给另一个随从。

cards.name: Eh?
cards.text: After you play your first action in a turn, you may play this card as an extra action. One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn, and you may place this card back into your hand instead of the discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你完成一轮中的第一个动作后，你可以将这张牌作为额外动作来使用。你的一个随从获得+1力量直到回合结束，并且你可以将这张卡放回你的手牌而不是弃牌堆。

cards.name: Fast as Lightning
cards.text: Choose a minion. Until the end of the turn, it gains +2 power, and if it would go to the discard pile it is returned to its owner’s hand instead.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 选择一个随从。直到回合结束，它获得+2力量，如果它会进入弃牌堆，它会返回到其所有者的手上。

cards.name: Fighting Spirit Prize
cards.text: Draw two cards and place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
clarifications: You place either two +1 power counters on a single minion, or one power counter each on two minions.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 抓两张牌并在你的随从身上放置两个总计+1力量指示物。
clarificationsZh: 你可以在一个小兵上放置两个+1能量指示物，或者在两个小兵上各放置一个能量指示物。

cards.name: High-Speed Chase
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. That minion gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The power boost is unchanged even if High-Speed Chase is destroyed.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将此动作转移到另一个基地，将你的一个随从从这里移动到那里。该随从获得+3力量直到回合结束。
clarificationsZh: 即使高速追逐被破坏，威力提升也不会改变。

cards.name: It's Blitzin' Time!
cards.text: One of your minions gains +4 power until the end of the turn
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (part of Mega Troopers rework)
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 你的一个随从获得+4力量直到回合结束

cards.name: Kaiju Conflict
cards.text: Play two extra actions
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 进行两个额外动作

cards.name: Mouse, Bird and Sausage
cards.text: Choose up to two minions of the same faction at a base to gain +2 power each until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: Mouse, Bird and Sausage 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在基地选择最多两名同一阵营的随从，每人获得+2力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Shark Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Place a +1 power counter on it. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩你的一个随从。在其上放置一个+1能量指示物。持续：在你的回合开始时，如果这是你唯一的随从，则在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

cards.name: Smart Set-Up
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Ongoing: After the first time each turn a minion is played here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩另一个玩家的随从。进行中：每回合第一次在这里打出随从后，抓一张牌。

factions.name: Wraithrustlers
mechanics: Wraith On-Base Actions That Give Benefits For Being Destroyed

cards.name: Funkman
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After you destroy an action, give each of your minions on its base +1 power until the end of the turn OR draw a card. Special: Before a base scores, you may transfer an action on it to another base.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 持续：在你摧毁一个行动后，让你的每个随从在其基础上获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束或抓一张牌。特别：在一个基地计分前，你可以将其上的动作转移到另一个基地。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。
对于具有触发效果的卡牌 – 例如“X 发生后”——每次 X 发生时效果都会完成，即使多个 X 同时发生也是如此。

cards.name: Ellen
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Destroy one of your actions on this base to reduce this base’s breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn. Ongoing: After a Wraith is destroyed here, you may play an extra action.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 天赋：摧毁你在该基地的一项行动，使该基地的断点减少 3 点，直到回合结束。进行中：当幽灵在这里被摧毁后，你可以进行一个额外的动作。
clarificationsZh: 具有“直到 Y”效果的能力仅影响当前场上的牌，但其效果会持续到 Y，即使导致该效果的牌离开场上或移走，或者即使任何先决条件不再成立。
对于具有触发效果的卡牌 – 例如“X 发生后”——每次 X 发生时效果都会完成，即使多个 X 同时发生也是如此。
幽灵是一个带有“幽灵”标签的动作——粘糊糊、图书馆员鬼魂、恶魔狗和古代苏美尔神。

cards.name: Roy
cards.text: Power 3 - You may transfer one of your actions from another base to here. Ongoing: If a Wraith has been destroyed here this turn, this minion has +2 power.
clarifications: A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 3 - 你可以将你的一项行动从另一个基地转移到这里。进行中：如果本回合中有一个幽灵在这里被摧毁，则该随从拥有+2力量。
clarificationsZh: 幽灵是一个带有“幽灵”标签的动作——粘糊糊、图书馆员鬼魂、恶魔狗和古代苏美尔神。

cards.name: Watson
cards.text: Power 2 - You may destroy one of your actions on this base OR reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Wraith, draw it, and shuffle the rest into your deck.
clarifications: A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 你可以摧毁你在这个基地上的一项行动，或者从你的牌库顶部展示牌，直到你展示一张幽灵牌，抽出它，然后将其余的牌洗入你的牌库。
clarificationsZh: 幽灵是一个带有“幽灵”标签的动作——粘糊糊、图书馆员鬼魂、恶魔狗和古代苏美尔神。

cards.name: Ancient Sumerian God
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Talent: Store an action from your discard pile that can be played on a base under this card. Ongoing: This base's breakpoint is increased by 3. When this card leaves play, for each base you may play one of the actions stored under this card as an extra action there.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 幽灵 - 打出到基地上。天赋：存储弃牌堆中的一个动作，可以在这张卡下的基地上进行。持续：该基地的断点增加 3 个。当这张卡离开战场时，对于每个基地，您可以执行这张卡下存储的行动之一，作为那里的额外行动。
clarificationsZh: 所有幽灵对断点的更改都会添加到一起，即使是两个同名的断点也是如此。

cards.name: Demon Dogs
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. You may store a minion of power 3 or less from your hand or discard pile under this card. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, you may play a minion stored under it as an extra minion.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 幽灵 - 打出到基地上。你可以从你的手牌或弃牌堆中将一个力量为 3 或以下的随从存放在这张卡下方。持续：该基地的断点增加3点。这张卡被破坏后，你可以使用其下存储的一个随从作为额外的随从。
clarificationsZh: 所有幽灵对断点的更改都会添加到一起，即使是两个同名的断点也是如此。

cards.name: Ectoplasm One
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. If you move a minion, you may destroy an action on the new base.
clarifications: You must move one of your minions there if you have one. If you don’t have one, you may not destroy an action.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。天赋：将此动作转移到另一个基地，将你的一个随从从这里移动到那里。如果你移动了一个小兵，你可能会破坏新基地上的一个行动。
clarificationsZh: 如果你有一名随从，你必须将其移至那里。如果你没有，你就不能破坏一个动作。

cards.name: Librarian Haunt
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, draw three cards.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 幽灵 - 打出到基地上。持续：该基地的断点增加3点。这张卡被破坏后，抽3张卡。
clarificationsZh: 所有幽灵对断点的更改都会添加到一起，即使是两个同名的断点也是如此。

cards.name: Resurgence
cards.text: Choose an action on a base. Destroy it or transfer it to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
clarifications: If you play it as a Special, you can target an action that’s not on the base being scored.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在基地上选择一个动作。摧毁它或将其转移到另一个基地。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏。
clarificationsZh: 如果您将其作为特殊游戏，您可以瞄准不在得分垒上的动作。

cards.name: Slimy
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, each of your minions here gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 幽灵 - 打出到基地上。持续：该基地的断点增加3点。这张卡被摧毁后，你这里的每个随从获得+2力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: The Tools and The Talent
cards.text: Search your deck for a card and place it on top of your deck
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: The Tools and The Talent 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索一张牌并将其放在你的牌组顶部

cards.name: Unlicensed Nuclear Accelerator
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. Talent: Destroy one of your actions on this base to place a +1 power counter on this minion.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 玩一个随从。进行中：该随从拥有+2力量。天赋：摧毁你在此基地上的一项行动，在该随从上放置一个+1力量指示物。

mechanicsZh: 幽灵基地行动为被摧毁带来好处

cards.name: Wreck-It Ralph
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Play a base modifier here as an extra action, OR destroy a base modifier here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 天赋：在这里发挥一个基础修改器作为额外动作，或者在这里摧毁一个基础修改器。

cards.name: Fix-It Felix Jr.
cards.text: power 4 - Place a base modifier from your discard pile into your hand. Talent: Place a base modifier here on top of its owner’s deck.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: power 4 - 将你的弃牌堆中的一个基本修正值放入你的手上。天赋：将一个基础修饰符放置在其拥有者的牌组顶部。

cards.name: Vanellope Von Schweetz
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Move this character to another base and place a +1 power counter on it.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：将此角色移动到另一个基地并在其上放置一个 +1 力量指示物。

cards.name: Sergeant Calhoun
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: If you have a base modifier here, your other characters currently here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 3 - 天赋：如果你在这里有基础调整值，那么你当前在这里的其他角色获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Sugar Rush Racer
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: After you play a base modifier, you may move this character to or from that base to give it +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 持续：在你使用基础修改器后，你可以将该角色移入或移出该基地，使其获得 +1 力量，直到回合结束。

cards.name: Cy-Bug Infestation
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Destroy this card and this base. Starting with the player to your left, each player chooses a base and moves all their cards here to there. Replace the base normally.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：摧毁这张卡和这个基地。从你左边的玩家开始，每个玩家选择一个基地并将他们所有的牌从这里移动到那里。正常更换底座。

cards.name: Escape Pod
cards.text: Move up to two of your cards from one base to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores; move one of your cards from the scoring base instead of two.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 将最多两张牌从一个基地移动到另一个基地。特别：您可以在基地计分前玩此游戏；将您的一张牌从计分库中移出，而不是两张。

cards.name: I’m Gonna Wreck It!
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is reduced by 3. Talent: This base’s abilities are cancelled until the start of your next turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。持续：该基地的断点减少 3 个。 天赋：该基地的能力被取消，直到你的下一回合开始。

cards.name: Kart Bakery
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If you have a character here, draw a card.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：如果你这里有角色，抓一张牌。

cards.name: King Candy
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: You may move this card to another base. Choose a character at this card’s base. Until the start of your next turn, the abilities of character modifiers on it are cancelled and power counters on it do not add to its power.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：你可以将这张卡移动到另一个基地。选择这张卡底部的一个角色。在你的下一个回合开始之前，其角色修饰符的能力将被取消，其力量指示物也不会增加其力量。

cards.name: Mints Eruption
cards.text: Choose a base. Swap it with a base in the discard pile. All cards from the original base remain.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 选择一个基地。将其与弃牌堆中的底座交换。原始基地的所有卡牌都会保留。

cards.name: Research Lab Beacon
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: If there are four or more characters here, destroy this card. Talent: Name a faction. Move all characters of that faction to here.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。进行中：如果这里有四个或更多角色，则破坏这张卡。天赋：命名一个派系。将该派系的所有角色移至此处。

cards.name: Sugar Rush
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Move up to two of your characters from here to another base or from another base to here. They each gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.imageSource: SmashUp Wiki
cards.textZh: 基础修饰符。天赋：将最多两个角色从这里移动到另一个基地或从另一个基地移动到这里。他们各自获得+1力量直到回合结束。

factions.name: Zombies

cards.name: Zombie Lord
cards.text: Power 5 - You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less from your discard pile on each base where you have no minions.
clarifications: You determine which bases you have no minions on when you play Zombie Lord. You may play only one extra minion on each of those bases even if those minions move away. You must play those extra minions immediately.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 5 - 在您没有随从的每个基地，您可以从弃牌堆中额外打出一个力量为 2 或更少的随从。
clarificationsZh: 当你玩“僵尸领主”时，你可以决定哪些基地没有仆从。即使这些小兵离开，你也只能在每个基地上额外扮演一名小兵。你必须立即使用那些额外的小兵。

cards.name: Grave Digger
cards.text: Power 4 - You may place a minion from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 4 - 你可以将弃牌堆中的一个随从放入你的手牌。

cards.name: Tenacious Z
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn you may play this card from your discard pile as an extra minion. You may only use the ability of one Tenacious Z each turn.
clarifications: You can only use its ability during the Play Cards phase of your turn. You can only use one Tenacious Z ability per turn, even from the same card.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 力量 2 - 特殊：在你的回合中，你可以将这张牌从你的弃牌堆中作为额外的随从使用。你每回合只能使用一个坚韧 Z 的能力。
clarificationsZh: 你只能在你回合的打牌阶段使用它的能力。你每回合只能使用一个坚韧 Z 技能，即使来自同一张卡。

cards.name: Walker
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or return it to the top of your deck.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: Power 2 - 查看你牌组顶牌。丢弃它或将其放回你的牌库顶部。

cards.name: Grave Robbing
cards.text: Place a card from your discard pile into your hand
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将弃牌堆中的一张牌置入你的手牌

cards.name: Lend a Hand
cards.text: Shuffle any number of cards from your discard pile into your deck.
clarifications: This does not get shuffled into the deck with the other cards.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的牌从弃牌堆洗入牌库。
clarificationsZh: 这张牌不会与其他牌一起洗入牌堆。

cards.name: Mall Crawl
cards.text: Search your deck for any number of cards with the same name and place them into your discard pile. Shuffle your deck
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在你的牌组中搜索任意数量的同名牌，并将它们放入你的弃牌堆中。洗牌你的牌组

cards.name: Not Enough Bullets
cards.text: Place any number of minions with the same name from your discard pile into your hand.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 将任意数量的同名随从从你的弃牌堆放入你的手牌。

cards.name: Outbreak
cards.text: Play an extra minion on a base where you have no minions
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 在没有小兵的基地上扮演额外的小兵

cards.name: Overrun
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players cannot play minions on this base. Destroy this action at the start of your turn.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。进行中：其他玩家不能在此基地上扮演小兵。在你的回合开始时消灭这个行动。

cards.name: They Keep Coming
cards.text: Play an extra minion from your discard pile.
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.textZh: 从你的弃牌堆中额外打出一个随从。

cards.name: They're Coming To Get You
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once on your turn, you may play a minion here from your discard pile instead of from your hand.
clarifications: You can use the minion play from the discard pile instead of either a regular minion or a generic extra minion play (e.g. Abduction), as long as it happens during your Play Cards phase. You cannot use it instead of a specific extra minion play (e.g. Hoverbot).
cards.imageSource: AEG 鐎规ɑ鏌熺憴鍕灟缂佹潙鐔€
cards.imageAlt: They're Coming To Get You 璺?Smash Up
cards.textZh: 打出到基地上。正在进行：一旦轮到你，你可以从你的弃牌堆而不是你的手牌中扮演一个随从。
clarificationsZh: 您可以使用弃牌堆中的小兵打法，而不是常规小兵打法或通用的额外小兵打法（例如绑架），只要它发生在您的纸牌阶段即可。您不能使用它来代替特定的额外小兵游戏（例如 Hoverbot）。

mechanicsZh: 布拉阿恩斯！ （填满你的废弃堆）
